translation: They are absorbed in intuitive peace and pleasure.
simpleTranslation: They find deep peace and joy within.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹਨਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਅੰਦਰ ਗਹਿਰਾ ਸੁਖ ਅਤੇ ਖੁਸ਼ੀ ਮਿਲਦੀ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: Apuny jn kau swis swis smwry ]
unicode: ਅਪੁਨੇ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਮਾਰੇ ॥
transliteration: apune jan kau saas saas samaare ||
translation: He remembers His servants with each and every breath.
simpleTranslation: He thinks of His followers with every breath.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਹਰ ਸਾਹ ਨਾਲ ਆਪਣੇ ਸੇਵਕਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਯਾਦ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: O Nanak, they are the beloveds of the Transcendent Lord God. ||8||10||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, they are the loved ones of God. ||8||10||
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ, ਓਹ ਗੋਦ ਦੇ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਨੇ। ॥੮॥੧੦॥

translation: Shalok:
simpleTranslation: Saying:
punjabiTranslation: ਕਹਿ ਰਹੇ ਹਨ:

gurmukhi: krx kwrx pRBu eyku hY dUsr nwhI koie ]
unicode: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਦੂਸਰ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਇ ॥
transliteration: karan kaaran prabh ek hai dhoosar naahee koi ||
translation: God alone is the Doer of deeds - there is no other at all.
simpleTranslation: Only God does everything - there’s no one else.
punjabiTranslation: ਬੱਸ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਹੀ ਸਾਡੇ ਕਰਮਾਂ ਦੇ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲੇ ਨੇ - ਹੋਰ ਕੋਈ ਨਹੀਂ.

gurmukhi: nwnk iqsu bilhwrxY jil Qil mhIAil soie ]1]
unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮਹੀਅਲਿ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
transliteration: naanak tis balihaaranai jal thal maheeal soi ||1||
translation: O Nanak, I am a sacrifice to the One, who pervades the waters, the lands, the sky and all space. ||1||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, I give myself to the One, who fills the water, land, sky, and all space.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ, ਮੈਂ ਉਸੇ ਨੂੰ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ, ਜੋ ਪਾਣੀ, ਜੰਗਲ, ਅਸਮਾਨ ਅਤੇ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਥਾਵਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਹੈ।

translation: Ashtapadee:
simpleTranslation: Eight verses.
punjabiTranslation: ਅੱਠ ਪਦ਼।

translation: The Doer, the Cause of causes, is potent to do anything.
simpleTranslation: The Doer, the reason for everything, can do anything.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਰਣ ਵਾਲਾ, ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਦਾ ਕਰਣ, ਕੁੱਝ ਵੀ ਕਰ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: That which pleases Him, comes to pass.
simpleTranslation: What makes Him happy, happens.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਉਸਨੂੰ ਖੁਸ਼ ਕਰਦਾ, ਉਹੀ ਹੁੰਦਾ।

translation: In an instant, He creates and destroys.
simpleTranslation: In a moment, He makes and breaks.
punjabiTranslation: ਇੱਕ ਪਲ ਵਿਚ, ਉਹ ਬਣਾਉਂਦਾ ਅਤੇ ਤੋੜਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He has no end or limitation.
simpleTranslation: He has no end or limits.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦਾ ਕੋਈ ਅੰਤ ਨਹੀਂ।

translation: By His Order, He established the earth, and He maintains it unsupported.
simpleTranslation: He made the earth by His command, and keeps it up without support.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੇ ਹੁਕਮ ਨਾਲ ਧਰਤੀ ਬਣਾਈ, ਤੇ ਬਿਨਾ ਸਹਾਰੇ ਰੱਖਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: By His Order, the world was created; by His Order, it shall merge again into Him.
simpleTranslation: The world was made by His command; it will return to Him by His command.
punjabiTranslation: ਦੁਨੀਆ ਉਸਦੇ ਹੁਕਮ ਨਾਲ ਬਣੀ; ਉਹ ਉਸਦੇ ਹੁਕਮ ਨਾਲ ਵਾਪਸ ਜਾਵੇगी.

translation: By His Order, one's occupation is high or low.
simpleTranslation: By His command, work is either high or low.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੇ ਹੁਕਮ ਨਾਲ, ਕੰਮ ਉੱਚ ਨਹੀਚ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: By His Order, there are so many colors and forms.
simpleTranslation: By His command, there are so many colors and shapes.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੇ ਹੁਕਮ ਨਾਲ ਬਹੁਤ ਸਾਰੇ ਰੰਗ ਅਤੇ ਰੂਪ ਹਨ।

translation: Having created the Creation, He beholds His own greatness.
simpleTranslation: After creating everything, God sees His own greatness.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਬਣਾਉਣ ਤੋਂ ਬਾਅਦ, ਵਾਹਿਗੁਰੂ ਆਪਣੀ ਵੱਡਾਈ ਨੂੰ ਵੇਖਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: O Nanak, He is pervading in all. ||1||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, God is in everything. ||1||
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਰੱਬ ਸਭ ਵਿੱਚ ਹੈ। ||੧||

translation: If it pleases God, one attains salvation.
simpleTranslation: If God is happy, a person finds liberation.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਖੁਸ਼ ਹੋ ਜਾਵੇ, ਬੰਦੇ ਨੂੰ ਮੁਕਤੀ ਮਿਲਦੀ ਹੈ।

translation: If it pleases God, then even stones can swim.
simpleTranslation: If God wants it, even stones can float.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੇ ਰੱਬ ਚਾਹੇ, ਤਾਂ ਪਾਥਰ ਵੀ ਤੈਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਨੇ।

gurmukhi: pRB BwvY ibnu sws qy rwKY ]
unicode: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਾਸ ਤੇ ਰਾਖੈ ॥
transliteration: prabh bhaavai bin saas te raakhai ||
translation: If it pleases God, the body is preserved, even without the breath of life.
simpleTranslation: If God is happy, the body stays safe, even without breath.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਖੁਸ਼ ਹੋਵੇ, ਬਿਨਾ ਸਾਹ ਵੀ ਸਰੀਰ ਸੁਰੱਖਿਅਤ ਰਹਿੰਦਾ।

gurmukhi: pRB BwvY qw hir gux BwKY ]
unicode: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਭਾਖੈ ॥
transliteration: prabh bhaavai taa har gun bhaakhai ||
translation: If it pleases God, then one chants the Lord's Glorious Praises.
simpleTranslation: If God is happy, then we sing His praises.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਖੁਸ਼ ਹੋਵੇ, ਤਾਂ ਅਸੀਂ ਉਸਦੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉਂਦੇ ਹਾਂ।

translation: If it pleases God, then even sinners are saved.
simpleTranslation: If God wants, even the sinners can be saved.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਚਾਹੁੰਦੇ ਹਨ, ਤਾਂ ਪਾਪੀ ਵੀ ਬਚ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: He Himself acts, and He Himself contemplates.
simpleTranslation: He does things, and He thinks about them.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ, ਅਤੇ ਉਹ ਇਸ ਬਾਰੇ ਸੋਚਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He Himself is the Master of both worlds.
simpleTranslation: He is the Lord of both worlds.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਦੋਨੋਂ ਜਗਤਾਂ ਦਾ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਹੈ।

translation: He plays and He enjoys; He is the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.
simpleTranslation: He plays and enjoys; He knows our hearts.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਖੇਡਦਾ ਤੇ ਮਜ਼ੇ ਲੈਂਦਾ ਹੈ; ਉਹ ਸਾਡੇ ਦਿਲਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: As He wills, He causes actions to be done.
simpleTranslation: As God wants, actions happen.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਵੇਂ ਰੱਬ ਚਾਹੁੰਦਾ, ਕੰਮ ਹੁੰਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: Nanak sees no other than Him. ||2||
simpleTranslation: Nanak sees no one else but God. ||2||
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ ਦੇਖਦਾ ਹੋਰ ਕੋਈ ਨਹੀਂ ਸੋ ਬੱਸ ਰੱਬ ਹੈ॥੨॥

gurmukhi: khu mwnuK qy ikAw hoie AwvY ]
unicode: ਕਹੁ ਮਾਨੁਖ ਤੇ ਕਿਆ ਹੋਇ ਆਵੈ ॥
transliteration: kahu maanukh te kiaa hoi aavai ||
translation: Tell me - what can a mere mortal do?
simpleTranslation: Tell me - what can a human do?
punjabiTranslation: ਕਹੋ - ਮਨੁੱਖ ਕੀ ਕਰ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ?

translation: Whatever pleases God is what He causes us to do.
simpleTranslation: Whatever makes God happy is what He makes us do.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਗੋਦ ਨੂੰ ਚੰਗਾ ਲੱਗੇ ਉਹੀ ਸਾਨੂੰ ਕਰਵਾਉਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: ies kY hwiQ hoie qw sBu ikCu lyie ]
unicode: ਇਸ ਕੈ ਹਾਥਿ ਹੋਇ ਤਾ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਲੇਇ ॥
transliteration: eis kai haath hoi taa sabh kichh lei ||
translation: If it were in our hands, we would grab up everything.
simpleTranslation: If it was up to us, we would take everything.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੇ ਇਹ ਸਾਡੇ ਹੱਥਾਂ ਵਿਚ ਹੁੰਦਾ, ਅਸੀਂ ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਲੈ ਲਿਆ ਹੁੰਦਾ।

translation: Whatever pleases God - that is what He does.
simpleTranslation: Whatever makes God happy - that's what He does.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਤਿਸਨੂੰ ਚੰਗਾ ਲੱਗੇ - ਉਹੀ ਉਹ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Through ignorance, people are engrossed in corruption.
simpleTranslation: People are caught up in corruption because they don't know.
punjabiTranslation: ਲੋੜੀਂਦੇ ਬਾਈਆਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਬਿਕਰਿਆ ਹਨ।

translation: If they knew better, they would save themselves.
simpleTranslation: If they understood, they would protect themselves.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੇ ਉਹ ਸਮਝਦੇ, ਆਪਣਾ ਬਚਾਵ ਕਰਦੇ।

translation: Deluded by doubt, they wander around in the ten directions.
simpleTranslation: Confused by doubt, they roam in all directions.
punjabiTranslation: ਭਰਮ ਵਿੱਚ ਔਖੇ, ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਦਿਸ਼ਾ ਵਿੱਚ ਗੁੰਮ ਹੋ ਰਹੇ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: inmK mwih cwir kuMt iPir AwvY ]
unicode: ਨਿਮਖ ਮਾਹਿ ਚਾਰਿ ਕੁੰਟ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ॥
transliteration: nimakh maeh chaar ku(n)T fir aavai ||
translation: In an instant, their minds go around the four corners of the world and come back again.
simpleTranslation: In a moment, their minds travel the world and return.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਕ ਪਲ ਵਿੱਚ, ਉਨਾ ਦੇ ਦਿਮਾਗ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਫਿਰਦੇ ਨੇ ਤੇ ਵਾਪਸ ਆਉਂਦੇ ਨੇ।

gurmukhi: kir ikrpw ijsu ApnI Bgiq dyie ]
unicode: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਅਪਨੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਦੇਇ ॥
transliteration: kar kirapaa jis apanee bhagat dhei ||
translation: Those whom the Lord mercifully blesses with His devotional worship
simpleTranslation: Those whom God kindly blesses with devotion.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਰੱਬ ਮਿਹਰ ਕਰਕੇ ਭਗਤਿ ਦਿੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: - O Nanak, they are absorbed into the Naam. ||3||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, they merge into the Name. ||3||
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਹ ਨਾਮ ਵਿੱਚ ਮਿਲ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹਨ। ||੩||

gurmukhi: iKn mih nIc kIt kau rwj ]
unicode: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਨੀਚ ਕੀਟ ਕਉ ਰਾਜ ॥
transliteration: khin meh neech keeT kau raaj ||
translation: In an instant, the lowly worm is transformed into a king.
simpleTranslation: In a moment, a lowly worm becomes a king.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਕ ਲਮ੍ਹੇ ਵਿਚ, ਨੀਛ ਕੀਟ ਰਾਜਾ ਬਣ ਜਾਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: The Supreme Lord God is the Protector of the humble.
simpleTranslation: The Supreme God cares for the humble.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਾਵਨ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਨਿਮਾਣਿਆਂ ਦਾ ਸਹਾਇਕ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: jw kw idRsit kCU n AwvY ]
unicode: ਜਾ ਕਾ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
transliteration: jaa kaa dhirasaT kachhoo na aavai ||
translation: Even one who has never been seen at all,
simpleTranslation: Even someone who's never been seen at all,
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਸਨੂੰ ਕਦੇ ਵੀ ਨਹੀਂ ਵੇਖਿਆ ਗਿਆ,

translation: becomes instantly famous in the ten directions.
simpleTranslation: Instantly becomes famous everywhere.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੁਰੰਤ ਹਰ ਥਾਂ ਮਸ਼ਹੂਰ ਹੋ ਜਾਂਦਾ।

translation: And that one upon whom He bestows His blessings
simpleTranslation: And the one He blesses
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇ ਉਹ ਜਿਸ 'ਤੇ ਉਹ ਕਰਮ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ ॥

gurmukhi: qw kw lyKw n gnY jgdIs ]
unicode: ਤਾ ਕਾ ਲੇਖਾ ਨ ਗਨੈ ਜਗਦੀਸ ॥
transliteration: taa kaa lekhaa na ganai jagadhees ||
translation: the Lord of the world does not hold him to his account.
simpleTranslation: The Lord of the world doesn't judge him.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਗਤ ਦੇ ਮਾਲਕ ਉਸਦਾ ਹਿਸਾਬ ਨਹੀਂ ਲੈਂਦੇ।

gurmukhi: jIau ipMfu sB iqs kI rwis ]
unicode: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਭ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
transliteration: jeeau pi(n)dd sabh tis kee raas ||
translation: Soul and body are all His property.
simpleTranslation: Both soul and body are all His own.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੀਵ ਅਤੇ ਸਰੀਰ ਸਾਰੇ ਉਸਦੇ ਨੇ।

translation: Each and every heart is illuminated by the Perfect Lord God.
simpleTranslation: Every heart shines with the Perfect God.
punjabiTranslation: ਹਰ ਦਿਲ ਪੂਰਨ ਵਾਹਿਗੁਰੂ ਦੇ ਚਾਨਣ ਨਾਲ ਚਮਕਦਾ।

translation: He Himself fashioned His own handiwork.
simpleTranslation: He made His own creation.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਨੇ ਆਪਣੀ ਸਿਰਜਨਹਾਰ ਬਣਾਈ।

translation: Nanak lives by beholding His greatness. ||4||
simpleTranslation: Nanak lives by seeing His greatness.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਡਾਈ ਵੇਖ ਕੇ ਜੀਉਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: ies kw blu nwhI iesu hwQ ]
unicode: ਇਸ ਕਾ ਬਲੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਇਸੁ ਹਾਥ ॥
transliteration: eis kaa bal naahee is haath ||
translation: There is no power in the hands of mortal beings;
simpleTranslation: Mortal beings have no power;
punjabiTranslation: ਜੇਹੜੇ ਲੋਕ ਹਨ ਉਹਨਾਂ ਕੋਲ ਕੋਈ ਬਲ ਨਹੀਂ।

translation: the Doer, the Cause of causes is the Lord of all.
simpleTranslation: The Doer, the reason for everything is God for all.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲਾ, ਸਾਰੀ ਦੁਨੀਆਂ ਦਾ ਰੱਬ ਹੈ।

translation: The helpless beings are subject to His Command.
simpleTranslation: The weak ones follow His orders.
punjabiTranslation: ਦੋਸ਼ੀ ਲੋਕ ਉਸਦੀ ਹੁਕਮ ਮੰਨਦੇ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: jo iqsu BwvY soeI Puin QIau ]
unicode: ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਫੁਨਿ ਥੀਉ ॥
transliteration: jo tis bhaavai soiee fun theeau ||
translation: That which pleases Him, ultimately comes to pass.
simpleTranslation: What makes God happy will eventually happen.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਕੁਝ ਗੋ ਦੇ ਬਿਹਾਵੇਗਾ ਉਹ ਫਿਰ ਹੋਏਗਾ।

translation: Sometimes, they abide in exaltation; sometimes, they are depressed.
simpleTranslation: Sometimes they feel on top of the world; other times, they feel down.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਦਾਈ ਉਹ ਆਸਮਾਨ ਉਤੇ ਹੁੰਦੇ ਹਨ; ਕਦਾਈ ਉਹ ਹੇਠਾਂ ਹੁੰਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: Sometimes, they are sad, and sometimes they laugh with joy and delight.
simpleTranslation: Sometimes they feel sad, sometimes they laugh with joy.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਦੇ ਉਹ ਉਦਾਸ ਹੁੰਦੇ ਨੇ, ਕਦੇ ਖੁਸ਼ੀ ਨਾਲ ਹੱਸਦੇ ਨੇ।

translation: Sometimes, they are occupied with slander and anxiety.
simpleTranslation: Sometimes, they get caught up in gossip and worry.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਦਾਂ ਕਦਾਂ, ਉਹ ਨਿੰਦਿਆ ਅਤੇ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਵਿੱਚ ਫਸ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: Sometimes, they are high in the Akaashic Ethers, sometimes in the nether regions of the underworld.
simpleTranslation: Sometimes, they are in the high skies, sometimes in the depths below.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਦੇ ਉੱਚ ਆਕਾਸ ਵਿੱਚ, ਕਦੇ ਗਹਿਰਾਈ ਵਿੱਚ।

translation: Sometimes, they know the contemplation of God.
simpleTranslation: Sometimes, they think about God.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਦੀ, ਉਹ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦਾ ਸੋਚਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: O Nanak, God Himself unites them with Himself. ||5||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, God brings them close to Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਉਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਆਪਣੇ ਨਾਲ ਜੋੜਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Sometimes, they dance in various ways.
simpleTranslation: Sometimes, they dance in different styles.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਦੇ ਉਹ ਵੱਖ-ਵੱਖ ਢੰਗਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਨੱਚਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: Sometimes, they remain asleep day and night.
simpleTranslation: Sometimes, they stay asleep all day and night.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਦੇ ਕਦੇ, ਉਹ ਦਿਨ ਰਾਤ ਸੋਇ ਰਹਿੰਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: Sometimes, they are awesome, in terrible rage.
simpleTranslation: Sometimes, they're really mad and scary.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਦੇ-ਕਦੇ, ਉਹ ਬਹੁਤ ਗੁੱਸੇ ਵਿੱਚ ਦਿਖਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: Sometimes, they are the dust of the feet of all.
simpleTranslation: Sometimes, they are the dust at everyone's feet.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਦੇ, ਉਹ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਦੇ ਪੱਪੇ ਦੀ ਗੰਦੀ ਹੁੰਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: Sometimes, they sit as great kings.
simpleTranslation: Sometimes they sit like great kings.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਦੇ ਕਦੇ ਉਹ ਵੱਡੇ ਰਾਜਿਆਂ ਵਾਂਗ ਬੈਠਦੇ ਹਨ।

simpleTranslation: Sometimes, scholars give talks.

simpleTranslation: Sometimes, they stay silent in deep thought.

punjabiTranslation: ਜਦੋਂ ਤਕ ਕੋਈ ਸੋਚਦਾ ਹੈ ਕਿ ਉਹ ਆਪ ਹੀ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ,

gurmukhi: qb ies kau suKu nwhI koie ]
unicode: ਤਬ ਇਸ ਕਉ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਇ ॥
transliteration: tab is kau sukh naahee koi ||
translation: he shall have no peace.
simpleTranslation: He will never find peace.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਕਦੇ ਵੀ ਸੁਖ ਨਹੀਂ ਪਾਏਗਾ।

gurmukhi: jb ieh jwnY mY ikCu krqw ]
unicode: ਜਬ ਇਹ ਜਾਨੈ ਮੈ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਤਾ ॥
transliteration: jab ieh jaanai mai kichh karataa ||
translation: As long as this mortal thinks that he is the one who does things,
simpleTranslation: As long as this person thinks they are the doer,
punjabiTranslation: ਜਦੋਂ ਇਹ ਬੰਦਾ ਸਮਝਦਾ ਹੈ ਕਿ ਮੈਂ ਕੁਝ ਕਰਦਾ ਹਾਂ।

gurmukhi: qb lgu grB join mih iPrqw ]
unicode: ਤਬ ਲਗੁ ਗਰਭ ਜੋਨਿ ਮਹਿ ਫਿਰਤਾ ॥
transliteration: tab lag garabh jon meh firataa ||
translation: he shall wander in reincarnation through the womb.
simpleTranslation: They will keep being born in different lives.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਵੱਖ-ਵੱਖ ਜ਼ਿੰਦਗੀਆਂ ਵਿਚ ਜਨਮ ਲੈਂਦੇ ਰਹਿਣਗੇ।

translation: As long as he considers one an enemy, and another a friend,
simpleTranslation: As long as he sees one as an enemy and another as a friend.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਦੋਂ ਕੋਈ ਇਕ ਨੂੰ ਦੋਸ਼ੀ ਤੇ ਦੂਜੇ ਨੂੰ ਮਿੱਤ੍ਰ ਸਮਝੇ।

translation: his mind shall not come to rest.
simpleTranslation: His mind won't find peace.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦਾ ਦਿਮਾਗ ਸਦਾ ਆਰਾਮ ਨਹੀਂ ਲੈਂਦਾ।

gurmukhi: jb lgu moh mgn sMig mwie ]
unicode: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਮੋਹ ਮਗਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਾਇ ॥
transliteration: jab lag moh magan sa(n)g mai ||
translation: As long as he is intoxicated with attachment to Maya,
simpleTranslation: As long as he is lost in love for the world,
punjabiTranslation: ਜਦ ਤਕ ਉਹ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਦੇ ਪਿਆਰ ਵਿੱਚ ਖੋਇਆ ਹੈ,

gurmukhi: qb lgu Drm rwie dyie sjwie ]
unicode: ਤਬ ਲਗੁ ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਦੇਇ ਸਜਾਇ ॥
transliteration: tab lag dharam rai dhei sajai ||
translation: the Righteous Judge shall punish him.
simpleTranslation: The fair judge will give him his punishment.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਿਆਇਕ ਰਾਜਾ ਉਸਨੂੰ ਸਜ਼ਾ ਦੇਵੇਗਾ।

translation: By God's Grace, his bonds are shattered;
simpleTranslation: Thanks to God’s kindness, his ties are broken;
punjabiTranslation: ਰੱਬ ਦੀ ਮੇਹਰ ਨਾਲ, ਉਸ ਦੇ ਜੁੜੇ ਟੁੱਟ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹਨ;

translation: by Guru's Grace, O Nanak, his ego is eliminated. ||4||
simpleTranslation: With the Guru's blessing, O Nanak, the ego is gone.
punjabiTranslation: ਗੁਰੂ ਦੇ ਅਸੀਸ ਨਾਲ, ਨਾਨਕ, ਹਉ ਨਾਕਾਰਾ ਹੋ ਗਿਆ।

gurmukhi: shs Kty lK kau auiT DwvY ]
unicode: ਸਹਸ ਖਟੇ ਲਖ ਕਉ ਉਠਿ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
transliteration: sahas khaTe lakh kau uTh dhaavai ||
translation: Earning a thousand, he runs after a hundred thousand.
simpleTranslation: Makes a thousand but chases after a hundred thousand.
punjabiTranslation: ਇੱਕ ਹਜ਼ਾਰ ਬਣਾਉਂਦਾ ਪਰ ਲੱਖ ਦਾ ਪਿਛਾ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: iqRpiq n AwvY mwieAw pwCY pwvY ]
unicode: ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਪਾਛੈ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
transliteration: tirapat na aavai maiaa paachhai paavai ||
translation: Satisfaction is not obtained by chasing after Maya.
simpleTranslation: You won’t find peace by chasing after false things.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੇਹੜੀਆਂ ਚੀਜ਼ਾਂ ਝੂਠੀਆਂ ਹਨ, ਉਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਦਾ ਪਿੱਛਾ ਕਰਨ ਨਾਲ ਸ਼ਾਂਤੀ ਨਹੀਂ ਮਿਲਦੀ।

translation: He may enjoy all sorts of corrupt pleasures,
simpleTranslation: He can enjoy all kinds of bad pleasures,
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਹਰ ਤਰ੍ਹਾਂ ਦੇ ਗ਼ਲਤ ਆਨੰਦ ਲੈ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ,

translation: but he is still not satisfied; he indulges again and again, wearing himself out, until he dies.
simpleTranslation: But he is never satisfied; he keeps going until he dies.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਰ ਉਹ ਕਦੇ ਵੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੁੰਦਾ; ਉਹ ਚੱਲਦਾ ਰਹਿੰਦਾ ਹੈ ਜਦ ਤਕ ਉਹ ਮਰ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Without contentment, no one is satisfied.
simpleTranslation: Without feeling content, no one is happy.
punjabiTranslation: ਬਿਨਾਂ ਸੰਤੋਖ ਦੇ, ਕੋਈ ਵੀ ਖੁਸ਼ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੁੰਦਾ।

translation: Like the objects in a dream, all his efforts are in vain.
simpleTranslation: Like things in a dream, all his hard work is for nothing.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੁਪਨੇ ਵਿੱਚ ਜੋ ਚੀਜ਼ਾਂ ਹੁੰਦੀਆਂ, ਉਸਦੀ ਸਾਰੀ ਮਿਹਨਤ ਬੇਕਾਰ ਹੈ।

translation: Through the love of the Naam, all peace is obtained.
simpleTranslation: By loving the Name, you find all peace.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਮ ਨਾਲ ਪਿਆਰ ਕਰ ਕੇ ਸਾਰਾ ਸੁਖ ਮਿਲਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Only a few obtain this, by great good fortune.
simpleTranslation: Only a few get this, through good luck.
punjabiTranslation: ਬੱਸ ਚੁਣੀਂ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਇਹ, ਬਡਭਾਗ ਨਾਲ।

translation: He Himself is Himself the Cause of causes.
simpleTranslation: He is the reason for everything.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਦਾ ਕਾਰਨ ਹੈ।

translation: Forever and ever, O Nanak, chant the Lord's Name. ||5||
simpleTranslation: Always and always, O Nanak, say God's Name. ||5||
punjabiTranslation: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਰੱਬ ਦਾ ਨਾਮ ਲਵੋ ॥੫॥

translation: The Doer, the Cause of causes, is the Creator Lord.
simpleTranslation: The Doer, the reason for everything, is God.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲਾ, ਹਰ ਚੀਜ਼ ਦਾ ਕਾਰਨ, ਉਹ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਹੈ।

translation: What deliberations are in the hands of mortal beings?
simpleTranslation: What decisions can humans really make?
punjabiTranslation: ਇਨਸਾਨਾਂ ਦੇ ਹਾਥ ਵਿਚ ਹਕੀਕਤ ਕੀ ਹੈ?

translation: As God casts His Glance of Grace, they come to be.
simpleTranslation: As God looks with kindness, they come to life.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਵੇਂ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦੀ ਦ੍ਰਿਸ਼ਟੀ ਹੋਈ, ਉਹ ਜੀਵਤ ਹੁੰਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: God Himself, of Himself, is unto Himself.
simpleTranslation: God is Himself, by Himself, for Himself.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਆਪ ਹੀ, ਆਪਣੇ ਲਈ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: jo ikCu kIno su ApnY rMig ]
unicode: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕੀਨੋ ਸੁ ਅਪਨੈ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
transliteration: jo kichh keeno su apanai ra(n)g ||
translation: Whatever He created, was by His Own Pleasure.
simpleTranslation: Everything He made was for His own joy.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਕੁਝ ਉਸ ਨੇ ਬਣਾਇਆ, ਉਹ ਆਪਣੇ ਖੁਸ਼ੀ ਲਈ।

gurmukhi: sB qy dUir sBhU kY sMig ]
unicode: ਸਭ ਤੇ ਦੂਰਿ ਸਭਹੂ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ॥
transliteration: sabh te dhoor sabhahoo kai sa(n)g ||
translation: He is far from all, and yet with all.
simpleTranslation: He is far from everyone, but also with everyone.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਦੂਰ ਪਰ ਸਭ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ ਹੈ।

translation: He understands, He sees, and He passes judgment.
simpleTranslation: He knows, He watches, and makes decisions.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸਮਝਦਾ, ਉਹ ਵੇਖਦਾ, ਤੇ ਫੈਸਲਾ ਕਰਦਾ।

translation: He Himself is the One, and He Himself is the many.
simpleTranslation: He is the One, and He is also the many.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਇਕ ਹੈ, ਤੇ ਉਹ ਹੀ ਅਨੇਕ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: mrY n ibnsY AwvY n jwie ]
unicode: ਮਰੈ ਨ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਆਵੈ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
transliteration: marai na binasai aavai na jai ||
translation: He does not die or perish; He does not come or go.
simpleTranslation: He never dies or fades away; He never comes or goes.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਨਾਂ ਮਰਦਾ ਨਾਂ ਖਤਮ ਹੁੰਦਾ; ਨਾਂ ਆਉਂਦਾ ਨਾਂ ਜਾਂਦਾ।

translation: O Nanak, He remains forever All-pervading. ||6||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, He is always everywhere.
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਹ ਸਦਾਂ ਹਰ ਜਗਾਹ ਵੱਸਦਾ है।

translation: He Himself instructs, and He Himself learns.
simpleTranslation: He teaches and He learns Himself.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸਿਖਾਉਂਦਾ ਅਤੇ ਉਹ ਖੁਦ ਸਿਖਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He Himself mingles with all.
simpleTranslation: He mixes with everyone Himself.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਆਪ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਮਿਲਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He Himself created His own expanse.
simpleTranslation: He created His own universe.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਨੇ ਆਪਣਾ ਸ੍ਰਿਸ਼ਟੀ ਬਨਾਇਆ।

gurmukhi: sBu kCu aus kw Ehu krnYhwru ]
unicode: ਸਭੁ ਕਛੁ ਉਸ ਕਾ ਓਹੁ ਕਰਨੈਹਾਰੁ ॥
transliteration: sabh kachh us kaa oh karanaihaar ||
translation: All things are His; He is the Creator.
simpleTranslation: Everything belongs to Him; He is the Creator.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਉਸਦਾ ਹੈ; ਉਹ ਸਭ ਕੁੱਝ ਬਣਾਉਣ ਵਾਲਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: aus qy iBMn khhu ikCu hoie ]
unicode: ਉਸ ਤੇ ਭਿੰਨ ਕਹਹੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
transliteration: aus te bhi(n)n kahahu kichh hoi ||
translation: Without Him, what could be done?
simpleTranslation: Without Him, can anything happen?
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦੇ ਬਿਨਾ, ਕੀ ਕੁਝ ਹੋ ਸਕਦਾ?

translation: In the spaces and interspaces, He is the One.
simpleTranslation: In every place and space, God is the One.
punjabiTranslation: ਹਰ ਥਾਂ ਤੇ ਖਾਲੀ ਥਾਂ ਵਿਚ, ਸਾਹਿਬ ਇੱਕ ਹੀ ਹੈ।

translation: In His own play, He Himself is the Actor.
simpleTranslation: In His own game, He is the main actor.
punjabiTranslation: ਆਪਣੇ ਖੇਡ ਵਿੱਚ, ਉਹ ਖਿਡਾਰੀ ਹੈ।

translation: He produces His plays with infinite variety.
simpleTranslation: He creates His wonders in endless ways.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਆਪਣੇ ਆਸ਼ਚਰਜ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਤਰੀਕੇ ਨਾਲ ਬਣਾਉਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: mn mih Awip mn Apuny mwih ]
unicode: ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਮਨ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
transliteration: man meh aap man apune maeh ||
translation: He Himself is in the mind, and the mind is in Him.
simpleTranslation: He is in our thoughts, and our thoughts are in Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸਾਡੇ ਵਿਚਾਰਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਹੈ, ਤੇ ਸਾਡੇ ਵਿਚਾਰ ਉਸ ਵਿੱਚ ਹਨ।

translation: O Nanak, His worth cannot be estimated. ||7||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, His value can't be measured.
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਸਦੀ ਕੀਮਤ ਨਹੀਂ ਪਾਈ ਜਾ ਸਕਦੀ।

translation: True, True, True is God, our Lord and Master.
simpleTranslation: True, true, true is God, our Lord.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੱਚ, ਸੱਚ, ਸੱਚ ਹੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ, ਸਾਡਾ ਸੁਆਮੀ।

translation: By Guru's Grace, some speak of Him.
simpleTranslation: Thanks to the Guru, some talk about Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਗੁਰੂ ਦੇ ਕਰਕੇ, ਕੁਝ ਲੋਕ ਉਸਦਾ ਜਿਕਰ ਕਰਦੇ ਨੇ।

translation: True, True, True is the Creator of all.
simpleTranslation: True, true, true is the Creator of everything.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੱਚ, ਸੱਚ, ਸੱਚ ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਬਣਾਉਣ ਵਾਲਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Out of millions, scarcely anyone knows Him.
simpleTranslation: Out of millions, hardly anyone knows Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਕੋਟੀਆਂ ਵਿਚੋਂ, ਬਸ ਕੁੱਝ ਲੋਕੀਂ ਜਾਣਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: Beautiful, Beautiful, Beautiful is Your Sublime Form.
simpleTranslation: Amazing, amazing, amazing is Your awesome form.
punjabiTranslation: ਬਹੁਤ ਵਧੀਆ, ਵਧੀਆ, ਵਧੀਆ ਤੇਰਾ ਦਿਵਿਆ ਰੂਪ।

translation: You are Exquisitely Beautiful, Infinite and Incomparable.
simpleTranslation: You are super beautiful, limitless, and one of a kind.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੁਸੀਂ ਬਹੁਤ ਸੋਹਣੇ, ਬੇਅੰਤ, ਅਤੇ ਇਕ ਤੁਲਨਾ ਕਰਨ ਯੋਗ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੋ।

translation: Pure, Pure, Pure is the Word of Your Bani,
simpleTranslation: Clean, clean, clean is the word of Your teachings.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਫ, ਸਾਫ, ਸਾਫ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਿੱਖਿਆ ਦਾ ਸ਼ਬਦ।

translation: heard in each and every heart, spoken to the ears.
simpleTranslation: Heard in every heart, shared with all ears.
punjabiTranslation: ਹਰ ਇਕ ਦਿਲ ਵਿੱਚ ਸੁਣਿਆ, ਸਭ ਦੇ ਕੰਨ ਸੁਣਦੇ ਨੇ।

translation: Holy, Holy, Holy and Sublimely Pure
simpleTranslation: Holy, holy, holy and perfectly pure.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਵਿਤਰ, ਪਵਿਤਰ, ਪਵਿਤਰ ਅਤੇ ਇਕਦਮ ਸ਼ੁੱਧ।

translation: - chant the Naam, O Nanak, with heart-felt love. ||8||12||
simpleTranslation: Recite the Name, O Nanak, with true love. ||8||12||
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਮ ਜਪੋ ਨਾਨਕ, ਸੱਚੇ ਪਿਆਰ ਨਾਲ। ||੮||੧੨||

translation: Shalok:
simpleTranslation: Verse:
punjabiTranslation: ਪਦਾਰਥ:

gurmukhi: sMq srin jo jnu prY so jnu auDrnhwr ]
unicode: ਸੰਤ ਸਰਨਿ ਜੋ ਜਨੁ ਪਰੈ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਉਧਰਨਹਾਰ ॥
transliteration: sa(n)t saran jo jan parai so jan udharanahaar ||
translation: One who seeks the Sanctuary of the Saints shall be saved.
simpleTranslation: Whoever takes refuge with the Saints will be saved.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਸੰਤਾਂ ਦੀ ਸ਼ਰਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ, ਉਹ ਬਚ ਜਾਵੇਗਾ।

gurmukhi: sMq kI inMdw nwnkw bhuir bhuir Avqwr ]1]
unicode: ਸੰਤ ਕੀ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਅਵਤਾਰ ॥੧॥
transliteration: sa(n)t kee ni(n)dhaa naanakaa bahur bahur avataar ||1||
translation: One who slanders the Saints, O Nanak, shall be reincarnated over and over again. ||1||
simpleTranslation: Whoever insults the Saints, O Nanak, will be born again and again.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਸੰਤਾਂ ਦੀ ਨਿੰਦਿਆ ਕਰਦਾ, ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਹ ਬਹੁਰ ਬਹੁਰ ਜਨਮ ਲਵੇਗਾ।

translation: Ashtapadee:
simpleTranslation: Eight verses of wisdom.
punjabiTranslation: ਆਠ ਪਦੀਆਂ ਦੀ ਗੱਲ।

translation: Slandering the Saints, one's life is cut short.
simpleTranslation: Talking bad about Saints shortens your life.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੰਤਾਂ ਦੀ ਬੁਰਾਈ ਕਰਨ ਨਾਲ ਜੀਵਨ ਛੋਟਾ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: sMq kY dUKin jm qy nhI CutY ]
unicode: ਸੰਤ ਕੈ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਜਮ ਤੇ ਨਹੀ ਛੁਟੈ ॥
transliteration: sa(n)t kai dhookhan jam te nahee chhuTai ||
translation: Slandering the Saints, one shall not escape the Messenger of Death.
simpleTranslation: If you slander Saints, you won't escape death.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੇ ਤੁਸੀਂ ਸੰਤਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਬੁਰਾ ਕਹੋਗੇ, ਤਾਂ ਮੌਤ ਤੋਂ ਨਹੀ ਬਚ ਸਕਦੇ।

gurmukhi: sMq kY dUKin suKu sBu jwie ]
unicode: ਸੰਤ ਕੈ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਭੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
transliteration: sa(n)t kai dhookhan sukh sabh jai ||
translation: Slandering the Saints, all happiness vanishes.
simpleTranslation: Insulting the Saints makes all joy disappear.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੰਤਾਂ ਦੀ ਬੁਰਾਈ ਕਰਨ ਨਾਲ ਸਾਰੀ ਖੁਸ਼ੀ ਚਲੀ ਜਾਂਦੀ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: sMq kY dUKin nrk mih pwie ]
unicode: ਸੰਤ ਕੈ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਨਰਕ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
transliteration: sa(n)t kai dhookhan narak meh pai ||
translation: Slandering the Saints, one falls into hell.
simpleTranslation: Talking bad about Saints leads you to hell.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੰਤਾਂ ਬਾਰੇ ਬੁਰਾ ਬੋਲਣ ਨਾਲ ਨਰਕ ਵਿੱਚ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹੋ।

gurmukhi: sMq kY dUKin miq hoie mlIn ]
unicode: ਸੰਤ ਕੈ ਦੂਖਨਿ ਮਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਮਲੀਨ ॥
transliteration: sa(n)t kai dhookhan mat hoi maleen ||
translation: Slandering the Saints, the intellect is polluted.
simpleTranslation: When you insult the Saints, your mind gets dirty.

gurmukhi: sMq kY dUKin soBw qy hIn ]

translation: Slandering the Saints, one's reputation is lost.
simpleTranslation: If you insult the Saints, you lose your honor.

translation: One who is cursed by a Saint cannot be saved.
simpleTranslation: If a Saint curses you, no one can save you.

translation: Slandering the Saints, one's place is defiled.
simpleTranslation: Disrespecting the Saints makes your place unclean.

translation: But if the Compassionate Saint shows His Kindness,
simpleTranslation: But if the kind Saint shows his care,
punjabiTranslation: ਪਰ ਜੇ ਦਇਆਲ ਸੰਤ ਆਪਣੀ ਮਿਹਰ ਕਰੇ,

translation: O Nanak, in the Company of the Saints, the slanderer may still be saved. ||1||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, in the company of good people, even the critic can be saved. ||1||
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਚੰਗਿਆਂ ਦੇ ਸਾਥ ਵਿੱਚ, ਨਿੰਦਾ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲਾ ਵੀ ਬਚ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ। ||੧||

translation: Slandering the Saints, one becomes a wry-faced malcontent.
simpleTranslation: Speaking badly about saints makes you a grumpy person.

gurmukhi: sMqn kY dUKin kwg ijau lvY ]

translation: Slandering the Saints, one croaks like a raven.

simpleTranslation: Disrespecting the Saints, you become a squirming worm.

gurmukhi: sMqn kY dUKin iqRsnw mih jlY ]

translation: Slandering the Saints, one tries to deceive everyone.
simpleTranslation: Putting down the Saints, one tries to fool everyone.

translation: Slandering the Saints, all one's influence vanishes.
simpleTranslation: When you insult the Saints, all your power disappears.

unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਤ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੪॥

translation: The slanderer of the Saint breaks down mid-way.

translation: The slanderer of the Saint cannot accomplish his tasks.

translation: The slanderer of the Saint wanders in the wilderness.

simpleTranslation: You gotta eat what you grow.

simpleTranslation: The person who insults the Saint cries like this.

simpleTranslation: Only God knows the truth, O Nanak. ||7||

simpleTranslation: Think of Him with every breath and bite of food.

simpleTranslation: Who else can talk or think about this?

simpleTranslation: Salok:
punjabiTranslation: ਸਲੋਕੋ:

translation: Ashtapadee:
simpleTranslation: The Eight Compositions.
punjabiTranslation: ਅਠ ਸੰਗਤੀਆਂ।

translation: Reliance on mortals is in vain - know this well.
simpleTranslation: Depending on humans is useless - remember this well.

simpleTranslation: The Great Giver is the One God.

translation: By His gifts, we are satisfied,
simpleTranslation: We are fulfilled by His blessings.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਨੂੰ ਉਸ ਦੇਅਸ਼ੀਰਵਾਦਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਪੂਰਾ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: and we suffer from thirst no longer.
simpleTranslation: And we don’t feel thirsty anymore.

simpleTranslation: The One God takes life and keeps it safe too.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਕੋ ਰੱਬ ਦਿਲੋਂ ਮਾਰਦਾ ਤੇ ਬਚਾਉਂਦਾ ਵੀ।

translation: Nothing at all is in the hands of mortal beings.
simpleTranslation: Humans have no control over anything.
punjabiTranslation: ਬੰਦੇ ਦੇ ਹੱਥ ਚੋ ਕੁਝ ਵੀ ਨਹੀਂ।

gurmukhi: iqs kw hukmu bUiJ suKu hoie ]

translation: Understanding His Order, there is peace.
simpleTranslation: When you understand God's command, there’s peace.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਦੋਂ ਤੂੰ ਰੱਬ ਦਾ ਹੁਕਮ ਸਮਝ ਲੈਂਦਾ ਹੈਂ, ਸਾਂਤਿ ਹੁੰਦੀ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: iqs kw nwmu rKu kMiT proie ]

punjabiTranslation: ਇਸ ਦਾ ਨਾਮ ਲਓ ਤੇ ਇਸਨੂੰ ਗਲ ਜਾਂਗੇ ਪਾਉ।

translation: Remember, remember, remember God in meditation.
simpleTranslation: Keep remembering God in your thoughts.
punjabiTranslation: ਆਪਣੇ ਸੋਚਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਰੱਬ ਨੂੰ ਯਾਦ ਰੱਖੋ।

translation: O Nanak, no obstacle shall stand in your way. ||1||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, nothing will block your path.
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਕੁੱਝ ਵੀ ਤੇਰੇ ਰਾਹ ਵਿੱਚ ਨਾ ਆਏ।

translation: Praise the Formless Lord in your mind.
simpleTranslation: Remember the Formless God in your thoughts.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰ ਨੂੰ ਆਪਣੇ ਵਿਚਾਰਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਯਾਦ ਰੱਖੋ।

translation: O my mind, make this your true occupation.
simpleTranslation: Hey my mind, make this your real work.
punjabiTranslation: ਐ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ, ਇਸਨੂੰ ਆਪਣਾ ਸੱਚਾ ਕੰਮ ਬਣਾਲਿਆਂ।

translation: Let your tongue become pure, drinking in the Ambrosial Nectar.
simpleTranslation: Make your tongue pure, sipping the sweet nectar.
punjabiTranslation: ਆਪਣੀ ਜ਼ਬਾਨ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਕਰ, ਮਿੱਠਾ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਪੀਂਦਿਆਂ।

translation: Your soul shall be forever peaceful.
simpleTranslation: Your soul will always be at peace.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇਰਾ ਜੀਵਨ ਹਮੇਸ਼ਾਂ ਸੁਖੀ ਰਹੇਗਾ।

translation: With your eyes, see the wondrous play of your Lord and Master.
simpleTranslation: With your eyes, witness the beautiful work of God.
punjabiTranslation: ਨੈਨਾਂ ਨਾਲ, ਆਪਣੀ ਰੱਬ ਦੀ ਸੋਹਣੀ ਕਲਾ ਵੇਖੋ।

translation: In the Company of the Holy, all other associations vanish.
simpleTranslation: In the company of the holy, all other friendships fade away.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਧਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਰਹਿਣ ਵੇਲੇ, ਸਾਰੀਆਂ ਹੋਰ ਦੋਸਤੀਆਂ ਠੰਡੀਆਂ ਹੋ ਜਾਂਦੀਆਂ।

translation: With your feet, walk in the Way of the Lord.
simpleTranslation: Walk the path of God with your feet.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੁੱਡੇ ਨਾਲ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦੇ ਰਾਸ਼ਤੇ ਉੱਤੇ ਚੱਲੋ।

translation: Sins are washed away, chanting the Lord's Name, even for a moment.
simpleTranslation: Sins disappear by saying God's name, even for a moment.
punjabiTranslation: ਹਰ ਦੇ ਨਾਮ ਦਾ ਜਪ ਕਰਨ ਨਾਲ, ਪਾਪ ਮਿਟ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: kr hir krm sRvin hir kQw ]
unicode: ਕਰ ਹਰਿ ਕਰਮ ਸ੍ਰਵਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਥਾ ॥
transliteration: kar har karam sravan har kathaa ||
translation: So do the Lord's Work, and listen to the Lord's Sermon.
simpleTranslation: Do God's work and listen to God's message.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਦਾ ਕੰਮ ਕਰ ਅਤੇ ਉਸ ਦੀ ਗੱਲ ਸੁਣ.

translation: In the Lord's Court, O Nanak, your face shall be radiant. ||2||
simpleTranslation: In God's presence, Nanak, your face will shine bright.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਦੇ ਦਰ 'ਚ, ਨਾਨਕ, ਤੇਰਾ ਮੱਥਾ ਚਮਕੇਗਾ।

translation: Very fortunate are those humble beings in this world,
simpleTranslation: Lucky are those humble people in this world.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਸ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਵਿੱਚ ਬਹੁਤ ਕਿਸਮਤ ਵਾਲੇ ਹਨ ਉਹ ਨਮਰ ਜੀਵ।

gurmukhi: sdw sdw hir ky gun gwih ]
unicode: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਹਿ ॥
transliteration: sadhaa sadhaa har ke gun gaeh ||
translation: who sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, forever and ever.
simpleTranslation: Who sing God's praises, now and always.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਦੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉਂਦੇ, ਹਮੇਸ਼ਾ ਅਤੇ ਸਦਾ।

translation: Those who dwell upon the Lord's Name,
simpleTranslation: Those who think about God's Name,
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਰੱਬ ਦੇ ਨਾਮ ਉੱਤੇ ਸੋਚਦੇ ਹਨ,

translation: are the most wealthy and prosperous in the world.
simpleTranslation: They are the richest and most successful in the world.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਵਿੱਚ ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਦਾਲਮੀ ਅਤੇ ਖੁਸ਼ਹਾਲ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: min qin muiK bolih hir muKI ]
unicode: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਬੋਲਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਮੁਖੀ ॥
transliteration: man tan mukh boleh har mukhee ||
translation: Those who speak of the Supreme Lord in thought, word and deed
simpleTranslation: Those who talk about God in their mind, words, and actions.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਮਨ, ਬੋਲ ਅਤੇ ਕਰਮਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦੀ ਗੱਲ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: know that they are peaceful and happy, forever and ever.
simpleTranslation: Know that they are calm and happy, always and forever.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਾਣੋ ਕਿ ਉਹ ਠੰਡੇ ਤੇ ਖੁਸ਼ ਹਨ, ਹਮੇਸ਼ਾ ਅਤੇ ਸਦਾ.

translation: One who recognizes the One and only Lord as One,
simpleTranslation: Someone who sees the One God as the only One,
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਇੱਕੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਨੂੰ ਇੱਕ ਹੀ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਹੈ,

gurmukhi: ieq auq kI Ehu soJI jwnY ]
unicode: ਇਤ ਉਤ ਕੀ ਓਹੁ ਸੋਝੀ ਜਾਨੈ ॥
transliteration: eit ut kee oh sojhee jaanai ||
translation: understands this world and the next.
simpleTranslation: knows this world and the next one.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਹ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਅਤੇ ਅਗਲੀ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਨੂੰ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: nwm sMig ijs kw mnu mwinAw ]
unicode: ਨਾਮ ਸੰਗਿ ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ॥
transliteration: naam sa(n)g jis kaa man maaniaa ||
translation: One whose mind accepts the Company of the Naam,
simpleTranslation: One whose mind embraces the chant of God.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਸਦਾ ਮਨ ਨਾਮ ਦੀ ਸੰਗਤ ਨੂੰ ਮੰਨਦਾ।

translation: the Name of the Lord, O Nanak, knows the Immaculate Lord. ||3||
simpleTranslation: The Name of God, O Nanak, knows the pure God.
punjabiTranslation: ਰੱਬ ਦਾ ਨਾਮ, ਨਾਨਕ, ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰ ਰੱਬ ਨੂੰ ਪਿਆ ਗਿਆ।

translation: By Guru's Grace, one understands himself;
simpleTranslation: With the Guru's grace, you get to know yourself;
punjabiTranslation: ਗੁਰੂ ਦੀ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਨਾਲ, ਤੁਸੀਂ ਆਪਣੇ ਆਪ ਨੂੰ ਸਮਝਦੇ ਹੋ;

translation: know that then, his thirst is quenched.
simpleTranslation: Understand this, then his thirst is gone.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਹ ਸਮਝੋ, ਫਿਰ ਉਸਦੀ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਮਿਟ ਜਾਂਦੀ ਹੈ।

translation: In the Company of the Holy, one chants the Praises of the Lord, Har, Har.
simpleTranslation: In the company of the holy, we sing the praises of God, Har, Har.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਤ ਵਿਚ ਅਸੀਂ ਰੱਬ, ਹਰਿ, ਹਰਿ ਦੀਆਂ ਵੱਡਾਈਆਂ ਗੌਂਦੇ ਹਾਂ।

gurmukhi: srb rog qy Ehu hir jnu rhq ]
unicode: ਸਰਬ ਰੋਗ ਤੇ ਓਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਨੁ ਰਹਤ ॥
transliteration: sarab rog te oh har jan rahat ||
translation: Such a devotee of the Lord is free of all disease.
simpleTranslation: A devotee of God is free from all illness.
punjabiTranslation: ਹਰਿ ਦੇ ਦੁਖੀ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੁੰਦਾ।

translation: Night and day, sing the Kirtan, the Praises of the One Lord.
simpleTranslation: Day and night, sing the praises of the One God.
punjabiTranslation: ਰਾਤ ਦਿਹਾੜੇ, ਇੱਕ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦੀ ਸਿਫਤ ਕਰੋ।

translation: In the midst of your household, remain balanced and unattached.
simpleTranslation: In your home, stay calm and free from attachment.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇਰੇ ਘਰ ਵਿੱਚ, ਸ਼ਾਂਤ ਰਹੁ ਅਤੇ ਬਿੰਧਾਈ ਤੋਂ ਦੁੂਰ ਰਹੁ।

gurmukhi: eyk aUpir ijsu jn kI Awsw ]
unicode: ਏਕ ਊਪਰਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕੀ ਆਸਾ ॥
transliteration: ek uoopar jis jan kee aasaa ||
translation: One who places his hopes in the One Lord
simpleTranslation: Someone who trusts in the One God.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਇਕ ਰੱਬ ਤੇ ਭਰੋਸਾ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: iqs kI ktIAY jm kI Pwsw ]
unicode: ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਕਟੀਐ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਫਾਸਾ ॥
transliteration: tis kee kaTeeaai jam kee faasaa ||
translation: the noose of Death is cut away from his neck.
simpleTranslation: The noose of death is removed from his neck.
punjabiTranslation: ਮੌਤ ਦਾ ਫਾਸਾ ਉਸ ਦੇ ਗਲੇ ਤੋਂ ਹਟਾਇਆ ਗਿਆ।

translation: One whose mind hungers for the Supreme Lord God,
simpleTranslation: One whose mind longs for God.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਸਦਾ ਮਨ ਰੱਬ ਨੂੰ ਚਾਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: O Nanak, shall not suffer pain. ||4||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, they won't feel pain. ||4||
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਦੂਖ ਨਹੀਂ ਮਹਿਸੂਸ ਹੋਵੇਗਾ। ||੪||

gurmukhi: ijs kau hir pRBu min iciq AwvY ]
unicode: ਜਿਸ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਨਿ ਚਿਤਿ ਆਵੈ ॥
transliteration: jis kau har prabh man chit aavai ||
translation: One who focuses his conscious mind on the Lord God
simpleTranslation: Whoever keeps their mind on God.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਵੀ ਆਪਣੇ ਮਨ ਵਿਚ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਨੂੰ ਰੱਖਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: - that Saint is at peace; he does not waver.
simpleTranslation: That Saint is calm; he doesn’t shake.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸੰਤ ਸੁੰਦਰ ਹੈ; ਉਹ ਨਹੀਂ ਕਮਜ਼ੋਰ ਹੁੰਦਾ।

translation: Those unto whom God has granted His Grace
simpleTranslation: Those whom God has blessed with His kindness.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਤੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਨੇ ਆਪਣੀ ਮਿਹਰ ਕੀਤੀ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: so syvku khu iks qy frY ]
unicode: ਸੋ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਕਹੁ ਕਿਸ ਤੇ ਡਰੈ ॥
transliteration: so sevak kahu kis te ddarai ||
translation: who do those servants need to fear?
simpleTranslation: So, who should those servants be scared of?
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇ ਫਿਰ ਉਹ ਸੇਵਕ ਕਿਸ ਤੋਂ ਡਰਣੇ?

translation: As God is, so does He appear;
simpleTranslation: God is as He shows Himself;
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਵੇਂ ਰੱਬ ਹੈ, ਓਸੇ ਤਰ੍ਹਾਂ ਦਿਖਾਈ ਦਿੰਦਾ ਹੈ;

translation: in His Own creation, He Himself is pervading.
simpleTranslation: In His own creation, He is everywhere.
punjabiTranslation: ਆਪਣੇ ਕੰਮ ਵਿੱਚ, ਉਹ ਹਰ ਜਗ੍ਹਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Searching, searching, searching, and finally, success!
simpleTranslation: Looking, looking, looking, and then, success!
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇਖ ਰਹੇ, ਤੇਖ ਰਹੇ, ਤੇਖ ਰਹੇ, ਫਿਰ ਸਫਲਤਾ!

translation: By Guru's Grace, the essence of all reality is understood.
simpleTranslation: With the Guru's blessing, we understand the core of everything.
punjabiTranslation: ਗੁਰ ਦੇ ਅਸੀਸ ਨਾਲ, ਅਸੀਂ ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਦੀ ਜੜ ਸਮਝਦੇ ਹਾਂ।

gurmukhi: jb dyKau qb sBu ikCu mUlu ]
unicode: ਜਬ ਦੇਖਉ ਤਬ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਮੂਲੁ ॥
transliteration: jab dhekhau tab sabh kichh mool ||
translation: Wherever I look, there I see Him, at the root of all things.
simpleTranslation: Wherever I look, I see God at the core of everything.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਥੇ ਵੀ ਦੇਖਾਂ, ਉੱਥੇ ਹੀ ਮੈ ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਨੂੰ ਸੱਬ ਕੁਝ ਦੇ ਮੂਲ ਵਿੱਚ ਵੇਖਦਾ ਹਾਂ।

translation: O Nanak, He is the subtle, and He is also the manifest. ||5||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, He is the hidden and also the visible. ||5||
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਹ ਸੋ ਫਾਣਾ ਤੇ ਉਹ ਸੋ ਦਿਖਾਈ। ||5||

gurmukhi: nh ikCu jnmY nh ikCu mrY ]
unicode: ਨਹ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਨਮੈ ਨਹ ਕਿਛੁ ਮਰੈ ॥
transliteration: neh kichh janamai neh kichh marai ||
translation: Nothing is born, and nothing dies.
simpleTranslation: Nothing is created, and nothing ever dies.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਿਛ ਵੀ ਨਹੀਂ ਬਣਦਾ, ਤੇ ਨਾ ਹੀ ਕੁਝ ਮਰਦਾ।

translation: He Himself stages His own drama.
simpleTranslation: He creates his own story.
punjabiTranslation: ਅੂੰਹ ਆਪਣੀ ਹੀ ਕਹਾਣੀ ਬਣਾਉਂਦਾ।

translation: Coming and going, seen and unseen,
simpleTranslation: Coming and going, visible and hidden.
punjabiTranslation: ਆਉਣਾ ਜਾਉਣਾ, ਦਿਖਾਈ ਅਤੇ ਨਾ ਦਿਖਾਈ।

translation: all the world is obedient to His Will.
simpleTranslation: Everyone in the world follows His will.
punjabiTranslation: ਦੁਨੀਆ ਦੇ ਸਾਰੇ ਲੋਕ ਉਸਦੀ ਇੱਛਾ ਮੰਨਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: He Himself is All-in-Himself.
simpleTranslation: He is everything within Himself.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਆਪ ਵਿੱਚ ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਹੈ।

translation: In His many ways, He establishes and disestablishes.
simpleTranslation: In so many ways, He creates and takes away.
punjabiTranslation: ਆਰਾਂ ਬੜੀਆਂ ਵਿਆਖਿਆਆਂ, ਉਹ ਬਣਾਉਂਦਾ ਤੇ ਖਤਮ ਕਰਦਾ।

translation: He is Imperishable; nothing can be broken.
simpleTranslation: He never dies; nothing can be shattered.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਕਦੇ ਨਹੀਂ ਮਰਦਾ; ਕੁਝ ਵੀ ਨਹੀਂ ਤੋੜਿਆ ਜਾ ਸਕਦਾ।

translation: He lends His Support to maintain the Universe.
simpleTranslation: He supports everything to keep the universe going.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਦਾ ਸਹਾਰਾ ਦੇ ਕੇ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡ ਚੱਲਾਉਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Unfathomable and Inscrutable is the Glory of the Lord.
simpleTranslation: The Lord's glory is deep and mysterious.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਦੀ ਸ਼ਾਨ ਗਹਿਰ ਅਤੇ ਗੁੱਤ ਕਿਸਮ ਦੀ ਹੈ।

translation: As He inspires us to meditate, O Nanak, so do we meditate. ||6||
simpleTranslation: As God inspires us to focus, O Nanak, we focus.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਵੇਂ ੴ ਸਾਨੂੰ ਧਿਆਨ ਕਰਨ ਲਈ ਪ੍ਰੇਰਿਤ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ, ਨਾ ਨਾਨਕ, ਅਸੀਂ ਧਿਆਨ ਵਾਂਗ।

translation: Those who know God are glorious.
simpleTranslation: Those who understand God are wonderful.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਨੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨੂੰ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਉਹ ਸ਼ਾਨਦਾਰ ਹਨ।

translation: The whole world is redeemed by their teachings.
simpleTranslation: The whole world is saved by their teachings.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਗਲ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਉਧਾਰਿਆ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ ਉਹਨਾਂ ਦੀਆਂ ਸਿਖਾਵਟਾਂ ਨਾਲ।

translation: God's servants redeem all.
simpleTranslation: God's servants save everyone.
punjabiTranslation: ਰੱਬ ਦੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਸਭ ਨੂੰ ਬਚਾਉਂਦੇ ਹਨ ॥

translation: God's servants cause sorrows to be forgotten.
simpleTranslation: God's servants help forget sorrows.
punjabiTranslation: ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਦੁਖਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਭੁੱਲਾਉਂਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: The Merciful Lord unites them with Himself.
simpleTranslation: The kind God brings them together with Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਿਰਪਾਲ ਰੱਬ ਉਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਆਪਣੇ ਨਾਲ ਜੋੜਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: gur kw sbdu jip Bey inhwl ]
unicode: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਜਪਿ ਭਏ ਨਿਹਾਲ ॥
transliteration: gur kaa sabadh jap bhe nihaal ||
translation: Chanting the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they become ecstatic.
simpleTranslation: Singing the Guru's words, they feel joy.
punjabiTranslation: ਗੁਰੂ ਦੇ ਸ਼ਬਦ ਗਾਉਣ ਨਾਲ ਨਹੀਂ ਹਾਲ ਹੋ ਜਾਂਦੇ।

translation: He alone is committed to serve them,
simpleTranslation: Only he is dedicated to serve them.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਸਿਰਫ ਉਸ ਨੂੰ ਹੀ ਫਿਕਰ ਹੈ।

translation: upon whom God bestows His Mercy, by great good fortune.
simpleTranslation: On whom God shows kindness, by great luck.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਸ 'ਤੇ ਰੱਬ ਦਇਆ ਕਰੇ, ਵੱਡੇ ਭਾਗ ਨਾਲ।

translation: Those who chant the Naam find their place of rest.
simpleTranslation: People who chant God's name find peace.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਨਾਮ ਜਪਦੇ ਨੇ, ਉਹ ਸੁਚੇਤ ਪਾਉਂਦੇ ਨੇ।

gurmukhi: nwnk iqn purK kau aUqm kir mwnu ]7]
unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਪੁਰਖ ਕਉ ਊਤਮ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਨੁ ॥੭॥
transliteration: naanak tin purakh kau uootam kar maan ||7||
translation: O Nanak, respect those persons as the most noble. ||7||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, honor those people as the greatest. ||7||
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਹਨਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਵੱਡੇ ਮਾਨੋ। ||੭||

gurmukhi: jo ikCu krY su pRB kY rMig ]
unicode: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੈ ਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
transliteration: jo kichh karai su prabh kai ra(n)g ||
translation: Whatever you do, do it for the Love of God.
simpleTranslation: Whatever you do, do it for the love of God.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਕੁਝ ਵੀ ਕਰੋ, ਉਸਦੀ ਮੋਹabbat ਲਈ ਕਰੋ।

translation: Forever and ever, abide with the Lord.
simpleTranslation: Always and forever, stay with God.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਗੱਡੀ ਰੱਖੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਨਾਲ।

translation: By its own natural course, whatever will be will be.
simpleTranslation: Things will happen naturally, whatever is meant to be, will be.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਕੁਝ ਹੋਣਾ ਹੈ, ਉਹ ਕੁਦਰਤੀ ਤੌਰ 'ਤੇ ਹੀ ਹੋਵੇਗਾ।

translation: Acknowledge that Creator Lord;
simpleTranslation: Recognize that God, the Creator;
punjabiTranslation: ਆਪਣੇ ਪੈਲ ਵਿਚ ਉਹ ਰੱਬ ਪਛਾਣੋ;

gurmukhi: pRB kw kIAw jn mIT lgwnw ]

transliteration: prabh kaa keeaa jan meeTh lagaanaa ||
translation: God's doings are sweet to His humble servant.
simpleTranslation: God's actions feel sweet to His loyal servant.
punjabiTranslation: ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦੇ ਕੰਮ ਦਰਸ਼ਨ ਜਨ ਨੂੰ ਮਿੱਠੇ ਲੱਗਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: As He is, so does He appear.
simpleTranslation: He shows up just as He is.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਜਿਵੇਂ ਹੈ, ਉਵੇਂ ਹੀ ਦਿੱਸਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: ijs qy aupjy iqsu mwih smwey ]
unicode: ਜਿਸ ਤੇ ਉਪਜੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
transliteration: jis te upaje tis maeh samaae ||
translation: From Him we came, and into Him we shall merge again.
simpleTranslation: We came from Him, and we will go back to Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਅਸੀਂ ਜਿਸ ਤੋਂ ਆਏ, ਉਸ ਵਿੱਚ ਦੁਬਾਰਾ ਸਮਾਂ ਜਾਵਾਂਗੇ।

gurmukhi: Eie suK inDwn aunhU bin Awey ]
unicode: ਓਇ ਸੁਖ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਉਨਹੂ ਬਨਿ ਆਏ ॥
transliteration: oi sukh nidhaan unahoo ban aae ||
translation: He is the treasure of peace, and so does His servant become.
simpleTranslation: He is the source of peace, and His servant finds it too.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸੁਖ ਦਾ ਸਰੋਤ ਹੈ, ਅਤੇ ਉਸਦਾ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲਾ ਵੀ ਇਹ ਲੱਭਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Unto His own, He has given His honor.
simpleTranslation: He gives respect to those who are close to Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹਨਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਇਜ਼ਜ਼ਤ ਦਿੰਦਾ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਉਸ ਦੇ ਨੇੜੇ ਨੇ।

translation: O Nanak, know that God and His humble servant are one and the same. ||8||14||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, understand that God and His devoted servant are the same being.
punjabiTranslation: ਹੇ ਨਾਨਕ, ਸਮਝ ਲੈ ਕਿ ਦੇਣ ਵਾਲਾ ਅਤੇ ਉਸਦਾ ਸੇਵਕ ਇੱਕੋ ਹਨ।

translation: Shalok:
simpleTranslation: Shalok:
punjabiTranslation: ਸਲੋਕ:

gurmukhi: srb klw BrpUr pRB ibrQw jwnnhwr ]
unicode: ਸਰਬ ਕਲਾ ਭਰਪੂਰ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਾਨਨਹਾਰ ॥
transliteration: sarab kalaa bharapoor prabh birathaa jaananahaar ||
translation: God is totally imbued with all powers; He is the Knower of our troubles.
simpleTranslation: God is filled with all powers; He knows our struggles.
punjabiTranslation: ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਹਰ ਤਾਕਤ ਨਾਲ ਭਰਿਆ ਹੈ; ਉਹ ਸਾਡੇ ਦੁੱਖਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: jw kY ismrin auDrIAY nwnk iqsu bilhwr ]1]
unicode: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਨਿ ਉਧਰੀਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਲਿਹਾਰ ॥੧॥
transliteration: jaa kai simaran udhareeaai naanak tis balihaar ||1||
translation: Meditating in remembrance on Him, we are saved; Nanak is a sacrifice to Him. ||1||
simpleTranslation: By remembering Him, we find freedom; Nanak dedicates himself to Him. ||1||
punjabiTranslation: ਉਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਦਾ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਕਰਕੇ ਅਸੀਂ ਬਚ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹਾਂ; ਨਾਨਕ ਉਹਨਾਂ ਲਈ ਸਮਰਪਿਤ ਹੈ। ||1||

translation: Ashtapadee:
simpleTranslation: Eight stanzas.
punjabiTranslation: ਆਠ ਪਦ।

translation: The Lord of the World is the Mender of the broken.
simpleTranslation: The God of the world fixes the broken.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਗਤ ਦੇ ਸੁ ਖਾ ਟਣ ਹਾਰ ਿਗਰੋਪਾਲ।

translation: He Himself cherishes all beings.
simpleTranslation: He cares for all beings Himself.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਨੇ ਆਪ ਸਾਰੇ ਜੀਵਾਂ ਦੀ chăm ਪਹਿਲੀ।

gurmukhi: sgl kI icMqw ijsu mn mwih ]
unicode: ਸਗਲ ਕੀ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
transliteration: sagal kee chi(n)taa jis man maeh ||
translation: The cares of all are on His Mind;
simpleTranslation: He thinks about everyone’s worries;
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸਬ ਦੀ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ;

translation: no one is turned away from Him.
simpleTranslation: No one is ignored by Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦਾ ਕੋਈ ਵੀ ਨਾਮੰਜ਼ੂਰ ਨਹੀਂ।

gurmukhi: ry mn myry sdw hir jwip ]
unicode: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਪਿ ॥
transliteration: re man mere sadhaa har jaap ||
translation: O my mind, meditate forever on the Lord.
simpleTranslation: O my mind, always think of God.
punjabiTranslation: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਦੀਵ ਹਰਿ ਚਿੰਤਿਆਂ ਵਿਚ ਰਹਿ।

translation: The Imperishable Lord God is Himself All-in-all.
simpleTranslation: The everlasting God is everything.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਦਾ ਰਹਿਣ ਵਾਲਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਹੈ।

translation: By one's own actions, nothing is accomplished,
simpleTranslation: Nothing gets done by your own actions.
punjabiTranslation: ਆਪਣੇ ਕੀਤਾ ਨਾਲ ਕੁਝ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੁੰਦਾ ॥

translation: even though the mortal may wish it so, hundreds of times.
simpleTranslation: Even if someone wishes it a hundred times.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੇ ਕੋਈ ਸੌ ਵਾਰੀ ਚਾਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: iqsu ibnu nwhI qyrY ikCu kwm ]
unicode: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਤੇਰੈ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਾਮ ॥
transliteration: tis bin naahee terai kichh kaam ||
translation: Without Him, nothing is of any use to you.
simpleTranslation: Without Him, nothing is useful to you.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦੇ ਬਿਨਾ ਤੁਹਾਡੇ ਲਈ ਕੁਝ ਵੀ ਫਾਇਦਾ ਨਹੀਂ।

gurmukhi: giq nwnk jip eyk hir nwm ]1]
unicode: ਗਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਪਿ ਏਕ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ॥੧॥
transliteration: gat naanak jap ek har naam ||1||
translation: Salvation, O Nanak, is attained by chanting the Name of the One Lord. ||1||
simpleTranslation: Nanak, you find peace by singing the Name of the One God.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ, ਤੂੰ ਇਕ ਹਿਰਦੇ ਨਾਮ ਦਾ ਜਾਪ ਕਰਨ ਨਾਲ ਸੁਖ ਲੈਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: One who is good-looking should not be vain;
simpleTranslation: Someone who is good-looking shouldn't be conceited;
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਸਾਰਾ ਦੇਖਣ ਵਿੱਚ ਸੋਹਣਾ ਹੈ, ਉਹ ਗੁਮਾਨ ਨਾ ਕਰੇ;

gurmukhi: pRB kI joiq sgl Gt sohY ]
unicode: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਗਲ ਘਟ ਸੋਹੈ ॥
transliteration: prabh kee jot sagal ghaT sohai ||
translation: the Light of God is in all hearts.
simpleTranslation: The light of God shines in every heart.
punjabiTranslation: ਰੱਬ ਦੀ ਜੋਤ ਹਰ ਦਿਲ ਵਿੱਚ ਚਮਕਦੀ ਹੈ।

translation: Why should anyone be proud of being rich?
simpleTranslation: Why should anyone be proud to be wealthy?
punjabiTranslation: ਧਨਵੰਤਾ ਹੋ ਕੇ ਕਿਉਂ ਕਿਸੇ ਨੂੰ ਗਰਵ ਕਰਨ ਦੀ ਲੋੜ ਹੈ?

gurmukhi: jw sBu ikCu iqs kw dIAw drbY ]
unicode: ਜਾ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਦੀਆ ਦਰਬੈ ॥

translation: All riches are His gifts.
simpleTranslation: Everything is a gift from Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਉਸਦਾ ਦਿੱਤਾ ਹੋਇਆ ਹੈ।

translation: One may call himself a great hero,
simpleTranslation: Anyone can call themselves a great hero.
punjabiTranslation: ਕੌਈ ਵੀ ਆਪਣੇ ਆਪ ਨੂੰ ਮਹਾਨ ਹੀਰੋ ਕਹਿ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: pRB kI klw ibnw kh DwvY ]
unicode: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਕਲਾ ਬਿਨਾ ਕਹ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
transliteration: prabh kee kalaa binaa keh dhaavai ||
translation: but without God's Power, what can anyone do?
simpleTranslation: But without God's power, what can anyone achieve?
punjabiTranslation: ਪਰ ਰੱਬ ਦੀ ਖ਼ੁਦਾਈ ਬਿਨਾਂ ਕੋਈ ਕੀ ਕਰ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ?

translation: One who brags about giving to charities
simpleTranslation: Someone who talks big about giving.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਦਾਨ ਕਰਨ ਦੀ ਵੱਡੀ ਵਿਆਖਿਆ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: the Great Giver shall judge him to be a fool.
simpleTranslation: The Great Giver will see him as a fool.
punjabiTranslation: ਬੜਾ ਦੇਣ ਵਾਲਾ ਉਸਨੂੰ ਗਾਵਾਰ ਜਾਣੇਗਾ।

gurmukhi: ijsu gur pRswid qUtY hau rogu ]

transliteration: jis gur prasaadh tooTai hau rog ||
translation: One who, by Guru's Grace, is cured of the disease of ego
simpleTranslation: With the Guru's blessing, the ego sickness is healed.
punjabiTranslation: ਗੁਰੂ ਦੀ ਦਇਆ ਨਾਲ, ਹਉਮੈ ਦੀ ਬਿਮਾਰੀ ਠੀਕ ਹੁੰਦੀ ਹੈ।

translation: - O Nanak, that person is forever healthy. ||2||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, that person is always healthy.
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਸੋ ਜਨ ਸਦਾ ਸਿਹਤਮੰਦ ਹੈ।

translation: As a palace is supported by its pillars,
simpleTranslation: Like a palace stands on its pillars,
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਵੇਂ ਮੰਦਰ ਸਹਾਰਿਆ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: iqau gur kw sbdu mnih AsQMmnu ]
unicode: ਤਿਉ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਮਨਹਿ ਅਸਥੰਮਨੁ ॥
transliteration: tiau gur kaa sabadh maneh asatha(n)man ||
translation: so does the Guru's Word support the mind.
simpleTranslation: The Guru's Word strengthens the mind.
punjabiTranslation: ਗੁਰੂ ਦਾ ਸ਼ਬਦ ਮਨ ਨੂੰ ਮਜ਼ਬੂਤ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: As a stone placed in a boat can cross over the river,
simpleTranslation: Just like a stone in a boat can cross the river,
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਵੇਂ ਇੱਕ ਪਾਖ਼ਾਣ ਨਾਵ ਵਿਚ ਹੋ ਕੇ ਨਹਿਰ ਨੂੰ ਪੁੱਜਦਾ ਹੈ,

translation: so is the mortal saved, grasping hold of the Guru's Feet.
simpleTranslation: The person is saved by holding onto the Guru's Feet.
punjabiTranslation: ਇੰਸਾਨ ਗੁਰੂ ਦੇ ਚਰਨਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਪਕੜ ਕੇ ਬਚ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: As the darkness is illuminated by the lamp,
simpleTranslation: Just like the darkness is lit by a lamp,
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਵੇਂ ਹਨੇਰੇ ਨੂੰ ਦੀਪਕ ਰੋਸ਼ਨ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ,

gurmukhi: gur drsnu dyiK min hoie ibgwsu ]
unicode: ਗੁਰ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਮਨਿ ਹੋਇ ਬਿਗਾਸੁ ॥
transliteration: gur dharasan dhekh man hoi bigaas ||
translation: so does the mind blossom forth, beholding the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan.
simpleTranslation: And the mind opens up, seeing the Guru’s presence.
punjabiTranslation: ਅਤੇ ਮਨ ਖੁੱਲ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ, ਗੁਰੂ ਦੀ ਹਾਜ਼ਰੀ ਵੇਖ ਕੇ।

gurmukhi: ijau mhw auidAwn mih mwrgu pwvY ] iqau swDU sMig imil joiq pRgtwvY ]
unicode: ਜਿਉ ਮਹਾ ਉਦਿਆਨ ਮਹਿ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥ ਤਿਉ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਾਵੈ ॥
transliteration: jiau mahaa udhiaan meh maarag paavai || tiau saadhoo sa(n)g mil jot pragaTaavai ||
translation: The path is found through the great wilderness by joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and one's light shines forth.
simpleTranslation: In the vast wilderness, the path is found. By joining the holy community, one's light shines bright.
punjabiTranslation: ਵੱਡੇ ਜੰਗਲ ਵਿਚ ਰਸਤਾ ਮਿਲਦਾ ਹੈ। ਸਾਧੂਆਂ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ ਮਿਲ ਕੇ, ਮਨ ਦੀ ਰੋਸ਼ਨੀ ਚਮਕਦੀ ਹੈ।

translation: I seek the dust of the feet of those Saints;
simpleTranslation: I look for the dust from the feet of those wise people;
punjabiTranslation: ਮੈਨੂੰ ਉਹਨਾਂ ਸੈਂਟਾਂ ਦੇ ਪੈਰਾਂ ਦੀ ਧੂੜ ਚਾਹੀਦੀ ਹੈ;

translation: O Lord, fulfill Nanak's longing! ||3||
simpleTranslation: O God, make Nanak's wishes come true! ||3||
punjabiTranslation: ਹੇ ਰੱਬ, ਨਾਨਕ ਦੀਆਂ ਖਾਹਿਸ਼ਾਂ ਪੂਰੀਆਂ ਕਰ!

translation: O foolish mind, why do you cry and bewail?
simpleTranslation: O silly mind, why are you crying and complaining?
punjabiTranslation: ਹੇ ਮੂਰਖ ਮਨ, ਤੂੰ ਕਿਉਂ ਰੋਂਦਾ ਅਤੇ ਸ਼ਿਕਾਇਤ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈਂ?

translation: You shall obtain your pre-ordained destiny.
simpleTranslation: You will get what is meant for you.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੈਨੂੰ ਜੋ ਤੇਰੇ ਲਈ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਹੈ, ਉਹ ਮਿਲੇਗਾ।

translation: God is the Giver of pain and pleasure.
simpleTranslation: God gives us pain and pleasure.
punjabiTranslation: ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਸਾਨੂੰ ਦੁੱਖ ਤੇ ਸੁਖ ਦੇਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Abandon others, and think of Him alone.
simpleTranslation: Forget others, just focus on Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਹੋਰਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਭੁਲਾਓ, ਸਿਰਫ ਉਸ 'ਤੇ ਧਿਆਨ ਦਿਓ।

gurmukhi: jo kCu krY soeI suKu mwnu ]
unicode: ਜੋ ਕਛੁ ਕਰੈ ਸੋਈ ਸੁਖੁ ਮਾਨੁ ॥
transliteration: jo kachh karai soiee sukh maan ||
translation: Whatever He does - take comfort in that.
simpleTranslation: Whatever God does - trust that it's good.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਕੁਛ ਕਰੇ, ਉਹਨੂੰ ਸੱਚ ਮੰਨੋ.

translation: Why do you wander around, you ignorant fool?
simpleTranslation: Why do you roam around, you clueless one?
punjabiTranslation: ਤੁਸੀਂ ਕਿਉਂ ਫਿਰਦੇ ਹੋ, ਹੋਂਸਲੇ ਵਾਲੇ?

translation: What things did you bring with you?
simpleTranslation: What did you bring with you?
punjabiTranslation: ਤੂੰ ਕੀ ਚੀਜ਼ ਲੈ ਕੇ आया?

translation: You cling to worldly pleasures like a greedy moth.
simpleTranslation: You hold onto worldly joys like a greedy moth.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੂੰ ਲੋਭੀ ਪਤੰਗ ਵਾਂਗ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਦੇ ਰਸ ਨੂੰ ਫੜ੍ਹਦਾ ਹੈਂ।

translation: Dwell upon the Lord's Name in your heart.
simpleTranslation: Keep the Lord's Name in your heart.
punjabiTranslation: ਰੇਹਿੰਦ ਕਦੇ ਵੀ ਭਾਲੋ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਆਪਣੇ ਦਿਲ ਵਿੱਚ।

translation: O Nanak, thus you shall return to your home with honor. ||4||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, you'll go back home with respect. ||4||
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਤੂੰ ਇੱਜ਼ਤ ਨਾਲ ਘਰ ਜਾਵੇਂਗਾ। ||4||

gurmukhi: ijsu vKr kau lYin qU AwieAw ]
unicode: ਜਿਸੁ ਵਖਰ ਕਉ ਲੈਨਿ ਤੂ ਆਇਆ ॥
transliteration: jis vakhar kau lain too aaiaa ||
translation: This merchandise, which you have come to obtai
simpleTranslation: This stuff, you came to get it.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਹ ਸਮਾਨ, ਜੋ ਤੂੰ ਲੈਣ ਆਇਆ।

translation: n - the Lord's Name is obtained in the home of the Saints.
simpleTranslation: You find God's name in the home of the Saints.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੰਤਾਂ ਦੇ ਘਰ ਵਿੱਚ ਰਾਮ ਦਾ ਨਾਮ ਮਿਲਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: qij AiBmwnu lyhu mn moil ] rwm nwmu ihrdy mih qoil ]
unicode: ਤਜਿ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ਲੇਹੁ ਮਨ ਮੋਲਿ ॥ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਿਰਦੇ ਮਹਿ ਤੋਲਿ ॥
transliteration: taj abhimaan leh man mol || raam naam hiradhe meh tol ||
translation: Renounce your egotistical pride, and with your mind, purchase the Lord's Name - measure it out within your heart.
simpleTranslation: Give up your pride, and with your mind, value God's Name - weigh it in your heart.
punjabiTranslation: ਆਪਣੀ ਝਗੜਾਲੂ ਸ਼ਾਨ ਨੂੰ ਛੱਡ ਦੇ, ਤੇ ਆਪਣੇ ਮਨ ਨਾਲ ਰੱਬ ਦੇ ਨਾਮ ਨੂੰ ਮਾਣ ॥ ਉਸਨੂੰ ਆਪਣੇ ਦਿਲ ਵਿਚ ਤੋਲ ॥

translation: Load up this merchandise, and set out with the Saints.
simpleTranslation: Pack this goods and go with the Saints.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਹ ਸਮਾਨ ਲੋਡ ਕਰੋ ਅਤੇ ਸੱਚਿਆਂ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ ਚੱਲੋ।

translation: Give up other corrupt entanglements.
simpleTranslation: Let go of other bad distractions.
punjabiTranslation: ਹੋਰ ਖ਼ਰਾਬ ਜੰਜਾਲ ਛੱਡਨਾਂ।

translation: "Blessed, blessed", everyone will call you,
simpleTranslation: Everyone will say you are blessed, blessed.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਭੇ ਤੈਨੂੰ ਧੰਨ ਧੰਨ ਕਹਣਗੇ।

translation: and your face shall be radiant in the Court of the Lord.
simpleTranslation: And your face will shine in God’s court.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇਰਾ ਮੁਖ ਹਰਿ ਦੀ ਦਰਗਾਹ 'ਚ ਚਮਕੇਗਾ।

translation: In this trade, only a few are trading.
simpleTranslation: In this business, only a few are involved.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਹ ਕਾਰੋਬਾਰ ਵਿੱਚ ਸਿਰਫ ਕੁਝ ਹੀ ਹੁੰਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: Nanak is forever a sacrifice to them. ||5||
simpleTranslation: Nanak is always devoted to them. ||5||
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ ਉਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਲਈ ਸਦਾ ਸਮਰਪਿਤ ਹੈ। ||੫||

gurmukhi: crn swD ky Doie Doie pIau ]
unicode: ਚਰਨ ਸਾਧ ਕੇ ਧੋਇ ਧੋਇ ਪੀਉ ॥
transliteration: charan saadh ke dhoi dhoi peeau ||
translation: Wash the feet of the Holy, and drink in this water.
simpleTranslation: Wash the feet of the holy ones, and drink this water.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਧੂਆਂ ਦੇ ਪੈਰ ਧੋ ਕੇ, ਇਹ ਪਾਣੀ ਪੀ ਲੈ।

translation: Dedicate your soul to the Holy.
simpleTranslation: Give your heart to the holy ones.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਵਿਤਰ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਆਪਣਾ ਦਿਲ ਦੇ ਦਿਓ।

translation: Take your cleansing bath in the dust of the feet of the Holy.
simpleTranslation: Take your bath in the dust of the holy ones.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੱਚੀਆਂ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਦੀ ਧੂਰ ਚੜ੍ਹ ਕੇ ਨਾੜ ਲਵੋ।

translation: To the Holy, make your life a sacrifice.
simpleTranslation: To the holy ones, dedicate your life.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਦੀਆਂ ਲਈ, ਆਪਣੀ ਜਿੰਦਗੀ ਕੁਰਬਾਨ ਕਰੋ।

translation: Service to the Holy is obtained by great good fortune.
simpleTranslation: Serving the holy comes from great luck.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਧ ਅਨੇਕ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਦੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਵੱਡੇ ਭਾਗ ਨਾਲ ਮਿਲਦੀ ਹੈ।

translation: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the Kirtan of the Lord's Praise is sung.
simpleTranslation: In the company of the holy, we sing the Lord's praises.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਤ ਵਿੱਚ ਹਰਿ ਦੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਗਾਈਦੀ ਹੈ।

translation: From all sorts of dangers, the Saint saves us.
simpleTranslation: The Saint protects us from all kinds of troubles.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਧੂ ਸਾਨੂੰ ਸਾਰੀਆਂ ਮੁਸੀਬਤਾਂ ਤੋਂ ਬਚਾਉਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: hir gun gwie AMimRq rsu cwKY ]

transliteration: har gun gai a(n)mirat ras chaakhai ||
translation: Singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, we taste the ambrosial essence.
simpleTranslation: Singing praises of God, we enjoy the divine sweetness.
punjabiTranslation: ਖੁਦਾ ਦੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾ ਕੇ, ਅਸੀਂ ਉਸ ਦੀ ਮਿੱਠਾਸ ਚੱਖਦੇ ਹਾਂ।

translation: Seeking the Protection of the Saints, we have come to their door.
simpleTranslation: Looking for protection from the Saints, we’ve come to their door.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੰਤਾਂ ਦੀ ਸਹਾਇਤਾ ਮੰਗਦਿਆਂ, ਅਸੀਂ ਉਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਦੇਣ ਦੇ ਦਰ ਤੇ ਆਏ ਹਾਂ।

translation: All comforts, O Nanak, are so obtained. ||6||
simpleTranslation: All comforts are found, O Nanak. ||6||
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਰੇ ਸੁਖ ਮਿਲਦੇ ਨੇ, ਓ ਨਾਨਕ। ||੬||

translation: He infuses life back into the dead.
simpleTranslation: He brings life back to those who are dead.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਮਰਿਆਂ ਨੂੰ ਫਿਰ ਜੀਵਨ ਦਿੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He gives food to the hungry.
simpleTranslation: He feeds those who are hungry.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਭੁੱਖਿਆਂ ਨੂੰ ਖਾਣਾ ਦਿੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: srb inDwn jw kI idRstI mwih ]

transliteration: sarab nidhaan jaa kee dhirasaTee maeh ||
translation: All treasures are within His Glance of Grace.
simpleTranslation: All treasures are in His kind look.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਰਾ ਰਤਨ ਉਸਦੇ ਮਿਹਰ ਵਾਲੇ ਨਜ਼ਰ ਵਿੱਚ ਹੈ।

translation: People obtain that which they are pre-ordained to receive.
simpleTranslation: People get what they are meant to receive.
punjabiTranslation: ਲੋਕ ਉਹ ਮਿਲਦਾ ਜੋ ਉਹਨਾਂ ਦੇ ਲਈ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਹੈ।

transliteration: sabh kichh tis kaa oh karanai jog ||
translation: All things are His; He is the Doer of all.
simpleTranslation: Everything belongs to Him; He does it all.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਉਸਦਾ ਹੈ; ਉਹ ਸਾਰਾ ਕੰਮ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ।

transliteration: tis bin dhoosar hoaa na hog ||
translation: Other than Him, there has never been any other, and there shall never be.
simpleTranslation: Besides Him, there’s never been another and there won’t be.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਤੋਂ ਬਿਨਾ, ਹੋਰ ਕੋਈ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੈ ਤੇ ਨਾ ਹੋਵੇਗਾ।

translation: Meditate on Him forever and ever, day and night.
simpleTranslation: Think about Him always, day and night.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੇ ਬਾਰੇ ਸਦਾ ਸੋਚੋ, ਦਿਨ ਪੈਰ।

translation: This way of life is exalted and immaculate.
simpleTranslation: This way of living is great and pure.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਹ ਜੀਉਣ ਦਾ ਤਰੀਕਾ ਉੱਚ ਅਤੇ ਸੁਚ ਹੈ।

simpleTranslation: The one who God blesses with His Name.

simpleTranslation: O Nanak, that person becomes clean and pure.

simpleTranslation: Someone who believes in the Guru in their heart.

translation: comes to dwell upon the Lord God.
simpleTranslation: The person remembers God so well.

simpleTranslation: He is praised as a devoted one, a humble friend in all three worlds.

translation: The One Lord is in his heart.
simpleTranslation: The One God is in his heart.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਸਦੇ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਵਿੱਚ ਇਕ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: scu krxI scu qw kI rhq ]

translation: True are his actions; true are his ways.
simpleTranslation: His actions are true; his ways are true.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹਦੇ ਕਰਮ ਸੱਚੇ ਨੇ; ਉਹਦੀ ਰਹਤ ਸਚੀ ਹੈ।

simpleTranslation: His heart is true; he speaks the truth with his mouth.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦਾ ਹਿਰਦਾ ਸੱਚਾ ਹੈ; ਉਹ ਆਪਣੇ ਮੁੱਖ ਨਾਲ ਸੱਚ ਬੋਲਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: True is his vision; true is his form.
simpleTranslation: His vision is true; His form is true.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸੱਚੀ; ਉਸਦਾ ਆਕਾਰ ਸੱਚਾ।

translation: He distributes Truth and he spreads Truth.
simpleTranslation: He shares the Truth and spreads it everywhere.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸਚ ਨੂੰ ਵੰਡਦਾ ਅਤੇ ਹਰ ਜਗ੍ਹਾ ਫੈਲਾਉਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: One who recognizes the Supreme Lord God as True
simpleTranslation: The one who knows God as the truth.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਨ੍ਹਾ ਨੇ ਰੱਬ ਨੂੰ ਸੱਚ ਮੰਨਿਆ।

translation: - O Nanak, that humble being is absorbed into the True One. ||8||15||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, that humble person merges with the True One.
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਹ ਨਿਮਰਤ ਜੀਵ ਸੱਚ ਵਿੱਚ ਮਿਲ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Shalok:
simpleTranslation: Shalok:
punjabiTranslation: ਸ਼ਲੋਕ:

gurmukhi: iqsih buJwey nwnkw ijsu hovY supRsMn ]1]

translation: They alone understand Him, O Nanak, with whom He is pleased. ||1||
simpleTranslation: Only those who please Him really understand God, O Nanak. ||1||

translation: Ashtapadee:
simpleTranslation: The Eight Verses.
punjabiTranslation: ਅੱਠ ਪਦਾਂ।

translation: Keep the Immortal Lord God enshrined within your mind.
simpleTranslation: Keep God always in your thoughts.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਰਮੇਸ਼ਰ ਨੂੰ ਸਦਾ ਆਪਣੇ ਵਿਚਾਰਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਰੱਖੋ।

translation: Renounce your love and attachment to people.
simpleTranslation: Give up your love and attachment to people.
punjabiTranslation: ਲੋਕਾਂ ਨਾਲੋਂ ਪ੍ਰੀਤੀਆਂ ਅਤੇ ਚਿਨ੍ਹਾ ਨੂੰ ਤਿਆਗ ਦੇ।

translation: Beyond Him, there is nothing at all.
simpleTranslation: There’s nothing at all beyond God.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਤੋਂ ਬਾਹਰ ਕੁਝ ਵੀ ਨਹੀਂ।

simpleTranslation: The One God is everywhere for everyone.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਕ ਵਾਹਿਗੁਰੂ ਸਾਰੇ ਥਾਂ ਹਾਜ਼ਰ ਹੈ।

simpleTranslation: He sees everything; He knows everything.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ सब ਕੁਝ ਵੇਖਦਾ ਹੈ; ਉਹ sab kuch ਜਾਣਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He is the Supreme Lord God, the Transcendent Lord, the Lord of the Universe,
simpleTranslation: He is the Supreme God, the ultimate Lord, the Creator of the universe.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਉੱਚੇ ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ, ਅੰਤਿਮ ਸਾਹਿਬ, ਸੰਸਾਰ ਦੇ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰ ਹੈ।

translation: the Treasure of mercy, compassion and forgiveness.
simpleTranslation: The treasure of kindness, compassion, and forgiveness.
punjabiTranslation: ਦਿਆਲਤਾ, ਮਿਹਰ ਅਤੇ ਮਾਫ ਕਰਨਾ ਦਾ ਖਜ਼ਾਨਾ।

translation: To fall at the Feet of Your Holy Beings
simpleTranslation: To bow down at Your holy ones' feet.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇਰੇ ਪਵਿੱਤਰਾਂ ਦੇ ਪੈਰਾਂ ਤੇ ਝੁੱਕਣਾ।

translation: - this is the longing of Nanak's mind. ||1||
simpleTranslation: This is what Nanak's heart desires. ||1||
punjabiTranslation: ਇਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਦੇ ਮਨ ਦੀ ਲੋੜ ਹੈ। ||1||

simpleTranslation: The one who grants our wishes and gives us safety.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਸਾਡੇ ਮਨਸਾ ਪੂਰੀ ਕਰਦਾ ਅਤੇ ਸਾਸ ਲਵਾਉਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: That which He has written, comes to pass.
simpleTranslation: What He decides happens.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਉਹ ਕਰਦਾ, ਉਹ ਹੀ ਹੁੰਦਾ।

translation: He destroys and creates in the blink of an eye.

translation: He is the embodiment of ecstasy and everlasting joy.

punjabiTranslation: ਰਾਜਿਆਂ 'ਚ ਉਹ ਰਾਜਾ; ਜੋਗੀਆਂ 'ਚ ਉਹ ਜੋਗੀ।

gurmukhi: qp mih qpIsru igRhsq mih BogI ]
unicode: ਤਪ ਮਹਿ ਤਪੀਸਰੁ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਸਤ ਮਹਿ ਭੋਗੀ ॥
transliteration: tap meh tapeesar girahasat meh bhogee ||
translation: Among ascetics, He is the Ascetic; among householders, He is the Consummator.
simpleTranslation: Among the renunciants, He is the ultimate renouncer; among families, He is the enjoyer.
punjabiTranslation: ਤਪ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲਿਆਂ ਵਿੱਚ, ਉਹ ਸਹੁੰਨ ਮਾਣ ਵਾਲਾ; ਘਰੇਲੂ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ, ਉਹ ਸਹਵੇਲਾ।

translation: By the constant practice of meditation, His devotee finds peace.
simpleTranslation: By always meditating, the devotee finds peace.
punjabiTranslation: ਹਮੇਸ਼ਾ ਧਿਆਨ ਕਰਨ ਨਾਲ ਭਗਤ ਨੂੰ ਸੁਖ ਮਿਲਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: nwnk iqsu purK kw iknY AMqu n pwieAw ]2]
unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਪੁਰਖ ਕਾ ਕਿਨੈ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
transliteration: naanak tis purakh kaa kinai a(n)t na paiaa ||2||
translation: O Nanak, no one has found the limits of that Supreme Being. ||2||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, no one has found the end of that Supreme Being.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ, ਕਿਸੇ ਨੇ ਵੀ ਉਸ ਮਹਾਨ ਪੁਰਖ ਦਾ ਅੰਤ ਨਹੀਂ ਲੱਭਿਆ।

gurmukhi: jw kI lIlw kI imiq nwih ]
unicode: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਲੀਲਾ ਕੀ ਮਿਤਿ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
transliteration: jaa kee leelaa kee mit naeh ||
translation: There is no limit to His play.
simpleTranslation: There’s no end to what He creates.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਸਦੀ ਲੀਲਾ ਦੀ ਕੋਈ ਹੱਦ ਨਹੀਂ।

translation: All the demigods have grown weary of searching for it.
simpleTranslation: All the gods are tired from looking for it.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਰੇ ਦੇਵਤਾ ਇਸਨੂੰ ਲੱਭਣ ਤੋਂ ਥੱਕ ਗਏ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: ipqw kw jnmu ik jwnY pUqu ]
unicode: ਪਿਤਾ ਕਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਕਿ ਜਾਨੈ ਪੂਤੁ ॥
transliteration: pitaa kaa janam k jaanai poot ||
translation: What does the son know of his father's birth?
simpleTranslation: What does the son understand about his dad's birth?
punjabiTranslation: ਪੂਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਦੇ ਜਨਮ ਨੂੰ ਕੀ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਹੈ?

translation: All are strung upon His string.
simpleTranslation: Everyone is connected by His thread.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਰੇ ਉਸਦੇ ਧਾਗੇ ਨਾਲ ਜੁੜੇ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: sumiq igAwnu iDAwnu ijn dyie ] jn dws nwmu iDAwvih syie ]
unicode: ਸੁਮਤਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਜਿਨ ਦੇਇ ॥ ਜਨ ਦਾਸ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਸੇਇ ॥
transliteration: sumat giaan dhiaan jin dhei || jan dhaas naam dhiaaveh sei ||
translation: He bestows good sense, spiritual wisdom and meditation on His humble servants and slaves who meditate on the Naam.
simpleTranslation: He gives them good sense, wisdom, and meditation who humbly remember God.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹਨਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਚੰਗੀ ਸੋਚ, ਗਿਆਨ ਅਤੇ ਧਿਆਨ ਦਿੰਦਾ ਜੋ ਵਿੱਦਿਆ ਨਾਲ ਸਿਮਰਦੇ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: iqhu gux mih jw kau Brmwey ]
unicode: ਤਿਹੁ ਗੁਣ ਮਹਿ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਭਰਮਾਏ ॥
transliteration: tih gun meh jaa kau bharamaae ||
translation: He leads some astray in the three qualities;
simpleTranslation: He misleads some with the three qualities;
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਤਿੰਨ ਗੁਣਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਕੁਝ ਨੂ ਸਿਰਫ਼ ਭਰਮਾਉਂਦਾ ਹੈ;

translation: they are born and die, coming and going over and over again.
simpleTranslation: They are born and die, coming and going repeatedly.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਜਨਮ ਲੈਂਦੇ ਹਨ ਅਤੇ ਮਰਦੇ ਹਨ, ਆਉਂਦੇ ਅਤੇ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਰਹਿੰਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: The high and the low are His places.
simpleTranslation: The high and the low are where He is.
punjabiTranslation: ਊਚ ਨੀਚ ਉਸ ਦੇ ਸਥਾਨ ਹਨ।

translation: As He inspires us to know Him, O Nanak, so is He known. ||3||
simpleTranslation: As He guides us to know Him, O Nanak, that's how He is known.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਵੇਂ ਉਹ ਸਾਨੂੰ ਜਾਣਨ ਲਈ ਦੱਸਦਾ ਹੈ, ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਸੇ ਤਰ੍ਹਾਂ ਉਹ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: nwnw rUp nwnw jw ky rMg ]
unicode: ਨਾਨਾ ਰੂਪ ਨਾਨਾ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਰੰਗ ॥
transliteration: naanaa roop naanaa jaa ke ra(n)g ||
translation: Many are His forms; many are His colors.
simpleTranslation: He has many forms; He has many colors.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੇ ਨਾਨਾਂ ਰੂਪ ਨੇ; ਉਸਦੇ ਨਾਨੇ ਰੰਗ ਨੇ।

translation: Many are the appearances which He assumes, and yet He is still the One.
simpleTranslation: He takes on many forms, but He is still the One.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਬੇਹਦ ਰੂਪ ਧਾਰਦਾ ਹੈ, ਪਰ ਉਹ ਸਿਰਫ ਇਕ ਹੀ ਹੈ।

translation: In so many ways, He has extended Himself.
simpleTranslation: In many ways, God has shown Himself.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਈ ਤਰੀਕਿਆਂ ਨਾਲ, ਰੱਬ ਨੇ ਆਪ ਨੂੰ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ।

translation: The Eternal Lord God is the One, the Creator.
simpleTranslation: God is eternal and the One Creator.
punjabiTranslation: ਈਸ਼ਵਰ ਸਦੀਵੀ ਤੇ ਇੱਕ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰ ਹੈ।

translation: He performs His many plays in an instant.
simpleTranslation: He does many things in a moment.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਇੱਕ ਮਿੰਟ ਵਿੱਚ ਬਹੁਤ ਕੁਝ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: The Perfect Lord is pervading all places.
simpleTranslation: The Perfect God is everywhere around us.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਿਰਫ਼ ਪਰਫੈਕਟ ਰੱਬ ਹਰ ਜਗ੍ਹਾ ਹੈ।

translation: In so many ways, He created the creation.
simpleTranslation: In many ways, God made the world.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਈ ਢੰਗਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਗੋੜ੍ਹੀ ਨੂੰ ਬਣਾਇਆ।

translation: He alone can estimate His worth.
simpleTranslation: Only He knows His true value.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਾਮਨ ਵਰਗੀ ਆਪਣੀ ਕੀਮਤ ਉਸੇ ਨੂੰ ਪਤਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: sB Gt iqs ky sB iqs ky Twau ]
unicode: ਸਭ ਘਟ ਤਿਸ ਕੇ ਸਭ ਤਿਸ ਕੇ ਠਾਉ ॥
transliteration: sabh ghaT tis ke sabh tis ke Thaau ||
translation: All hearts are His, and all places are His.
simpleTranslation: All hearts belong to Him, and every place is His.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਭ ਦਿਲ ਉਸ ਦੇ ਨੇ, ਤੇ ਹਰ ਥਾਂ ਉਸ ਦੀ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: jip jip jIvY nwnk hir nwau ]4]
unicode: ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਜੀਵੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥੪॥
transliteration: jap jap jeevai naanak har naau ||4||
translation: Nanak lives by chanting, chanting the Name of the Lord. ||4||
simpleTranslation: Nanak lives by repeating the Name of God. ||4||
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਨੂੰ ਜਪ ਕੇ ਜੀਵਦਾ ਹੈ ॥੪॥

translation: The Naam is the Support of all creatures.
simpleTranslation: The Name is the support for everyone.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਮ ਸਾਰੇ ਜੀਵਾਂ ਦੀ ਸਹਾਇਤਾ ਹੈ।

translation: The Naam is the Support of the earth and solar systems.
simpleTranslation: The Name supports the earth and the universe.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਮ ਧਰਤੀ ਅਤੇ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡ ਦੀ ਸਹਾਰਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: nwm ky Dwry isimRiq byd purwn ]
unicode: ਨਾਮ ਕੇ ਧਾਰੇ ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਨ ॥
transliteration: naam ke dhaare simirat bedh puraan ||
translation: The Naam is the Support of the Simritees, the Vedas and the Puraanas.
simpleTranslation: The Name is the support of the scriptures and holy texts.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਮ ਸਾਰੇ ਗ੍ਰੰਥਾਂ ਅਤੇ ਧਰਮ ਦੇ ਟਿਕਾਣੇ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: nwm ky Dwry sunn igAwn iDAwn ]
unicode: ਨਾਮ ਕੇ ਧਾਰੇ ਸੁਨਨ ਗਿਆਨ ਧਿਆਨ ॥
transliteration: naam ke dhaare sunan giaan dhiaan ||
translation: The Naam is the Support by which we hear of spiritual wisdom and meditation.
simpleTranslation: The Name is what helps us hear about wisdom and meditation.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਮ ਉਹ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਸਾਨੂੰ ਗਿਆਨ ਅਤੇ ਧਿਆਨ ਸੁਣਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਮਦਦ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: The Naam is the Support of the Akaashic ethers and the nether regions.
simpleTranslation: The Name supports the sky and the lower realms.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਮ ਆਕਾਸ ਅਤੇ ਪਾਤਾਲ ਦਾ ਸਹਾਰਾ ਹੈ।

translation: The Naam is the Support of all bodies.
simpleTranslation: The Naam supports all forms.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਮ ਸਾਰੇ ਆਕਾਰਾਂ ਦਾ ਸਹਾਰਾ ਹੈ ॥

gurmukhi: nwm ky Dwry purIAw sB Bvn ]
unicode: ਨਾਮ ਕੇ ਧਾਰੇ ਪੁਰੀਆ ਸਭ ਭਵਨ ॥
transliteration: naam ke dhaare pureeaa sabh bhavan ||
translation: The Naam is the Support of all worlds and realms.
simpleTranslation: The Name is the support for all worlds.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਮ ਸਭ ਭਵਨ ਲਈ ਸਹਾਰਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: nwm kY sMig auDry suin sRvn ]
unicode: ਨਾਮ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਉਧਰੇ ਸੁਨਿ ਸ੍ਰਵਨ ॥
transliteration: naam kai sa(n)g udhare sun sravan ||
translation: Associating with the Naam, listening to it with the ears, one is saved.
simpleTranslation: By connecting with God's name, and hearing it, one gets saved.
punjabiTranslation: ਅੱਤ ਦੇ ਨਾਮ ਨਾਲ ਜੁੜ ਕੇ, ਸੁਣ ਕੇ ਬਚਿਆ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: kir ikrpw ijsu AwpnY nwim lwey ]
unicode: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਨੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਾਏ ॥
transliteration: kar kirapaa jis aapanai naam laae ||
translation: Those whom the Lord mercifully attaches to His Naam
simpleTranslation: Those whom God connects to His Name with kindness.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਰੱਬ ਆਪਣੇ ਨਾਮ ਨਾਲ ਮਿਹਰ ਕਰਕੇ ਜੋੜਦਾ ਹੈ॥

gurmukhi: nwnk cauQy pd mih so jnu giq pwey ]5]
unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਚਉਥੇ ਪਦ ਮਹਿ ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਏ ॥੫॥
transliteration: naanak chauthe padh meh so jan gat paae ||5||
translation: - O Nanak, in the fourth state, those humble servants attain salvation. ||5||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, in the fourth state, those humble ones find liberation.
punjabiTranslation: ਹੇ ਨਾਨਕ, ਚੌਥੇ ਪਦ ਵਿੱਚ, ਉਹ ਨਿਮਰਤਮ ਜੀਵ ਮੁਕਤੀ ਪਾਂਦੇ।

gurmukhi: rUpu siq jw kw siq AsQwnu ]
unicode: ਰੂਪੁ ਸਤਿ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਸਤਿ ਅਸਥਾਨੁ ॥
transliteration: roop sat jaa kaa sat asathaan ||
translation: His form is true, and true is His place.
simpleTranslation: His form is real, and so is His home.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦਾ ਰੂਪ ਸچا ਹੈ, ਅਤੇ ਉਸਦਾ ਘਰ ਵੀ ਸੱਚਾ ਹੈ।

translation: His personality is true - He alone is supreme.
simpleTranslation: His nature is true - He is the highest.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਨਸ ਹੈ ਸੱਚੀ - ਉਹ ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਉੱਚਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: krqUiq siq siq jw kI bwxI ]
unicode: ਕਰਤੂਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਸਤਿ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
transliteration: karatoot sat sat jaa kee baanee ||
translation: His acts are true, and true is His Word.
simpleTranslation: His actions are real, and His words are true.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦੇ ਕਰਤੂਤ ਸੱਚੇ ਹਨ, ਤੇ ਬੋਲੀ ਵੀ ਸੱਚੀ ਹੈ।

translation: The True Lord is permeating all.
simpleTranslation: The True God is everywhere.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੱਚਾ ਰੱਬ ਹਰ ਜਗਾਹ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: siq krmu jw kI rcnw siq ]
unicode: ਸਤਿ ਕਰਮੁ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਰਚਨਾ ਸਤਿ ॥
transliteration: sat karam jaa kee rachanaa sat ||
translation: True are His actions; His creation is true.
simpleTranslation: His actions are true; His creation is true.
punjabiTranslation: ਊਹਨਾਂ ਦੇ ਕਰਮ ਸੱਚੇ ਹਨ; ਉਂਹ ਦੀ ਬਣਾਈ ਵੀ ਸੱਚੀ ਹੈ।

translation: His root is true, and true is what originates from it.
simpleTranslation: His foundation is true, and true is what comes from it.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਜੜ੍ਹ ਸੱਚੀ ਹੈ, ਤੇ ਜੋ ਇਸ ਤੋਂ ਨਿਕਲਦਾ ਹੈ ਉਹ ਵੀ ਸੱਚਾ ਹੈ।

translation: True is His lifestyle, the purest of the pure.
simpleTranslation: His way of living is true, the cleanest of the clean.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਜੀਵਨ ਸ਼ੈਲੀ ਸੱਚੀ, ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਸਾਫ ਸਾਫ ਸਫ਼ਾਈ ਹੈ।

translation: All goes well for those who know Him.
simpleTranslation: Things go well for those who know God.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਸ ਨੂੰ ਗਿਆਨ ਹੈ, ਉਸ ਦੀ ਸਭ ਥੀਕ ਹੁੰਦੀ ਹੈ ॥

translation: The True Name of God is the Giver of peace.
simpleTranslation: The True Name of God brings peace.
punjabiTranslation: ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦਾ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮ ਸੁਖ ਲੈ ਆਉਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: ibsÍwsu siq nwnk gur qy pweI ]6]
unicode: ਬਿਸ੍ਵਾਸੁ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਈ ॥੬॥
transliteration: bisavaiaas sat naanak gur te paiee ||6||
translation: Nanak has obtained true faith from the Guru. ||6||
simpleTranslation: Nanak found true faith from the Guru.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ ਨੇ ਗੁਰੂ ਤੋਂ ਸੱਚਾ ਵਿਸ਼ਵਾਸ पाया।

translation: True are the Teachings, and the Instructions of the Holy.
simpleTranslation: True are the teachings and guidance of the holy ones.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੱਚ ਹਨ ਸਾਧੂਆਂ ਦੇ ਸਿਖਲਾਈ ਅਤੇ ਨੀਤੀਆਂ।

gurmukhi: siq qy jn jw kY irdY pRvys ]
unicode: ਸਤਿ ਤੇ ਜਨ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਰਿਦੈ ਪ੍ਰਵੇਸ ॥
transliteration: sat te jan jaa kai ridhai praves ||
translation: True are those into whose hearts He enters.
simpleTranslation: True are those who let Him into their hearts.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੱਚੇ ਹਨ ਉਹ ਜੋ ਉਸਨੂੰ ਆਪਣੇ ਦਿਲਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਦਾਖਲ ਕਰਨ ਦਿੰਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: One who knows and loves the Truth
simpleTranslation: Someone who understands and loves the truth.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਸੱਚ ਨੂੰ ਸਮਝਦਾ ਅਤੇ ਪਿਆਰ ਕਰਦਾ।

gurmukhi: nwmu jpq qw kI giq hoie ]
unicode: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
transliteration: naam japat taa kee gat hoi ||
translation: chanting the Naam, he obtains salvation.
simpleTranslation: By chanting God's name, he finds salvation.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਮ ਜਪ ਕੇ, ਉਹ ਮੁਕਤੀ ਪਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He Himself is True, and all that He has made is true.
simpleTranslation: He is true, and everything He created is true.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸੱਚਾ ਹੈ, ਤੇ ਜੋ ਕੁਝ ਉਸਨੇ ਬਣਾਇਆ ਹੈ ਉਹ ਸੱਚਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He Himself knows His own state and condition.
simpleTranslation: He knows exactly how He is.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਹੈ ਕਿ ਉਹ ਕਿਵੇਂ ਹੈ।

translation: He is the Creator Lord of His world.
simpleTranslation: He is the Creator God of His world.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਆਪਣੇ ਜਗਤ ਦਾ ਬਣਾਉਣ ਵਾਲਾ ਹੈ।

translation: No one else understands Him, although they may try.
simpleTranslation: No one else gets Him, even if they try.
punjabiTranslation: ਕੋਈ ਹੋਰ ਉਸ ਨੂੰ ਨਹੀਂ ਸਮਝਦਾ, ਚਾਹੇ ਉਹ ਕੋਸ਼ਿਸ਼ ਕਰਲੇ।

gurmukhi: krqy kI imiq n jwnY kIAw ]
unicode: ਕਰਤੇ ਕੀ ਮਿਤਿ ਨ ਜਾਨੈ ਕੀਆ ॥
transliteration: karate kee mit na jaanai keeaa ||
translation: The created cannot know the extent of the Creator.
simpleTranslation: What is made can't know the Creator's greatness.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਬਣਿਆ ਉਹ ਕਰਤੇ ਦੀ ਵੱਡਾਈ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਣ ਸਕਦਾ।

gurmukhi: nwnk jo iqsu BwvY so vrqIAw ]7]
unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਵਰਤੀਆ ॥੭॥
transliteration: naanak jo tis bhaavai so varateeaa ||7||
translation: O Nanak, whatever pleases Him comes to pass. ||7||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, whatever makes Him happy happens. ||7||
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਜੋ ਉਸਨੂੰ ਖੁਸ਼ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ, ਉਹੀ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ। ||7||

translation: Gazing upon His wondrous wonder, I am wonder-struck and amazed!
simpleTranslation: Seeing His amazing creation, I am shocked and amazed!
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦੀਆਂ ਸ਼ਾਨਦਾਰ ਚੀਜ਼ਾਂ ਵੇਖ ਕੇ, ਮੈਂ ਹੈਰਾਨ ਹਾਂ!

translation: One who realizes this, comes to taste this state of joy.
simpleTranslation: Those who understand this, get to enjoy this happiness.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਨੇ ਇਹ ਸਮਝਿਆ, ਉਹ ਇਸ ਖੁਸ਼ੀ ਦਾ ਅਨੰਦ ਮਾਣਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: God's humble servants remain absorbed in His Love.
simpleTranslation: God's humble followers stay lost in His Love.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਦੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਉਸਦੇ ਪਿਆਰ ਵਿੱਚ ਰਹਿੰਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: Following the Guru's Teachings, they receive the four cardinal blessings.
simpleTranslation: By following the Guru's words, they get the four important blessings.
punjabiTranslation: ਗੁਰੂ ਦੇ ਬਚਨ ਮਾਂਨ ਕੇ ਚਾਰ ਵੱਡੀਆਂ ਦੀਆਂ ਬਰਕਤਾਂ ਮਿਲਦੀਆਂ ਹਨ।

translation: They are the givers, the dispellers of pain.
simpleTranslation: They give and remove our pain.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਦੋਨੀਂ ਦਿੰਦੇ ਅਤੇ ਦੁੱਖ ਦੂਰ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: In their company, the world is saved.
simpleTranslation: With them around, the world is safe.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹਨਾਂ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ, ਦੁਨੀਆਂ ਸੇਹਤਮੰਦ ਹੈ।

simpleTranslation: The servant of the Lord's servant is really lucky.
punjabiTranslation: ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਦਾ ਸੇਵਕ ਬੜਾ ਨੇਕ ਹੈ।

translation: In the company of His servant, one becomes attached to the Love of the One.
simpleTranslation: Being with His servant brings love for the One.

simpleTranslation: His humble servant sings the songs of God’s glory.
