translation: We are wonder-struck at the wondrous wonder of the Lord.
simpleTranslation: We are amazed by the amazing wonders of God.
punjabiTranslation: ਅਸੀਂ ਸਾਹਮਣੇ ਹੈਰਾਨੀਆਂ ਤੋਂ ਹੈਰਾਨ ਹਾਂ।

translation: O Nanak, He alone knows His own state. ||5||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, only He knows His own condition.
punjabiTranslation: ਹੇ ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਹ ਆਪ ਹੀ ਆਪਣੀ ਹਾਲਤ ਨੂੰ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: When the Undeceiveable, Impenetrable, Inscrutable One was self-absorbed,
simpleTranslation: When God, who can't be fooled, was completely absorbed in itself,
punjabiTranslation: ਜਦੋਂ ਅਕਾਲ ਪੁਰਖ ਜੋ ਕਿਸੇ ਨੂੰ ਵਿਆਖਿਆ ਨਹੀਂ ਕਰ ਸਕਦਾ, ਖੁਦ ਵਿੱਚ ਸਮਾਇਆ,

translation: then who was swayed by Maya?
simpleTranslation: So who was affected by illusion?
punjabiTranslation: ਫਿਰ ਉਹ ਕਿਹੜਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਨਾਲ ਪ੍ਰਭਾਵਿਤ ਹੋਇਆ?

translation: When He paid homage to Himself,
simpleTranslation: When He showed respect to Himself,
punjabiTranslation: ਜਦੋਂ ਉਸ ਨੇ ਆਪ ਨੂੰ ਸਲਾਮ ਕੀਤਾ,

translation: then the three qualities were not prevailing.
simpleTranslation: Then the three qualities weren't present.
punjabiTranslation: ਫਿਰ ਤਿਹ ਗੁਣ ਨਹੀਂ ਸਨ।

translation: When there was only the One, the One and Only Lord God,
simpleTranslation: When there was only the One, the One and Only God.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਦੋਂ ਸਿਰਫ਼ ਇਕ ਸੀ, ਉਹ ਸਿਰਫ਼ ਇੱਕ ਹੀ ਰੱਬ।

gurmukhi: qh kaunu AicMqu iksu lwgY icMqw ]
unicode: ਤਹ ਕਉਨੁ ਅਚਿੰਤੁ ਕਿਸੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਚਿੰਤਾ ॥
transliteration: teh kaun achi(n)t kis laagai chi(n)taa ||
translation: then who was not anxious, and who felt anxiety?
simpleTranslation: Then who was not worried, and who felt worry?
punjabiTranslation: ਤਾਂ ਫਿਰ ਕਿਸ ਨੂੰ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਨਹੀਂ ਸੀ, ਤੇ ਕਿਸ ਨੂੰ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਲੱਗੀ ਸੀ?

translation: When He Himself was satisfied with Himself,
simpleTranslation: When God was happy with Himself,
punjabiTranslation: ਜਦੋਂ ਪੈਗम्बर ਆਪਣੇ ਆਪ ਨਾਲ ਖੁਸ਼ ਸੀ,

translation: then who spoke and who listened?
simpleTranslation: So who is talking and who is listening?
punjabiTranslation: ਤਾ ਫਿਰ ਕੌਣ ਗੱਲ ਕਰਦਾ ਅਤੇ ਕੌਣ ਸੁਣਦਾ ਹੈ?

translation: He is vast and infinite, the highest of the high.
simpleTranslation: He is huge and limitless, the highest of all.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਵੱਡਾ ਅਤੇ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਹੈ, ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਉੱਚਾ।

translation: O Nanak, He alone can reach Himself. ||6||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, only He can know Himself.
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਸਿਰਫ ਉਹ ਆਪ ਨੂੰ ਸਮਝ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: When He Himself fashioned the visible world of the creation,
simpleTranslation: When God made the seen world of creation.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਦੋਂ الله ਨੇ ਦਿਖਾਈ ਦਿੱਤੀ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਬਣਾਈ।

translation: he made the world subject to the three dispositions.
simpleTranslation: He made the world follow the three qualities.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਨੇ ਦੁਨਿਆ ਨੂੰ ਤਿੰਨ ਗੁਣਾਂ ਦੇ ਅਧੀਨ ਕੀਤਾ।

translation: Sin and virtue then began to be spoken of.
simpleTranslation: That's when people started talking about good and bad.
punjabiTranslation: ਉੱਥੇ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਨੇ ਚੰਗੇ ਤੇ ਮਾੜੇ ਬਾਰੇ ਗੱਲ ਕਰਨਾ ਸ਼ੁਰੂ ਕੀਤਾ।

translation: Some have gone to hell, and some yearn for paradise.
simpleTranslation: Some end up in hell, some long for heaven.
punjabiTranslation: ਕੋਈ ਨਰਕ ਵਿੱਚ ਜਾਂਦਾ, ਕੋਈ ਸੁਰਗ ਦੀ ਕਾਮਨਾ ਕਰਦਾ।

translation: Worldly snares and entanglements of Maya,
simpleTranslation: The traps and messes of the world,
punjabiTranslation: ਦੁਨੀਆ ਦੇ ਫੰਡੇ ਅਤੇ ਜੰਜਾਲ,

translation: egotism, attachment, doubt and loads of fear;
simpleTranslation: Ego, attachment, doubt, and so much fear;
punjabiTranslation: ਹਉਮੈ, ਮੋਹ, ਭਰਮ ਅਤੇ ਬਹੁਤ ਡਰ;

translation: pain and pleasure, honor and dishonor
simpleTranslation: sorrow and joy, respect and disrespect
punjabiTranslation: ਦੁੱਖ ਤੇ ਖੁਸ਼ੀ, ਇੱਜ਼ਤ ਤੇ ਬੇਇੱਜ਼ਤੀ

translation: these came to be described in various ways.
simpleTranslation: These are described in many ways.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਹਨਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਅਨੇਕ ਤਰੀਕੇ ਨਾਲ ਦਰਸਾਇਆ ਗਿਆ।

translation: He Himself creates and beholds His own drama.
simpleTranslation: He creates and watches His own play.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਆਪਣਾ ਖੇਲ ਬਣਾਉਂਦਾ ਅਤੇ ਵੇਖਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He winds up the drama, and then, O Nanak, He alone remains. ||7||
simpleTranslation: He ends the play, and then, O Nanak, only He remains.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਖੇਲ ਖਤਮ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ, ਫਿਰ, ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਹ ਹੀ ਬੱਚਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Wherever the Eternal Lord's devotee is, He Himself is there.
simpleTranslation: Wherever a true devotee is, God is there too.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿੱਥੇ ਸੱਚਾ ਭਗਤ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ, ਓਥੇ ਹੀ God ਵੀ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He unfolds the expanse of His creation for the glory of His Saint.
simpleTranslation: He spreads out His creation for His Saint's honor.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦਾ ਪੈਰacksਦਾ ਹੈ ਉਸ ਦੇ ਸੰਤਾਂ ਦੀ ਇਜ਼ਤ ਲਈ।

translation: He Himself is the Master of both worlds.
simpleTranslation: He is the Lord of both worlds.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਦੋਨੋਂ ਸੰਸਾਰਾਂ ਦਾ ਮਾਲਕ ਹੈ।

translation: His Praise is to Himself alone.
simpleTranslation: His praise is only for Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਕੇਵਲ ਉਸ ਲਈ ਹੈ।

translation: He Himself performs and plays His amusements and games.
simpleTranslation: He has fun and enjoys His games Himself.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਆਪ ਹੀ ਮਜ਼ੇ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ ਅਤੇ ਖੇਡਾਂ ਦਾ ਸਵਾਦ ਲੈਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He Himself enjoys pleasures, and yet He is unaffected and untouched.
simpleTranslation: He enjoys himself, yet stays untouched and unaffected.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਖੁਦ ਨੂੰ ਆਨੰਦ ਦੇ ਕੇ ਵੀ ਬਿਨਾ ਬਦਲਦਾ ਰਹਿੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

simpleTranslation: He makes whoever He wants join in His fun.

translation: He is beyond calculation, beyond measure, uncountable and unfathomable.
simpleTranslation: He can't be measured or counted, he's endless and deep.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਕੋਈ ਗਿਣਤੀ ਨਹੀਂ, ਉਹ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਤੇ ਗਹਿਰਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Ashtapadee:
simpleTranslation: Eight Verses.

translation: He Himself is the speaker, and He Himself is the listener.
simpleTranslation: He speaks and He listens.

simpleTranslation: He is the One, and He is all the many.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਇੱਕ ਹੈ, ਅਤੇ ਉਹ ਸਾਰੇ ਬਹੁਤ ਹਨ।

simpleTranslation: As God wishes, He takes it back into Himself.

simpleTranslation: You hold the whole world on Your thread.

translation: One whom God Himself inspires to understand

simpleTranslation: That person finds the True Name.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਜੋੜਾ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਮ ਲੰਬ੍ਹੇ।

translation: He looks impartially upon all, and he knows the essential reality.
simpleTranslation: He sees everyone equally, and knows the truth of things.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸਾਰੇ ਨੂੰ ਇੱਕੋ ਜਿਹੇ ਵੇਖਦਾ ਹੈ, ਅਤੇ ਸੱਚ ਨੂੰ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: O Nanak, he conquers the whole world. ||1||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, he wins over the entire world. ||1||
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਹ ਸਾਰੀ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਨੂੰ ਜੇਤੋਂਦਾ ਹੈ। ||1||

translation: All beings and creatures are in His Hands.
simpleTranslation: All living things are in His hands.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਰੇ ਜੀਵ ਉਸ ਦੇ ਹੱਥਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਹਨ।

translation: He is Merciful to the meek, the Patron of the patronless.
simpleTranslation: He is kind to the humble, the support for those without a home.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਨਮਰ ਤੇ ਦਇਆਲ ਹੈ, ਜਿਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਦਾ ਕੋਈ ਸਾਥੀ ਨਹੀਂ।

translation: No one can kill those who are protected by Him.
simpleTranslation: No one can harm those He protects.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਸਨੂੰ ਉਹ ਰੱਖਦਾ ਹੈ, ਉਸਨੂੰ ਕੋਈ ਵੀ ਨਹੀਂ ਮਾਰ ਸਕਦਾ।

translation: One who is forgotten by God, is already dead.
simpleTranslation: That person is dead who is forgotten by God.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਵਿਅਕਤੀ ਮਰ ਗਿਆ ਜੋ ਰੱਬ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਭੁੱਲਿਆ ਗਿਆ।

translation: Leaving Him, where else could anyone go?
simpleTranslation: Without Him, where else can we go?
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦੇ ਬਿਨਾ, ਹੋਰ ਕਿੱਥੇ ਜਾ ਸਕੀਏ?

translation: Over the heads of all is the One, the Immaculate King.
simpleTranslation: Above everyone is the One, the pure King.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਉੱਪਰ ਇੱਕ ਪਵਿੱਤਰ ਰਾਜਾ ਹੈ।

translation: The ways and means of all beings are in His Hands.
simpleTranslation: Everything that lives is in His control.

translation: Inwardly and outwardly, know that He is with you.
simpleTranslation: Inside and outside, know that God is with you.
punjabiTranslation: ਅੰਦਰੋ ਬਾਹਰੋ ਜਾਨੋ ਕਿ ਓਹ ਤੁਹਾਡੇ ਨਾਲ ਹੈ।

translation: He is the Ocean of excellence, infinite and endless.
simpleTranslation: He is the endless ocean of goodness.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸੋਹਣਾਈ ਦਾ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਦਰਿਆ ਹੈ।

translation: Slave Nanak is forever a sacrifice to Him. ||2||
simpleTranslation: Nanak is always devoted to Him. ||2||
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਮੇਸ਼ਾਂ ਉਸਦਾ ਦਾਸ ਹੈ। ||੨||

translation: The Perfect, Merciful Lord is pervading everywhere.
simpleTranslation: The Perfect and Kind God is everywhere.
punjabiTranslation: ਪੂਰੇ ਤੇ ਦਇਆਲ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਹਰ ਜਾ ਹੈ।

translation: His kindness extends to all.
simpleTranslation: His kindness reaches everyone.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਦਇਆ ਸਾਰੇ ਲਈ ਹੈ।

translation: He Himself knows His own ways.
simpleTranslation: He knows His own methods.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਆਪਣੇ ਤਰੀਕੇ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: The Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts, is present everywhere.
simpleTranslation: The Knower of our hearts is everywhere.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਡੇ ਦਿਲਾਂ ਦੀ ਜਾਣਕਾਰੀ ਵੀਰਵਾਂ ਹੈ।

translation: He cherishes His living beings in so many ways.
simpleTranslation: He cares for His creatures in many ways.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਆਪਣੇ ਜੀਵਾਂ ਦੀਆਂ ਬਹੁਤੀਆਂ ਤਰੀਕਿਆਂ ਨਾਲ ਦੇਖਭਾਲ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: That which He has created meditates on Him.

translation: Whoever pleases Him, He blends into Himself.
simpleTranslation: Whoever makes Him happy, He merges with them.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਉਸਨੂੰ ਖੁਸ਼ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ, ਉਹ ਉਸ ਵਿੱਚ ਮਿਲ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: Bgiq krih hir ky gux gwie ]
unicode: ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥
transliteration: bhagat kareh har ke gun gai ||
translation: They perform His devotional service and sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.
simpleTranslation: They serve God and sing His glorious praises.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਦੇ ਤੇ ਉਸਦੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਂਦੇ।

translation: With heart-felt faith, they believe in Him.
simpleTranslation: With true faith, they trust in Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਚੇ ਦਿਲ ਨਾਲ, ਉਹ ਉਸ 'ਤੇ ਭਰੋਸਾ ਰੱਖਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: O Nanak, they realize the One, the Creator Lord. ||3||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, they know the One, the Creator God.
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਹ ਇਕਾਈ ਨੂੰ, ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਨੂੰ ਸਮਝਦੇ ਨੇ।

translation: The Lord's humble servant is committed to His Name.
simpleTranslation: God's humble servant is devoted to His Name.
punjabiTranslation: ਦਇਆਲ ਦਾ ਨਿਮਰਤ ਸੇਵਕ ਆਪਣੇ ਨਾਮ 'ਚ ਸਮਰਪਿਤ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: iqs kI Aws n ibrQI jwie ]
unicode: ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਆਸ ਨ ਬਿਰਥੀ ਜਾਇ ॥
transliteration: tis kee aas na birathee jai ||
translation: His hopes do not go in vain.
simpleTranslation: His hopes never go to waste.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦੀਆਂ ਆਸਾਂ ਬੇਕਾਰ ਨਹੀਂ ਜਾਣਦੀਆਂ।

translation: The servant's purpose is to serve;
simpleTranslation: The servant's goal is to serve;
punjabiTranslation: ਸੇਵਕ ਦਾ ਮਕਸਦ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਨਾ ਹੈ;

translation: obeying the Lord's Command, the supreme status is obtained.
simpleTranslation: Following God's command, you achieve the highest place.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਰਮੇਸ਼ਰ ਦੇ ਹੁਕਮ ਨੂੰ ਮੰਨ ਕੇ, ਤੂੰ ਸਚਮੁਚ ਵੱਡਾ ਮਾਣ ਮਿਲਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Beyond this, he has no other thought.
simpleTranslation: There’s nothing else on his mind.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਸ ਤੋਂ ਬਾਦ ਉਸਦਾ ਹੋਰ ਕੁਝ ਨਹੀ।

translation: Within his mind, the Formless Lord abides.
simpleTranslation: In his mind, God lives without a form.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿੰਦੇ ਮਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਬੇਆਕਾਰ ਵੇਖਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: His bonds are cut away, and he becomes free of hatred.
simpleTranslation: His ties are broken, and he is free from hate.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦੇ ਬੰਧਨ ਤੋੜ ਦਿੱਤੇ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹਨ, ਉਹ ਨਫਰਤ ਤੋਂ ਮੁਕਤ ਹੈ।

translation: Night and day, he worships the Feet of the Guru.
simpleTranslation: Day and night, he praises the Guru's feet.
punjabiTranslation: ਰੇਤ ਤੇ ਰਾਤ, ਉਹ ਗੁਰੂ ਦੇ ਪੈਰ ਦੀ ਸੋਹਣੀ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He is at peace in this world, and happy in the next.
simpleTranslation: He is at peace here, and happy in the next life.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਹਾਂ ਉਹ ਸੁਖੀ ਹੈ, ਤੇ ਅਗਲੇ ਜਿੰਦ ਦੀ ਖੁਸ਼ੀ ਹੈ।

translation: O Nanak, the Lord God unites him with Himself. ||4||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, God brings him close to Himself. ||4||
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਉਸਨੂੰ ਆਪਣੇ ਨਾਲ ਜੋੜਦਾ ਹੈ। ||੪||

translation: Join the Company of the Holy, and be happy.
simpleTranslation: Be with the holy people, and find joy.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਵਿਤਰ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਰਹੋ, ਤੇ ਖੁਸ਼ੀ ਪਾਓ।

translation: Sing the Glories of God, the embodiment of supreme bliss.
simpleTranslation: Sing praises of God, who is pure joy.
punjabiTranslation: ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦੀਆਂ ਵਡਿਆਈਆਂ ਗਾ, ਜੋ ਸੁਖ ਹੀ ਸੁਖ ਹੈ।

translation: Contemplate the essence of the Lord's Name.
simpleTranslation: Think deeply about God's Name.
punjabiTranslation: ਰੱਬ ਦੇ ਨਾਮ ਬਾਰੇ ਗ਼ੌਰ ਕਰੋ।

translation: Redeem this human body, so difficult to obtain.
simpleTranslation: Save this rare human body, it's hard to get.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਹ ਅਜਿਹਾ ਮਨੁੱਖੀ ਸਰੀਰ ਬਚਾਓ, ਇਹ ਮਿਲਣ ਵਿੱਚ ਮੁਸ਼ਕਲ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: AMimRq bcn hir ky gun gwau ]
unicode: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਚਨ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਉ ॥
transliteration: a(n)mirat bachan har ke gun gaau ||
translation: Sing the Ambrosial Words of the Lord's Glorious Praises;
simpleTranslation: Sing the sweet words of God's praises;
punjabiTranslation: ਰੱਬ ਦੇ ਸਿਫ਼ਤ ਦੇ ਮਿੱਠੇ ਸ਼ਬਦ ਗਾਉ;

translation: this is the way to save your mortal soul.
simpleTranslation: This is how to save your soul.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਹ ਤੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਾਣ ਬਚਾਉਣ ਦਾ ਤਰੀਕਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Behold God near at hand, twenty-four hours a day.
simpleTranslation: See God close by, all day and night.
punjabiTranslation: ਰਾਤ ਦਿਨ ਪਰਮੇਸ਼ਰ ਨੂੰ ਨੇੜੇ ਵੇਖੋ।

translation: Ignorance shall depart, and darkness shall be dispelled.
simpleTranslation: Ignorance will go away, and the darkness will clear up.
punjabiTranslation: ਅਗਿਆਨ ਜਾਏਗਾ, ਅਤੇ ਅੰਧਕਾਰ ਦੂਰ ਹੋ ਜਾਵੇਗਾ।

translation: Listen to the Teachings, and enshrine them in your heart.
simpleTranslation: Hear the teachings and keep them in your heart.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਪਦੇਸ ਸੁਣੋ ਤੇ ਆਪਣੇ दिल ਵਿੱਚ ਰੱਖੋ।

translation: O Nanak, you shall obtain the fruits of your mind's desires. ||5||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, you'll get what your heart desires. ||5||
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਤੂੰ ਜੋ ਚਾਹੁਂਦਾ, ਉਹ ਫਲ ਜ਼ਰੂਰ ਪਾਵੇਂਗਾ। ||5||

translation: Embellish both this world and the next;
simpleTranslation: Beautify both this life and the next;
punjabiTranslation: ਇਸ ਜਿੰਦਗੀ ਤੇ ਅਗਲੇ ਜਿੰਦਗੀ ਨੂੰ ਸੋਹਣਾ ਬਣਾਓ;

translation: enshrine the Lord's Name deep within your heart.
simpleTranslation: Keep God's Name deep in your heart.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਦਾ ਨਾਂ ਦਿਲ ਵਿੱਚ ਰੱਖੋ।

translation: Perfect are the Teachings of the Perfect Guru.
simpleTranslation: The teachings of the perfect Guru are amazing.
punjabiTranslation: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰੂ ਦੀਆਂ ਸਿਖਿਆਵਾਂ ਬਹੁਤ ਵਧੀਆ ਨੇ।

gurmukhi: ijsu min bsY iqsu swcu prIiKAw ]
unicode: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਬਸੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਾਚੁ ਪਰੀਖਿਆ ॥
transliteration: jis man basai tis saach pareekhiaa ||
translation: That person, within whose mind it abides, realizes the Truth.
simpleTranslation: That person, who holds it in their mind, understands the truth.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਸਦੇ ਮਨ ਵਿਚ ਇਹ ਬਸਦਾ ਹੈ, ਉਹ ਸੱਚ ਨੂੰ ਸਮਝਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: min qin nwmu jphu ilv lwie ]
unicode: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
transliteration: man tan naam japahu liv lai ||
translation: With your mind and body, chant the Naam; lovingly attune yourself to it.
simpleTranslation: With your heart and body, repeat God's name; connect with it lovingly.
punjabiTranslation: ਮਨ ਅਤੇ ਸਰੀਰ ਨਾਲ, ਗੋਦ ਦਾ ਨਾਮ ਜਪੋ; ਪਿਆਰ ਨਾਲ ਸਾਥ ਜੋੜੋ।

gurmukhi: dUKu drdu mn qy Bau jwie ]
unicode: ਦੂਖੁ ਦਰਦੁ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਭਉ ਜਾਇ ॥
transliteration: dhookh dharadh man te bhau jai ||
translation: Sorrow, pain and fear shall depart from your mind.
simpleTranslation: Sadness, pain, and fear will leave your mind.
punjabiTranslation: ਦੁੱਖ, ਦਰਦ ਅਤੇ ਡਰ ਤੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਤੋਂ ਚਲੇ ਜਾਣਗੇ।

translation: Deal in the true trade, O trader,
simpleTranslation: Do honest business, O trader.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਮਾਨਦਾਰ ਵਪਾਰ ਕਰ, ਓ ਵਾਪਾਰੀ।

translation: and your merchandise shall be safe in the Court of the Lord.
simpleTranslation: And your goods will be safe in God's presence.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇਰੇ ਸਮਾਨ ਰੱਬ ਦੀ ਦਰਗਾਹ ਵਿੱਚ ਸੁਰੱਖਿਅਤ ਰਹਿ ਸਗਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: Keep the Support of the One in your mind.
simpleTranslation: Always remember the One for support.
punjabiTranslation: ਮਦਦ ਲਈ ਸਦਾ ਇਕ ਨੂੰ ਯਾਦ ਰੱਖੋ।

translation: O Nanak, you shall not have to come and go in reincarnation again. ||6||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, you won't be born and die again.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ, ਤੂੰ ਮੁੜ ਨਹੀ ਆਉਂਦਾ।

gurmukhi: iqs qy dUir khw ko jwie ]
unicode: ਤਿਸ ਤੇ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਹਾ ਕੋ ਜਾਇ ॥
transliteration: tis te dhoor kahaa ko jai ||
translation: Where can anyone go, to get away from Him?
simpleTranslation: Where can anyone go to escape Him?
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਤੋਂ ਦੂਰ ਕਿੱਥੇ ਜਾ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ ਕੋਈ?

translation: Meditating on the Protector Lord, you shall be saved.
simpleTranslation: Think of God, and you will be safe.
punjabiTranslation: ਆਪਣੇ ਰਾਖੀ ਵਾਲੇ ਨੂੰ ਯਾਦ ਕਰੋ, ਤਾ ਕਿ ਤੁਸੀਂ ਸੁਰੱਖਿਅਤ ਰਹੋ।

translation: Meditating on the Fearless Lord, all fear departs.
simpleTranslation: Thinking of the fearless God, all fear goes away.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਿਰਭਉ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦਾ ਚਿੰਤਨ ਕਰਕੇ ਸਾਰਾ ਡਰ ਖਤਮ ਹੋ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: By God's Grace, mortals are released.
simpleTranslation: By God's kindness, people are freed.
punjabiTranslation: ਵਾਹਿਗੁਰੂ ਦੀ ਮੇਹਰ ਨੇ, ਲੋਕ ਮੁਕਤ ਹੋ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: ijsu pRBu rwKY iqsu nwhI dUK ]
unicode: ਜਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਰਾਖੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਦੂਖ ॥
transliteration: jis prabh raakhai tis naahee dhookh ||
translation: One who is protected by God never suffers in pain.
simpleTranslation: Whoever is protected by God doesn't feel pain.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਸnu ਰੱਬ ਰਾਖਦਾ ਉਹ ਦੂਖ ਮਹਿਸੂਸ ਨਹੀਂ ਕਰਦਾ।

translation: Chanting the Naam, the mind becomes peaceful.
simpleTranslation: Chanting God's name brings peace to the mind.
punjabiTranslation: ਅਸетов ਦਾ ਨਾਮ ਜਾਪਣ ਨਾਲ ਮਨ ਸ਼ਾਂਤ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Anxiety departs, and ego is eliminated.
simpleTranslation: Worry goes away, and pride disappears.
punjabiTranslation: ਚਿੰਤਾ ਚਲੀ ਜਾਣਦੀ, ਤੇ ਅਹੰਕਾਰ ਮਿਟ ਜਾਂਦਾ।

gurmukhi: iqsu jn kau koie n phucnhwru ]
unicode: ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਪਹੁਚਨਹਾਰੁ ॥
transliteration: tis jan kau koi na pahuchanahaar ||
translation: No one can equal that humble servant.
simpleTranslation: No one can match that humble servant.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਨਿਮ੍ਰਤ ਜਨ ਨਾਲ ਕੋਈ ਨਹੀਂ ਜ਼ਿਆਦਾ।

translation: The Brave and Powerful Guru stands over his head.
simpleTranslation: The strong and brave Guru is above us.
punjabiTranslation: ਮਜ਼ਬੂਤ ਅਤੇ ਬਹਾਦਰ ਗੁਰੂ ਸਾਡੇ ਉੱਪਰ ਹੈ।

translation: O Nanak, his efforts are fulfilled. ||7||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, his hard work pays off. ||7||
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਸ ਦੀ ਮਿਹਨਤ ਸਫਲ ਹੁੰਦੀ ਹੈ। ||7||

gurmukhi: miq pUrI AMimRqu jw kI idRsit ]
unicode: ਮਤਿ ਪੂਰੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ॥
transliteration: mat pooree a(n)mrit jaa kee dhirasaT ||
translation: His wisdom is perfect, and His Glance is Ambrosial.
simpleTranslation: His wisdom is complete, and His gaze is sweet.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦੀ ਸਮਝ ਪੂਰੀ ਹੈ, ਤੇ ਉਸ ਦੀ ਨਜ਼ਰ ਮਿੱਠੀ ਹੈ।

translation: Beholding His Vision, the universe is saved.
simpleTranslation: Seeing His vision, the world is saved.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦਾ ਦਰਸਨ ਵੇਖ ਕੇ, ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਬਚਦੀ ਹੈ।

translation: His Lotus Feet are incomparably beautiful.
simpleTranslation: His lotus-like feet are so beautiful.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦੇ ਕਮਲ ਵਰਗੇ ਚਰਨ ਬਹੁਤ ਸੁੰਦਰ ਹਨ।

translation: The Blessed Vision of His Darshan is fruitful and rewarding; His Lordly Form is beautiful.
simpleTranslation: Seeing Him brings blessings and rewards; His beautiful form is great.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਨੂੰ ਵੇਖਣ ਨਾਲ ਤਰੱਕੀ ਅਤੇ ਇਨਾਮ ਮਿਲਦੇ ਹਨ; ਉਸਦਾ ਸੋਹਣਾ ਰੂਪ ਬਹੁਤ ਵਧੀਆ ਹੈ।

translation: Blessed is His service; His servant is famous.
simpleTranslation: Great is serving Him; His servant is well-known.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਵਧੀਆ ਹੈ; ਉਸਦੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਨੂੰ ਸਭ ਜਾਣਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: The Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts, is the most exalted Supreme Being.
simpleTranslation: The one who knows us inside, the Searcher of our hearts, is the highest being.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਸਨੂੰ ਅਸੀਂ ਅੰਦਰੋਂ ਜਾਣਦੇ ਹਾਂ, ਦਿਲਾਂ ਦੇ ਖੋਜੀ, ਉਹ ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਉੱਚਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: ijsu min bsY su hoq inhwlu ]
unicode: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਬਸੈ ਸੁ ਹੋਤ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ॥
transliteration: jis man basai su hot nihaal ||
translation: That one, within whose mind He abides, is blissfully happy.
simpleTranslation: That person, where God resides in their mind, is truly happy.
punjabiTranslation: ਉ ਉਹੋ ਹੈ, ਜਿਸ ਦੇ ਮਨ ਵਿਚ ਰੱਬ ਵਸਦਾ, ਬਜ਼੍ਹ ਹੁੰਦੇ ਆ।

gurmukhi: qw kY inkit n Awvq kwlu ]
unicode: ਤਾ ਕੈ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਨ ਆਵਤ ਕਾਲੁ ॥
transliteration: taa kai nikaT na aavat kaal ||
translation: Death does not draw near him.
simpleTranslation: Death doesn't come close to him.
punjabiTranslation: ਮੌਤ ਉਸ ਦੇ ਨੇੜੇ ਨਹੀਂ ਆਉਂਦੀ।

translation: One becomes immortal, and obtains the immortal status,
simpleTranslation: One becomes never dying and gets the eternal status.
punjabiTranslation: ਕੋਈ ਅਮਰ ਹੋ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ ਤੇ ਅਸਲ ਦਰਜਾ ਲੈ ਲੈਂਦਾ ਹੈ ॥

translation: meditating on the Lord, O Nanak, in the Company of the Holy. ||8||22||
simpleTranslation: Thinking of God, O Nanak, with the holy souls.
punjabiTranslation: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾਂ ਵਿਚ, ਨਾਨਕ, ਰੱਬ ਦੀ ਸੋਚ ਕਰਦੇ।

translation: Shalok:
simpleTranslation: Verse:
punjabiTranslation: ਕਵਿਤਾ:

gurmukhi: igAwn AMjnu guir dIAw AigAwn AMDyr ibnwsu ]
unicode: ਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਜਨੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਅਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਧੇਰ ਬਿਨਾਸੁ ॥
transliteration: giaan a(n)jan gur dheeaa agiaan a(n)dher binaas ||
translation: The Guru has given the healing ointment of spiritual wisdom, and dispelled the darkness of ignorance.
simpleTranslation: The Guru has given the balm of wisdom, ending the darkness of ignorance.
punjabiTranslation: ਗੁਰੂ ਨੇ ਗਿਆਨ ਦਾ ਮਲਹਾਨ ਦਿੱਤਾ, ਅਗਿਆਨ ਦੇ ਅੰਧੇਰੇ ਨੂੰ ਖਤਮ ਕੀਤਾ।

gurmukhi: hir ikrpw qy sMq ByitAw nwnk min prgwsu ]1]
unicode: ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਸੰਤ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਿ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ॥੧॥
transliteration: har kirapaa te sa(n)t bheTiaa naanak man paragaas ||1||
translation: By the Lord's Grace, I have met the Saint; O Nanak, my mind is enlightened. ||1||
simpleTranslation: Thanks to God’s grace, I found the Saint; O Nanak, my mind is bright.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਰਉਪਕਾਰ ਨਾਲ ਮੈਂ ਸੰਤ ਮਿਲਿਆ; ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨ ਚੜ੍ਹ ਗਿਆ।

translation: Ashtapadee:
simpleTranslation: Eight verses that share wisdom.
punjabiTranslation: ਅੱਠ ਪਦ ਕਿੱਸੇ ਜੋ ਗਿਆਨ ਦਿੰਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: In the Society of the Saints, I see God deep within my being.
simpleTranslation: In the presence of saints, I feel God inside me.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੰਤਾਂ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ, ਮੈਨੂੰ ਅੰਦਰ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਮਹਿਸੂਸ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: God's Name is sweet to me.
simpleTranslation: God's name is sweet to me.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਦਾ ਨਾਮ ਮੈਨੂੰ ਮੀਠਾ ਲਗਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: All things are contained in the Heart of the One,
simpleTranslation: Everything is inside the heart of the One,
punjabiTranslation: ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਏਕ ਦੇ ਦਿਲ ਵਿੱਚ ਹੈ,

translation: although they appear in so many various colors.
simpleTranslation: Even though they show in many colors.
punjabiTranslation: ਭਾਵੇਂ ਉਹ ਬਹੁਤ ਰੰਗਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਦਿਸਦੇ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: nau iniD AMimRqu pRB kw nwmu ]
unicode: ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
transliteration: nau nidh a(n)mrit prabh kaa naam ||
translation: The nine treasures are in the Ambrosial Name of God.
simpleTranslation: The nine treasures are in God's sweet name.
punjabiTranslation: ਨੌ ਨਿਧੀਆਂ प्रभ ਦੇ ਮਿੱਠੇ ਨਾਮ ਵਿੱਚ ਹਨ।

translation: Within the human body is its place of rest.
simpleTranslation: Inside the body is where it rests.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਰੀਰ ਵਿੱਚ ਇਹ ਨਿਵਾਸ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: The Deepest Samaadhi, and the unstruck sound current of the Naad are there.
simpleTranslation: The deepest meditation and the natural sound are there.
punjabiTranslation: ਗਹਿਰਾ ਯੋਗ ਅਤੇ ਸਾਹਿਤ ਦਾ ਸੁਰ ਹੈ ਉਥੇ।

translation: The wonder and marvel of it cannot be described.
simpleTranslation: You can't describe its wonder and beauty.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਸ ਦੇ ਅਚਰਜ ਅਤੇ ਸੋਹਣਾਈ ਨੂੰ ਨਹੀਂ ਕਹਿ ਸਕਦੇ।

translation: He alone sees it, unto whom God Himself reveals it.
simpleTranslation: Only they see it, to whom God shows it.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹੀ ਦੇਖਦੇ ਹਨ, ਜਿਨਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਗਿਆਨ God ਵਿਖਾਉਂਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: O Nanak, that humble being understands. ||1||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, that humble person understands. ||1||
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਹ ਨਿਮਰਤ ਵਿਅਕਤੀ ਸਮਝਦਾ ਹੈ। ||੧||

translation: The Infinite Lord is inside, and outside as well.
simpleTranslation: The endless God is within us and around us.
punjabiTranslation: ਬੇਅੰਤ ਰੱਬ ਸਾਡੇ ਅੰਦਰ ਅਤੇ ਬਾਹਰ ਹੈ।

translation: Deep within each and every heart, the Lord God is pervading.
simpleTranslation: Deep in every heart, God is everywhere.
punjabiTranslation: ਹਰ ਦਿਲ ਵਿੱਚ ਗੁਆਲ ਸਭ ਜਗ੍ਹਾ ਹੈ।

translation: In the earth, in the Akaashic ethers, and in the nether regions of the underworld
simpleTranslation: In the earth, in the skies, and in the underworld.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਮੀਨ 'ਚ, ਅਸਮਾਨ 'ਚ, ਅਤੇ ਪਾਤਾਲ 'ਚ।

translation: in all worlds, He is the Perfect Cherisher.
simpleTranslation: In all worlds, God is the Perfect Nurturer.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਰੀਆਂ ਦੁਨੀਆਂ ਵਿੱਚ, ਰੱਬ ਪੂਰਨ ਪਾਲਨਹਾਰ ਹੈ।

translation: In the forests, fields and mountains, He is the Supreme Lord God.
simpleTranslation: In the woods, fields, and hills, He is the Supreme God.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੰਗਲਾਂ, ਖੇਤਾਂ ਅਤੇ ਪਹਾੜਾਂ ਵਿਚ ਉਹ ਹੀ ਸ੍ਰਿਸ਼ਟੀ ਦਾ ਚੇਤਨ ਹੈ।

translation: As He orders, so do His creatures act.
simpleTranslation: They act according to His command.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਆਗਿਆ ਅਨੁਸਾਰ ਹੀ ਚੱਲਦੇ ਨੇ।

translation: He permeates the winds and the waters.
simpleTranslation: He is everywhere in the air and water.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਹਵਾ ਅਤੇ ਪਾਣੀ ਵਿੱਚ ਹੈ।

translation: He is pervading in the four corners and in the ten directions.
simpleTranslation: He is everywhere, in all directions.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਹਰ तरफ, ਸਾਰੀਆਂ ਦਿਸਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: iqs qy iBMn nhI ko Twau ]
unicode: ਤਿਸ ਤੇ ਭਿੰਨ ਨਹੀ ਕੋ ਠਾਉ ॥
transliteration: tis te bhi(n)n nahee ko Thaau ||
translation: Without Him, there is no place at all.
simpleTranslation: Without God, there’s no place anywhere.
punjabiTranslation: ਬਿਨਾ ਉਸਦੇ, ਕਿੱਥੇ ਵੀ ਕੋਈ ਥਾਂ ਨਹੀਂ।

translation: By Guru's Grace, O Nanak, peace is obtained. ||2||
simpleTranslation: With the Guru's kindness, O Nanak, we find peace.
punjabiTranslation: ਗੁਰੂ ਦੀ ਮੇਹਰ ਨਾਲ, ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਸਾਡਾ ਸੁਖ ਮਿਲਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: See Him in the Vedas, the Puraanas and the Simritees.
simpleTranslation: You can find God in the Vedas, Puraanas, and scriptures.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੂੰ ਬੇਦਾਂ, ਪੁਰਾਣਾਂ ਅਤੇ ਧਾਰਮਿਕ ਪਾਠਾਂ ਵਿਚ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦੇਖ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈਂ।

translation: In the moon, the sun and the stars, He is the One.
simpleTranslation: In the moon, sun, and stars, there is only One.
punjabiTranslation: ਚੰਦ, ਸੂਰਜ, ਤੇ ਤਾਰਿਆਂ 'ਚ ਇਕ ਹੀ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: bwxI pRB kI sBu ko bolY ]
unicode: ਬਾਣੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਬੋਲੈ ॥
transliteration: baanee prabh kee sabh ko bolai ||
translation: The Bani of God's Word is spoken by everyone.
simpleTranslation: Everyone speaks the words of God.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਭ ਨੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦੇ ਸ਼ਬਦ ਬੋਲਣੇ ਹਨ।

translation: He Himself is unwavering - He never wavers.
simpleTranslation: He is steady - He never changes.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਅਡੋਲ ਹੈ - ਉਹ ਕਦੇ ਨਹੀਂ ਬਦਲਦਾ ॥

translation: With absolute power, He plays His play.
simpleTranslation: With all His power, God plays His game.
punjabiTranslation: ਆਪਣੀ ਸਾਰੀ ਤਾਕਤ ਨਾਲ, ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਖੇਡਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: His value cannot be estimated; His virtues are invaluable.
simpleTranslation: His worth can't be measured; His qualities are priceless.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦੀ ਕੀਮਤ ਨਹੀਂ ਲੱਗਦੀ; ਉਸ ਦੇ ਗੁਣ ਬੇਮਿਸਾਲ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: srb joiq mih jw kI joiq ]
unicode: ਸਰਬ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਹਿ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਜੋਤਿ ॥
transliteration: sarab jot meh jaa kee jot ||
translation: In all light, is His Light.
simpleTranslation: In all light, there is His light.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਭ ਉਜਿਆਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਉਹਦੀ ਰੋਸ਼ਨੀ ਹੈ।

translation: The Lord and Master supports the weave of the fabric of the universe.
simpleTranslation: God holds up the thread of the universe.
punjabiTranslation: ਏਸ ਜਗਤ ਦੀ ਨੀਲੀ ਲਾਈ ਰੱਖਦਾ ਹੈ ਤੇ ਕੀਮਤ।

translation: By Guru's Grace, doubt is dispelled.
simpleTranslation: Thanks to the Guru, doubt disappears.
punjabiTranslation: ਗੁਰ ਦੀ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਨਾਲ, ਸ਼ੱਕ ਦੂਰ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: O Nanak, this faith is firmly implanted within. ||3||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, this faith is deep inside me.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ, ਇਹ ਵਿਸ਼ਵਾਸ ਮੇਰੇ ਅੰਦਰ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: sMq jnw kw pyKnu sBu bRhm ]
unicode: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕਾ ਪੇਖਨੁ ਸਭੁ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ॥
transliteration: sa(n)t janaa kaa pekhan sabh braham ||
translation: In the eye of the Saint, everything is God.
simpleTranslation: In the Saint's view, everything is God.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੰਤ ਦੀ ਨਜ਼ਰ ਵਿੱਚ ਹਰ ਚੀਜ਼ ਸ਼ਾਹ ਮਾਲਕ।

gurmukhi: sMq jnw kY ihrdY siB Drm ]
unicode: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਸਭਿ ਧਰਮ ॥
transliteration: sa(n)t janaa kai hiradhai sabh dharam ||
translation: In the heart of the Saint, everything is Dharma.
simpleTranslation: In the heart of the Saint, everything is right.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੰਤ ਦੇ ਦਿਲ ਵਿੱਚ ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਸਹੀ ਹੈ।

translation: The Saint hears words of goodness.
simpleTranslation: The Saint listens to good words.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੰਤ ਚੰਗੀਆਂ ਗੱਲਾਂ ਸੁਣਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He is absorbed in the All-pervading Lord.
simpleTranslation: He's one with the God everywhere.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਹਰ ਜਗਾਹ ਹਰ ਰੋਜ਼ ਦੇ ਰਾਮ ਵਿੱਚ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: ijin jwqw iqs kI ieh rhq ]
unicode: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਾਤਾ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਇਹ ਰਹਤ ॥
transliteration: jin jaataa tis kee ieh rahat ||
translation: This is the way of life of one who knows God.
simpleTranslation: This is how someone who knows God lives.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਸਨੇ ਰੱਬ ਨੂੰ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਉਹਨੂੰ ਇਹ ਤਰੀਕਾ ਪਸੰਦ ਹੈ।

translation: True are all the words spoken by the Holy.
simpleTranslation: All the words of the saints are true.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਧੂਆਂ ਦੇ ਸਾਰੇ ਬਚਨ ਸੱਚੇ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: jo jo hoie soeI suKu mwnY ]
unicode: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਹੋਇ ਸੋਈ ਸੁਖੁ ਮਾਨੈ ॥
transliteration: jo jo hoi soiee sukh maanai ||
translation: Whatever happens, he peacefully accepts.
simpleTranslation: Whatever happens, he accepts it calmly.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੇ ਜੇ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਉਹ ਸੁਖ ਨਾਲ ਮੰਨਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He knows God as the Doer, the Cause of causes.
simpleTranslation: He sees God as the doer, the source of everything.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਨੂੰ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲਾ, ਸਭ ਦਾ ਸਰੋਤ ਮੰਨਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He dwells inside, and outside as well.
simpleTranslation: He is present inside us and outside too.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸਾਡੇ ਅੰਦਰ ਵੀ ਹੈ ਤੇ ਬਾਹਰ ਵੀ।

translation: O Nanak, beholding the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, all are fascinated. ||4||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, seeing the blessed sight of God, everyone is mesmerized.
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਰੱਬ ਦਾ ਦਰਸਨ ਵੇਖ ਕੇ ਸਭ ਮੋਹੀ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: He Himself is True, and all that He has made is True.
simpleTranslation: He is True, and everything He created is True.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸੱਚਾ ਹੈ, ਅਤੇ ਉਸਨੇ ਬਣਾਇਆ ਹਰ ਚੀਜ਼ ਸੱਚੀ ਹੈ।

translation: The entire creation came from God.
simpleTranslation: Everything comes from God.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਰੀ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟੀ ਪ੍ਰਭਤੋਂ ਬਣੀ ਹੈ।

translation: As it pleases Him, He creates the expanse.
simpleTranslation: He creates the universe as He wishes.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਨੂੰ ਜੋ ਚੰਗਾ ਲੱਗੇ, ਉਹ ਸਦਾ ਬਣਾਉਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: As it pleases Him, He becomes the One and Only again.
simpleTranslation: As He wishes, He becomes One again.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਵੇਂ ਉਹ ਚਾਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ, ਉਹ ਫਿਰ ਇੱਕ ਬਣਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: His powers are so numerous, they cannot be known.
simpleTranslation: His abilities are so many, we can't know them all.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦੀਆਂ ਹੁਣਰਾਂ ਇਤਨੀ ਵੱਧ ਹਨ, ਅਸੀਂ ਸਾਰੀਆਂ ਨਹੀਂ ਜਾਣ ਸਕਦੇ।

translation: As it pleases Him, He merges us into Himself again.
simpleTranslation: As He wishes, He brings us back to Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਸਨੇ ਚੁਣਿਆ, ਉਹ ਸਾਨੂੰ ਦੁਬਾਰਾ ਮਿਲਾਉਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Who is near, and who is far away?
simpleTranslation: Who is close, and who is far away?
punjabiTranslation: ਕੌਣ ਨੇੜੇ, ਤੇ ਕੌਣ ਦੂਰ ਹੈ?

translation: He Himself is Himself pervading everywhere.
simpleTranslation: He is everywhere, filling everything.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਹਰ ਜਗ੍ਹਾ ਹੈ, ਹਰ ਕੁਝ ਭਰਿਆ ਹੋਇਆ ਹੈ।

translation: One whom God causes to know that He is within the heart
simpleTranslation: The one who God shows is in the heart.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਜਿਸ ਨੂੰ ਰੱਬ ਦਿਲ ਵਿਚ ਦੱਸਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: - O Nanak, He causes that person to understand Him. ||5||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, He helps that person understand Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਹ ਉਸ ਜਣੇ ਨੂੰ ਸਮਝਣ ਵਿੱਚ ਮਦਦ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: In all forms, He Himself is pervading.
simpleTranslation: In every form, He is present everywhere.
punjabiTranslation: ਹਰ ਰੂਪ ਵਿੱਚ, ਉਹ ਹਰਜਗ੍ਹਾ ਮੌਜੂਦ ਹੈ।

translation: Through all eyes, He Himself is watching.
simpleTranslation: Through all eyes, God is watching.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਰੇ ਨੈਨਾਂ ਰਾਹੀਂ, ਸਾਹਿਬ ਵੇਖ ਰਿਹਾ ਹੈ।

translation: All the creation is His Body.
simpleTranslation: Everything created is part of Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਰੀ ਬਣਾਵਟ ਉਸਦਾ ਹਿੱਸਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He Himself listens to His Own Praise.
simpleTranslation: He listens to His own praise.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਆਪਣੀ ਸਿਫ਼ਤ ਸੁਣਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: The One has created the drama of coming and going.
simpleTranslation: The One made this play of coming and going.
punjabiTranslation: ਇੱਕ ਨੇ ਆਉਣ ਅਤੇ ਜਾਣ ਦਾ ਖੇਲ ਬਣਾਇਆ।

translation: He made Maya subservient to His Will.
simpleTranslation: He made the illusion follow His command.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਨੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਨੂੰ ਆਪਣੀ ਬਾਤ ਮੰਨਣ ਲਈ ਬਣਾਇਆ।

translation: In the midst of all, He remains unattached.
simpleTranslation: In everything, He stays unbothered.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਭ ਵਿੱਚ, ਉਹ ਬਿਰਲੇ ਰਹਿੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: jo ikCu khxw su Awpy khY ]
unicode: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਹਣਾ ਸੁ ਆਪੇ ਕਹੈ ॥
transliteration: jo kichh kahanaa su aape kahai ||
translation: Whatever is said, He Himself says.
simpleTranslation: Whatever is said, God says it Himself.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਵੀ ਕਹਿੰਦੇ ਨੇ, ਉਹ ਆਪੇ ਕਹਿੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: By His Will we come, and by His Will we go.
simpleTranslation: We come by His wish, and we go by His wish.
punjabiTranslation: ਅਸੀਂ ਉਸ ਦੀ ਮਰਜ਼ੀ ਨਾਲ ਆਉਂਦੇ ਹਾਂ, ਅਤੇ ਉਸ ਦੀ ਮਰਜ਼ੀ ਨਾਲ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹਾਂ।

gurmukhi: nwnk jw BwvY qw ley smwie ]6]
unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਾ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਲਏ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੬॥
transliteration: naanak jaa bhaavai taa le samai ||6||
translation: O Nanak, when it pleases Him, then He absorbs us into Himself. ||6||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, when God wants, He brings us into Himself.
punjabiTranslation: ਹੇ ਨਾਨਕ, ਜਦੋਂ ਰੱਬ ਚਾਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ, ਤਾ ਸਾਨੂੰ ਆਪਣੇ ਥੱਲੇ ਸਮਾ ਲੈਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: ies qy hoie su nwhI burw ]
unicode: ਇਸ ਤੇ ਹੋਇ ਸੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਬੁਰਾ ॥
transliteration: eis te hoi su naahee buraa ||
translation: If it comes from Him, it cannot be bad.
simpleTranslation: If it comes from God, it can't be bad.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੇ ਇਹ ਪਰਮੇਸ਼ਰ ਤੋਂ ਆਇਆ ਹੈ, ਤਾਂ ਇਹ ਬੁਰਾ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੋ ਸਕਦਾ।

translation: Other than Him, who can do anything?
simpleTranslation: Besides Him, who can do anything?
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਤੋਂ ਬਿਨਾਂ, ਕੇਹੜਾ ਕੁਛ ਕਰ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ?

translation: He Himself is good; His actions are the very best.
simpleTranslation: He is good; His deeds are the best.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਚੰਗਾ ਹੈ; ਉਸ ਦੀਆਂ ਕਰਤੂਤਾਂ ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਚੰਗੀਆਂ ਨੇ।

translation: He Himself knows His Own Being.
simpleTranslation: He knows Himself fully.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਖੁਦ ਨੂੰ ਚੰਗੀ ਤਰ੍ਹਾਂ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He Himself is True, and all that He has established is True.
simpleTranslation: He is True, and everything He created is True.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸੱਚਾ ਹੈ, ਤੇ ਜੋ ਕੁਝ ਉਸ ਨੇ ਬਣਾਇਆ ਉਹ ਸੱਚਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Through and through, He is blended with His creation.
simpleTranslation: All around, He's mixed with what He created.
punjabiTranslation: ਹਰ ਇਕ ਪਾਸੇ, ਉਹ ਆਪਣੇ ਸਿਰਜੇ ਵਿਚ ਸਮਾਇਆ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: qw kI giq imiq khI n jwie ]
unicode: ਤਾ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਮਿਤਿ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
transliteration: taa kee gat mit kahee na jai ||
translation: His state and extent cannot be described.
simpleTranslation: You can't explain how great He is.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਮਹਾਨਤਾ ਦਾ ਬਿਆਨ ਨਹੀਂ ਕੀਤਾ ਜਾ ਸਕਦਾ।

translation: If there were another like Him, then only he could understand Him.
simpleTranslation: If there was another like Him, only they could understand Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੇ ਉਹਨਾ ਵਰਗਾ ਕੋਈ ਹੋਵੇ, ਤਾਂ ਕੇਵਲ ਉਹ ਹੀ ਸਮਝ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: His actions are all approved and accepted.
simpleTranslation: Everything He does is accepted and approved.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੇ ਇਕੇ ਸਾਰੇ ਪਰਵਾਨੇ ਹਨ।

translation: By Guru's Grace, O Nanak, this is known. ||7||
simpleTranslation: With God's blessing, O Nanak, this is understood. ||7||
punjabiTranslation: ਗੁਰਦਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦ ਨਾਲ, ਨਾਨਕ ਇਹ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਜਾਵੇ। ||੭||

gurmukhi: jo jwnY iqsu sdw suKu hoie ]
unicode: ਜੋ ਜਾਨੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
transliteration: jo jaanai tis sadhaa sukh hoi ||
translation: One who knows Him, obtains everlasting peace.
simpleTranslation: Whoever knows Him finds eternal peace.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਉਸਨੂੰ ਜਾਣਦਾ, ਉਹ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਂਦਾ।

translation: God blends that one into Himself.
simpleTranslation: God brings that person close to Himself.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਉਸ ਨੂੰ ਆਪਣੇ ਨਾਲ ਜੋੜਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He is wealth and prosperous, and of noble birth.
simpleTranslation: He is rich and successful, of great family.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਧਨਵੰਤ ਤੇ ਕਾਮਯਾਬ, ਵਧੀਆ ਪਰਿਵਾਰ ਵਾਲਾ।

translation: He is Jivan Mukta - liberated while yet alive; the Lord God abides in his heart.
simpleTranslation: He is free while living; God lives in his heart.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਜੀਵਨ ਵਿਚ ਮੁਕਤ ਹੈ; ਸੱਚਾ ਰੱਬ ਉਸ ਦੇ ਦਿਲ ਵਿਚ ਹੈ।

translation: Blessed, blessed, blessed is the coming of that humble being;
simpleTranslation: So blessed, so blessed, so blessed is the arrival of that humble person;
punjabiTranslation: ਬਹੁਤ ਧੰਨ, ਬਹੁਤ ਧੰਨ, ਬਹੁਤ ਧੰਨ ਹੈ ਉਸ ਨਿਮ੍ਰਤ ਜਨ ਦਾ ਆਉਣਾ;

translation: by his grace, the whole world is saved.
simpleTranslation: With his kindness, the whole world is saved.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਮੇਹਰ ਨਾਲ, ਸਾਰਾ ਜਗਤ ਤਰ ਗਿਆ।

translation: This is his purpose in life;
simpleTranslation: This is why we come into life;
punjabiTranslation: ਅਸੀਂ ਜੀਵਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਕਿਉਂ ਆਉਂਦੇ ਹਾਂ;

gurmukhi: jn kY sMig iciq AwvY nwau ]
unicode: ਜਨ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਚਿਤਿ ਆਵੈ ਨਾਉ ॥
transliteration: jan kai sa(n)g chit aavai naau ||
translation: in the Company of this humble servant, the Lord's Name comes to mind.
simpleTranslation: Being around this humble friend, I remember God's name.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਸ ਨਿਮਾਣੇ ਦੋਸਤ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ ਰਹਿਣ ਤੇ, ਜੇਹੇ ਦਾ ਨਾਮ ਯਾਦ ਆਉਂਦਾ।

translation: He Himself is liberated, and He liberates the universe.
simpleTranslation: He is free Himself and sets the world free.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਆਪ ਮੁਕਤ ਹੈ ਤੇ ਸਾਰੀ ਦੁਨੀਆਂ ਨੂੰ ਆਜ਼ਾਦ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: nwnk iqsu jn kau sdw nmskwru ]8]23]
unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਸਦਾ ਨਮਸਕਾਰੁ ॥੮॥੨੩॥
transliteration: naanak tis jan kau sadhaa namasakaar ||8||23||
translation: O Nanak, to that humble servant, I bow in reverence forever. ||8||23||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, I bow to that humble servant forever.
punjabiTranslation: ਹੇ ਨਾਨਕ, ਮੈਂ ਉਸ ਨਮਰ ਅ ਖ਼ਿਅਤਾ ਨੂੰ ਸਦਾ ਨਮਸਕਾਰ ਕਰਦਾ ਹਾਂ।

translation: Shalok:
simpleTranslation: Verse:
punjabiTranslation: ਬੋਲ:

gurmukhi: pUrw pRBu AwrwiDAw pUrw jw kw nwau ]
unicode: ਪੂਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਰਾਧਿਆ ਪੂਰਾ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
transliteration: pooraa prabh aaraadhiaa pooraa jaa kaa naau ||
translation: I worship and adore the Perfect Lord God. Perfect is His Name.
simpleTranslation: I praise and love the Perfect God. Perfect is His Name.
punjabiTranslation: ਮੈਂ ਪੂਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਦੀ ਸਾਜ਼ ਸਾਜ਼ਾਂਵਾਂ। ਉਸਦਾ ਨਾਂ ਪੂਰਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: nwnk pUrw pwieAw pUry ky gun gwau ]1]
unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਉ ॥੧॥
transliteration: naanak pooraa paiaa poore ke gun gaau ||1||
translation: O Nanak, I have obtained the Perfect One; I sing the Glorious Praises of the Perfect Lord. ||1||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, I found the Perfect One; I sing the praises of the Perfect God. ||1||
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ, ਮੈਂ ਪੂਰੇ ਨੂੰ ਪਾਇਆ; ਮੈਂ ਪੂਰੇ ਦੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉਂਦਾ ਹਾਂ। ||1||

translation: Ashtapadee:
simpleTranslation: Eight Verses:
punjabiTranslation: ਅੱਠ ਬੰਦਾਂ:

translation: Listen to the Teachings of the Perfect Guru;
simpleTranslation: Listen to the teachings of the perfect God;
punjabiTranslation: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰੂ ਦੀਆਂ ਸਿਖਿਆਵਾਂ ਸੁਣੋ;

translation: see the Supreme Lord God near you.
simpleTranslation: See God right beside you.
punjabiTranslation: ਰੱਬ ਨੂੰ ਤੇਰੇ ਕੋਲ ਵੇਖ।

translation: With each and every breath, meditate in remembrance on the Lord of the Universe,
simpleTranslation: With every breath, remember the God of the Universe.
punjabiTranslation: ਹਰ ਸਾਸ ਨਾਲ ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਨੂੰ ਯਾਦ ਕਰੋ।

translation: and the anxiety within your mind shall depart.
simpleTranslation: And your worries will fade away.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇਰੀਆਂ ਚਿੰਤਾਵਾਂ ਦੂਰ ਹੋ ਜਾਣਗੀਆਂ।

translation: Abandon the waves of fleeting desire,
simpleTranslation: Let go of the waves of temporary wants.
punjabiTranslation: ਟਾਈਮ ਵਾਲੀਆਂ ਖ਼ਵਾਹਿਸ਼ਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਛੱਡ ਦੇ ਅ।

gurmukhi: sMq jnw kI DUir mn mMg ]
unicode: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੀ ਧੂਰਿ ਮਨ ਮੰਗ ॥
transliteration: sa(n)t janaa kee dhoor man ma(n)g ||
translation: and pray for the dust of the feet of the Saints.
simpleTranslation: And ask for the dust from the feet of the Saints.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇ ਸੰਤਾਂ ਦੇ ਪੈਰਾਂ ਦੀ ਧੂੜ ਮੰਗਦੇ ਹਾਂ।

translation: Renounce your selfishness and conceit and offer your prayers.
simpleTranslation: Let go of your selfishness and pride and pray.
punjabiTranslation: ਆਪਣੀ ਖੁਦਗਰਜੀ ਅਤੇ ਘਮਂਂਂਂਡ ਖ਼ਤਮ ਕਰਕੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਰਥਨਾ ਕਰੋ।

translation: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, cross over the ocean of fire.
simpleTranslation: In the company of the holy ones, get past the ocean of fire.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤ ਵਿੱਚ, ਸਾਥੀਆਂ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ, ਅਗਨ ਦੇ ਸਮੁੰਦਰ ਤੋਂ ਪਾਰ ਹੋ ਜਾਓ।

gurmukhi: hir Dn ky Bir lyhu BMfwr ]
unicode: ਹਰਿ ਧਨ ਕੇ ਭਰਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥
transliteration: har dhan ke bhar leh bha(n)ddaar ||
translation: Fill your stores with the wealth of the Lord.
simpleTranslation: Fill your life with the blessings of God.
punjabiTranslation: ਆਪਣੀ ਜ਼ਿੰਦਗੀ ਵਿੱਚ ਰੱਬ ਦੇ ਦਾਤਾਂ ਭਰ ਲੋ।

translation: Nanak bows in humility and reverence to the Perfect Guru. ||1||
simpleTranslation: Nanak bows with respect to the Perfect Guru. ||1||
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੂਰੇ ਗਰੀ ਨੂੰ ਸਲਾਮ ਕਰਦਾ ॥੧॥

translation: Happiness, intuitive peace, poise and bliss
simpleTranslation: Joy, calmness, balance, and happiness.
punjabiTranslation: ਖੁਸ਼ੀ, ਸ਼ਾਂਤੀ, ਸੰਤੋਲਨ, ਅਤੇ ਆਨੰਦ।

translation: in the Company of the Holy, meditate on the Lord of supreme bliss.
simpleTranslation: In the company of the holy, remember God who brings the highest joy.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਵਿੱਤਰਾਂ ਦੀ ਸੰਗਤ ਵਿੱਚ, ਉੱਥੇ ਪਰਮ ਖੁਸ਼ੀ ਵਾਲੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਨੂੰ ਯਾਦ ਕਰੋ।

translation: You shall be spared from hell - save your soul!
simpleTranslation: You'll be saved from hell - protect your soul!
punjabiTranslation: ਤੈਨੂੰ ਨਰਕ ਤੋਂ ਬਚਾਇਆ ਜਾਵੇਗਾ - ਆਪਣੀ ਆਤਮਾ ਦੀ ਰੱਖਿਆ ਕਰ!

translation: Drink in the ambrosial essence of the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe.
simpleTranslation: Savor the sweet essence of the Lord's glorious praises.
punjabiTranslation: ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਦੇ ਮਿਠੇ ਰਸ ਨੂੰ ਪੀਉ।

translation: Focus your consciousness on the One, the All-pervading Lord
simpleTranslation: Focus your mind on the One, the all-around God.
punjabiTranslation: ਆਪਣੀ ਸੋਚ ਇੱਕ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰ 'ਤੇ ਰੱਖੋ।

gurmukhi: eyk rUp jw ky rMg Anyk ]
unicode: ਏਕ ਰੂਪ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਰੰਗ ਅਨੇਕ ॥
transliteration: ek roop jaa ke ra(n)g anek ||
translation: He has One Form, but He has many manifestations.
simpleTranslation: He has one form, but many ways of showing it.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦਾ ਇਕ ਰੂਪ ਹਨ ਪਰ ਵੱਖ-ਵੱਖ ਢੰਗ ਹਨ।

translation: Sustainer of the Universe, Lord of the world, Kind to the poor,
simpleTranslation: The one who supports the universe, God of the world, kind to the needy.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੰਸਾਰ ਦਾ ਸਹਾਰਾ, ਦੁਨੀਆ ਦਾ ਰੱਬ, ਗਰੀਬਾਂ ਲਈ ਦਇਆਲ।

translation: Destroyer of sorrow, perfectly Merciful.
simpleTranslation: He removes our pain, so compassionate.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਗੇ ਦੇ ਦੁੱਖ ਖਤਮ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲਾ, ਬਹੁਤ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲਾ।

translation: Meditate, meditate in remembrance on the Naam, again and again.
simpleTranslation: Think of the Name, think of it again and again.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਮ ਦਾ ਸੋਚੋ, ਫਿਰ ਫਿਰ ਸੋਚੋ।

translation: O Nanak, it is the Support of the soul. ||2||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, it's the support for the soul. ||2||
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਇਹ ਜੀਅ ਦਾ ਸਹਾਰਾ ਹੈ। ||੨||

translation: The most sublime hymns are the Words of the Holy.
simpleTranslation: The best songs are the words of the Holy.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਵਧੀਆ ਗੀਤ ਸਾਡੇ ਸੰਤਾਂ ਦੇ ਬਚਨ ਹਨ।

translation: These are priceless rubies and gems.
simpleTranslation: These are priceless jewels and gems.
punjabiTranslation: ਏਹ ਅਮੂਲੀ ਰਤਨ ਅਤੇ ਜਹਰਾਤ।

translation: One who listens and acts on them is saved.
simpleTranslation: If you listen and act, you will be saved.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੇ ਤੁਸੀਂ ਸੁਣੋ ਅਤੇ ਕਰੋ, ਤਾਂ ਤੁਸੀਂ ਉਦਾਰ ਹੋਜਾਂਗੇ।

translation: He himself swims across, and saves others as well.
simpleTranslation: He swims to safety himself and helps others too.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਖੁਦ ਤਰ ਕੇ ਹੋਰਾਂ ਦੀ ਵੀ مدد ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: sPl jIvnu sPlu qw kw sMgu ]
unicode: ਸਫਲ ਜੀਵਨੁ ਸਫਲੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਸੰਗੁ ॥
transliteration: safal jeevan safal taa kaa sa(n)g ||
translation: His life is prosperous, and his company is fruitful;
simpleTranslation: His life is successful, and his friendships are rewarding;
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦਾ ਜੀਵਨ ਸਫਲ ਤੇ ਦੋਸਤੀ ਫਲਦਾਇਕ ਹੈ;

gurmukhi: jw kY min lwgw hir rMgu ]
unicode: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਲਾਗਾ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ॥
transliteration: jaa kai man laagaa har ra(n)g ||
translation: his mind is imbued with the love of the Lord.
simpleTranslation: His mind is filled with love for God.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦਾ ਮਨ ਰੱਬ ਦੇ ਪਿਆਰ ਨਾਲ ਭਰਿਆ ਹੈ।

translation: Hail, hail to him, for whom the sound current of the Shabad vibrates.
simpleTranslation: Hail to the one, for whom the Shabad resonates.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੈ ਜੈ ਉਸਦੇ ਲਈ, ਜਿਸ ਲਈ ਸਬਦ ਗੂੰਜਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: suin suin And kry pRBu gwjY ]
unicode: ਸੁਨਿ ਸੁਨਿ ਅਨਦ ਕਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਗਾਜੈ ॥
transliteration: sun sun anadh kare prabh gaajai ||
translation: Hearing it again and again, he is in bliss, proclaiming God's Praises.
simpleTranslation: Listening over and over, he's in joy, singing God’s praises.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੁਣਦੇ ਰਹਿੰਦਾ, ਉਹ ਖੁਸ਼ ਹੈ, ਪਰਮੇਸ਼ਰ ਦੀਆਂ ਚਾਅਆਂ ਕਰਦਾ।

translation: The Lord radiates from the foreheads of the Holy.
simpleTranslation: God shines from the foreheads of the holy ones.
punjabiTranslation: ਇੱਕ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਸੂਝ ਦੇ ਦਰਸ਼ਨਾਂ ਵਾਲ਼ੇ ਤੋਂ ਚਮਕਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Nanak is saved in their company. ||3||
simpleTranslation: Nanak is safe with their company. ||3||
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ ਉਹਨਾਂ ਦੇ ਸਾਥ ਨਾਲ ਸੁਰੱਖਿਅਤ ਹੈ। ||੩||

translation: Hearing that He can give Sanctuary, I have come seeking His Sanctuary.
simpleTranslation: Hearing that He offers safety, I have come looking for His shelter.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਹ ਸੁਣਕੇ ਕਿ ਉਹ ਸੁਰੱਖਿਆ ਦੇਂਦਾ, ਮੈਂ ਉਸਦੀ ਸ਼ਰਨ ਲੈਣ ਆਇਆ।

translation: Bestowing His Mercy, God has blended me with Himself.
simpleTranslation: By showing kindness, God has united me with Him.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ, ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਨੇ ਮੈਨੂੰ ਆਪਣੇ ਨਾਲ ਜੋੜਿਆ।

gurmukhi: imit gey bYr Bey sB ryn ]
unicode: ਮਿਟਿ ਗਏ ਬੈਰ ਭਏ ਸਭ ਰੇਨ ॥
transliteration: miT ge bair bhe sabh ren ||
translation: Hatred is gone, and I have become the dust of all.
simpleTranslation: Hatred is gone, and I am now part of everyone.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਫ਼ਰਤ ਚਲੀ ਗਈ, ਤੇ ਮੈਂ ਹੁਣ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਦਾ ਹਿੱਸਾ ਹਾਂ।

translation: I have received the Ambrosial Naam in the Company of the Holy.
simpleTranslation: I have found the blessed name with good company.
punjabiTranslation: ਮੈਂ ਚੰਗੀ ਸੰਗਤ ਵਿੱਚ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮ ਲਿਆ ਹੈ।

translation: The Divine Guru is perfectly pleased;
simpleTranslation: The Divine Guru is totally happy;
punjabiTranslation: ਦਿਵਿਆ ਗੁਰੂ ਬਹੁਤ ਖੁਸ਼ ਹਨ;

translation: the service of His servant has been rewarded.
simpleTranslation: The service of His servant has been rewarded.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਦੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਦਾ ਇਨਾਮ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਹੈ।

translation: I have been released from worldly entanglements and corruption,
simpleTranslation: I'm free from all the mess and bad stuff,
punjabiTranslation: ਮੈਂ ਸਾਰੇ ਜੰਜਾਲ ਅਤੇ ਖਰਾਬੀ ਤੋਂ ਮੁਕਤ ਹਾਂ,

translation: hearing the Lord's Name and chanting it with my tongue.
simpleTranslation: Listening to God's Name and saying it with my voice.
punjabiTranslation: ਰੱਬ ਦਾ ਨਾਮ ਸੁਣ ਕੇ ਆਪਣੀ ਜ਼ਬਾਨ ਨਾਲ ਕਹਿਣਾ।

translation: By His Grace, God has bestowed His Mercy.
simpleTranslation: By His kindness, God has shown His mercy.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦੀ ਮਿਹਰ ਨਾਲ, ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਨੇ ਆਪਣੀ ਦਇਆ ਦਿਖਾਈ।

translation: O Nanak, my merchandise has arrived save and sound. ||4||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, my goods have arrived safe and sound. ||4||
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਮੇਰੀ ਸਮਾਨ ਸੁਰੱਖਿਅਤ ਆ ਗਿਆ ॥੪॥

gurmukhi: pRB kI ausqiq krhu sMq mIq ]
unicode: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਸੰਤ ਮੀਤ ॥
transliteration: prabh kee usatat karahu sa(n)t meet ||
translation: Sing the Praises of God, O Saints, O friends,
simpleTranslation: Praise God, O Saints, O friends,
punjabiTranslation: ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਦੀ ਸਿਫ਼ਤ ਕਰੋ, ਸਾਂਤੋ, ਮੀਤੋ,

translation: with total concentration and one-pointedness of mind.
simpleTranslation: With complete focus and a clear mind.
punjabiTranslation: ਪੂਰੀ ਧਿਆਨ ਅਤੇ ਸਾਫ ਮਨ ਨਾਲ।

translation: Sukhmani is the peaceful ease, the Glory of God, the Naam.
simpleTranslation: Sukhmani is peaceful bliss, the glory of God, the Name.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੁਖਮਨੀ ਪੇਸ਼ ਆਪਣਾ ਆਰਾਮ, ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਦੀ ਸ਼ਾਨ, ਨਾਮ।

gurmukhi: ijsu min bsY su hoq inDwn ]
unicode: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਬਸੈ ਸੁ ਹੋਤ ਨਿਧਾਨ ॥
transliteration: jis man basai su hot nidhaan ||
translation: When it abides in the mind, one becomes wealthy.
simpleTranslation: When it resides in your mind, you become rich.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਦੋਂ ਇਹ ਮਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਰਹਿੰਦਾ ਹੈ, ਤਦੋਂ ਤੁਸੀਂ ਅਮੀਰ ਹੋ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹੋ।

gurmukhi: srb ieCw qw kI pUrn hoie ]
unicode: ਸਰਬ ਇਛਾ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
transliteration: sarab ichhaa taa kee pooran hoi ||
translation: All desires are fulfilled.
simpleTranslation: All wishes come true.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਭ ਇਛਾਵਾਂ ਪੂਰੀਆਂ ਹੁੰਦੀਆਂ ਹਨ।

translation: One becomes the most respected person, famous all over the world.
simpleTranslation: One becomes a respected figure, known everywhere.
punjabiTranslation: ਇੱਕ ਆਦਮੀ ਸੋਹਣਾ, ਹਰ ਥਾਂ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He obtains the highest place of all.
simpleTranslation: He reaches the highest position of all.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਸਭ ਤੋਂ ਉੱਚਾ ਸਥਾਨ ਪਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: He does not come and go in reincarnation any longer.
simpleTranslation: He doesn't come and go in rebirth anymore.

translation: One who departs, after earning the wealth of the Lord's Name,
simpleTranslation: The person who leaves after earning the wealth of God's Name.

translation: O Nanak, realizes it. ||5||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, understands this. ||5||

simpleTranslation: Comfort, peace, and calm. Wealth and nine treasures.

simpleTranslation: Wisdom, knowledge, and all spiritual gifts;

translation: learning, penance, Yoga and meditation on God;
simpleTranslation: Studying, self-discipline, Yoga, and focusing on God;

translation: The most sublime wisdom and purifying baths;
simpleTranslation: The best knowledge and cleansing rituals;

translation: the four cardinal blessings, the opening of the heart-lotus;
simpleTranslation: The four great blessings, the heart fully opened;

simpleTranslation: To see everyone equally and recognize only the One.

simpleTranslation: Whoever meditates on this treasure in their mind.

simpleTranslation: In it is the greatness of God, the Name, the singing of Gurbani.

simpleTranslation: Second Guru:
punjabiTranslation: ਦੂਜਾ ਗੁਰੂ:

gurmukhi: jy sau cMdw augvih sUrj cVih hjwr ]
unicode: ਜੇ ਸਉ ਚੰਦਾ ਉਗਵਹਿ ਸੂਰਜ ਚੜਹਿ ਹਜਾਰ ॥
transliteration: je sau cha(n)dhaa ugaveh sooraj chaReh hajaar ||
translation: If a hundred moons were to rise, and a thousand suns appeared,
simpleTranslation: If a hundred moons shone, and a thousand suns appeared,
punjabiTranslation: ਜੇ ਸੌ ਚੰਨ ਉਗਦੇ, ਸੱਤ ਸੂਰਜ ਚੜ੍ਹਦੇ,

gurmukhi: eyqy cwnx hoidAW gur ibnu Gor AMDwr ]2]
unicode: ਏਤੇ ਚਾਨਣ ਹੋਦਿਆਂ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਘੋਰ ਅੰਧਾਰ ॥੨॥
transliteration: ete chaanan hodhiaa(n) gur bin ghor a(n)dhaar ||2||
translation: even with such light, there would still be pitch darkness without the Guru. ||2||
simpleTranslation: Even with all this light, it would still be dark without the Guru. ||2||
punjabiTranslation: ਇਨਾ ਚਾਨਣ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ ਵੀ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨਾ ਘੂਰਨੀ ਹਨੀਰ ॥੨॥

translation: First Mehla:
simpleTranslation: First Guru:
punjabiTranslation: ਪਹਿਲਾ ਗੁਰੂ:

gurmukhi: nwnk gurU n cyqnI min AwpxY sucyq ]
unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰੂ ਨ ਚੇਤਨੀ ਮਨਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਸੁਚੇਤ ॥
transliteration: naanak guroo na chetanee man aapanai suchet ||
translation: O Nanak, those who do not think of the Guru, and who think of themselves as clever,
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, those who ignore the Guru and think they are smart,
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਜੋ ਗੁਰੂ ਨੂੰ ਨਹੀਂ ਸੋਚਦੇ ਅਤੇ ਆਪਣੇ ਆਪ ਨੂੰ ਚਤੁਰ ਸਮਝਦੇ,

gurmukhi: Cuty iql bUAwV ijau suM\y AMdir Kyq ]
unicode: ਛੁਟੇ ਤਿਲ ਬੂਆੜ ਜਿਉ ਸੁੰਞੇ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਖੇਤ ॥
transliteration: chhuTe til booaaR jiau su(n)n(j)e a(n)dhar khet ||
translation: shall be left abandoned in the field, like the scattered sesame.
simpleTranslation: Will be left all alone in the field, like scattered sesame seeds.
punjabiTranslation: ਖੇਤ ਵਿੱਚ ਜਿਉਂ ਛੁਟੇ ਤਿਲ, ਅਕੇਲੇ ਛੱਡੀਆਂ ਹੋਵਾਂਗੇ।

gurmukhi: KyqY AMdir CuitAw khu nwnk sau nwh ]
unicode: ਖੇਤੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਛੁਟਿਆ ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਉ ਨਾਹ ॥
transliteration: khetai a(n)dhar chhuTiaa kahu naanak sau naeh ||
translation: They are abandoned in the field, says Nanak, and they have a hundred masters to please.
simpleTranslation: They feel lost in life, says Nanak, trying to please many leaders.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਜੀਵਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਖੋਏ ਹੋਏ ਹਨ, ਨਾਨਕ ਕਹਿੰਦਾ ਹੈ, ਬਹੁਤ ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਨੂੰ ਖੁਸ਼ ਕਰਨ ਦੀ ਕੋਸ਼ਿਸ਼ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: PlIAih PulIAih bpuVy BI qn ivic suAwh ]3]
unicode: ਫਲੀਅਹਿ ਫੁਲੀਅਹਿ ਬਪੁੜੇ ਭੀ ਤਨ ਵਿਚਿ ਸੁਆਹ ॥੩॥
transliteration: fale'eeh fule'eeh bapuRe bhee tan vich suaaeh ||3||
translation: The wretches bear fruit and flower, but within their bodies, they are filled with ashes. ||3||
simpleTranslation: The miserable ones bear fruit and flowers, but inside they are just ashes. ||3||
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਬੇਵਕੂਫ ਹਨ, ਉਹ ਫਲ ਅਤੇ ਪੂਤਾਂ ਉਗਾਉਂਦੇ ਹਨ, ਪਰ ਅੰਦਰ ਸਿਰਫ ਸੁਆਹ ਹੀ ਹੁੰਦੀ ਹੈ। ||3||

translation: Pauree:
simpleTranslation: Stanza:
punjabiTranslation: ਸਤਰ:

gurmukhi: AwpIn@Y Awpu swijE AwpIn@Y ricE nwau ]
unicode: ਆਪੀਨੑੈ ਆਪੁ ਸਾਜਿਓ ਆਪੀਨੑੈ ਰਚਿਓ ਨਾਉ ॥
transliteration: aapeen(h)ai aap saajio aapeen(h)ai rachio naau ||
translation: He Himself created Himself; He Himself assumed His Name.
simpleTranslation: He created Himself; He gave Himself a name.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਨੇ ਆਪ ਨੂੰ ਬਣਾਇਆ; ਉਸਨੇ ਆਪ ਨੂੰ ਨਾਮ ਦਿਤਾ।

gurmukhi: duXI kudriq swjIAY kir Awsxu ifTo cwau ]
unicode: ਦੁਯੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਸਾਜੀਐ ਕਰਿ ਆਸਣੁ ਡਿਠੋ ਚਾਉ ॥
transliteration: dhuyee kudharat saajeeaai kar aasan ddiTho chaau ||
translation: Secondly, He fashioned the creation; seated within the creation, He beholds it with delight.
simpleTranslation: Then, He made the world; sitting within it, He enjoys what He sees.
punjabiTranslation: ਫਿਰ, ਉਸ ਨੇ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਬਣਾਈ; ਇਸ ਵਿੱਚ ਬੈਠ ਕੇ, ਉਹ ਜੋ ਦੇਖਦਾ ਹੈ, ਉਸ ਦਾ ਮਜ਼ਾ ਲੈਂਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: dwqw krqw Awip qUM quis dyvih krih pswau ]
unicode: ਦਾਤਾ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪਿ ਤੂੰ ਤੁਸਿ ਦੇਵਹਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਪਸਾਉ ॥
transliteration: dhaataa karataa aap too(n) tus dheveh kareh pasaau ||
translation: You Yourself are the Giver and the Creator; by Your Pleasure, You bestow Your Mercy.
simpleTranslation: You are the Giver and the Creator; by Your wish, You show Your kindness.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੂੰ ਦਾਤਾ ਤੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਹੈ; ਤੇਰੀ ਇਚਛਾ ਨਾਲ, ਤੂੰ ਆਪਣੀ ਮਿਹਰ ਦਿਖਾਉਂਦਾ ਹੈਂ।

gurmukhi: qUM jwxoeI sBsY dy lYsih ijMdu kvwau ]
unicode: ਤੂੰ ਜਾਣੋਈ ਸਭਸੈ ਦੇ ਲੈਸਹਿ ਜਿੰਦੁ ਕਵਾਉ ॥
transliteration: too(n) jaanoiee sabhasai dhe laiseh ji(n)dh kavaau ||
translation: You are the Knower of all; You give life, and take it away again with a word.
simpleTranslation: You know everything; You give life and take it back with just a word.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੂੰ ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਜਾਣਦਾ; ਤੂੰ ਜਿੰਦਗੀ ਦਿੰਦਾ ਅਤੇ ਇਕ ਸ਼ब्द ਨਾਲ ਵਾਪਸ ਲੈਂਦਾ।

translation: Seated within the creation, You behold it with delight. ||1||
simpleTranslation: You see the world with joy, while being in it. ||1||
punjabiTranslation: ਤੂੰ ਸ੍ਰਿਸ਼ਟੀ ਵਿੱਚ ਖੁਸੀ ਨਾਲ ਵੇਖਦਾ ਹੈਂ। ||1||

gurmukhi: hir pRym bwxI mnu mwirAw AxIAwly AxIAw rwm rwjy ]
unicode: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਬਾਣੀ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰਿਆ ਅਣੀਆਲੇ ਅਣੀਆ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਜੇ ॥
transliteration: har prem baanee man maariaa aneeaale aneeaa raam raaje ||
translation: The Bani of the Lord's Love is the pointed arrow, which has pierced my mind, O Lord King.
simpleTranslation: The Lord’s love is like a sharp arrow that hit my mind, O God King.
punjabiTranslation: ਹਰਿ ਦਾ ਪਿਆਰ ਇੱਕ ਤੇਜ਼ ਤਿਰਕਾ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਨੂੰ ਚੁਭ ਗਿਆ, ਰਾਮ ਰਾਜੇ।

gurmukhi: ijsu lwgI pIr iprMm kI so jwxY jrIAw ]
unicode: ਜਿਸੁ ਲਾਗੀ ਪੀਰ ਪਿਰੰਮ ਕੀ ਸੋ ਜਾਣੈ ਜਰੀਆ ॥
transliteration: jis laagee peer pira(n)m kee so jaanai jareeaa ||
translation: Only those who feel the pain of this love, know how to endure it.
simpleTranslation: Only those who feel this love's pain, know how to handle it.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਿਸਨੂੰ ਇਸ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਦੀ ਦਰਦ ਲੱਗਦੀ ਹੈ, ਉਹੀ ਇਹਨੂੰ ਸਹਿਣਾ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: jIvn mukiq so AwKIAY mir jIvY mrIAw ]
unicode: ਜੀਵਨ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਸੋ ਆਖੀਐ ਮਰਿ ਜੀਵੈ ਮਰੀਆ ॥
transliteration: jeevan mukat so aakheeaai mar jeevai mareeaa ||
translation: Those who die, and remain dead while yet alive, are said to be Jivan Mukta, liberated while yet alive.
simpleTranslation: Those who let go of their worries while still alive are called free while living.
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਜੀਦੇ ਜੀ ਰਹਿੰਦੇ ਹਨ ਫਿਕਰ ਛੱਡ ਕੇ, ਉਹ ਜੀਵਨ ਮੁਕਤ ਆਖੇ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: jn nwnk siqguru myil hir jgu duqru qrIAw ]2]
unicode: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਗੁ ਦੁਤਰੁ ਤਰੀਆ ॥੨॥
transliteration: jan naanak satigur mel har jag dhutar tareeaa ||2||
translation: O Lord, unite servant Nanak with the True Guru, that he may cross over the terrifying world-ocean. ||2||
simpleTranslation: O God, unite servant Nanak with the True Guru, so he can cross this scary world. ||2||
punjabiTranslation: ਹੇ ਰੱਬ, ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨੂੰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਨਾਲ ਜੋੜ, ਤਾਂ ਜੋ ਉਹ ਇਸ ਡਰਾਉਣੀ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਤੋں ਪਾਰ ਜਾ ਸਕੇ। ||੨||

translation: Shalok, First Mehla:
simpleTranslation: Shalok, First Voice:
punjabiTranslation: ਸਲੋਕ, ਪਹਿਲੀ ਵੌਇਸ:

translation: True are Your worlds, True are Your solar Systems.
simpleTranslation: Your worlds are real, Your solar systems are real.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇਰੇ ਖੰਡ ਸੱਚੇ, ਤੇਰੇ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡ ਸੱਚੇ।

translation: True are Your realms, True is Your creation.
simpleTranslation: Your worlds are true, Your creation is true.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇਰੇ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡ ਸੱਚੇ ਨੇ, ਤੇਰਾ ਸਿਰਜਣਾ ਸੱਚਾ ਹੈ।

translation: True are Your actions, and all Your deliberations.
simpleTranslation: Your actions are true, and your thoughts are wise.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇਰੇ ਕਰਨ ਸਚੇ ਨੇ, ਤੇਰੇ ਵਿਚਾਰ ਗਿਆਨਮਈ ਨੇ।

translation: True is Your Command, and True is Your Court.
simpleTranslation: Your command is true, and your court is true.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇਰਾ ਹੁਕਮ ਸੱਚਾ, ਤੇਰੀ ਦਰਬਾਰ ਸੱਚਾ।

translation: True is the Command of Your Will, True is Your Order.
simpleTranslation: True is Your command, true is Your order.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੱਚਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਹੁਕਮ, ਸੱਚਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਫੁਰਮਾਣ।

translation: True is Your Mercy, True is Your Insignia.
simpleTranslation: Your mercy is real, Your sign is real.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇਰਾ کرਮ ਸੱਚ ਹੈ, ਤੇਰੀ ਨੀਸਾਣ ਸੱਚ ਹੈ।

translation: Hundreds of thousands and millions call You True.
simpleTranslation: Hundreds of thousands and millions call You true.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੰਖਿਆ ਲੱਖਾਂ ਅਤੇ ਕਰੋੜਾਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਸਭ ਤੈਨੂੰ ਸੱਚੇ ਆਖਦੇ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: scY siB qwix scY siB joir ]
unicode: ਸਚੈ ਸਭਿ ਤਾਣਿ ਸਚੈ ਸਭਿ ਜੋਰਿ ॥
transliteration: sachai sabh taan sachai sabh jor ||
translation: In the True Lord is all power, in the True Lord is all might.
simpleTranslation: In the True God is all strength, in the True God is all power.
punjabiTranslation: ਸੱਚੇ ਪਰਮੇਸ਼ਰ ਵਿੱਚ ਸਾਰੀ ਤਾਕਤ, ਸੱਚੇ ਪਰਮੇਸ਼ਰ ਵਿੱਚ ਸਾਰੀ ਸ਼ਕਤਿ।

translation: True is Your Praise, True is Your Adoration.
simpleTranslation: Your praise is true, your worship is true.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇਰੀ ਸਿਫਤ ਸੱਚੀ, ਤੇਰੀ ਪੂਜਾ ਸੱਚੀ ਹੈ।

translation: True is Your almighty creative power, True King.
simpleTranslation: Your true power is amazing, true King.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇਰੀ ਸੱਚੀ ਸ਼ਕਤੀ ਜ਼ਬਰਦਸਤ ਹੈ, ਸੱਚੇ ਪਾਤਿਸ਼ਾਹ।

translation: O Nanak, true are those who meditate on the True One.
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, true are those who think of the True One.
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਸੱਚ ਉਹ ਹਨ ਜੋ ਸੱਚ ਦਾ ਧਿਆਨ ਰੱਖਦੇ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: jo mir jMmy su kcu inkcu ]1]
unicode: ਜੋ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੇ ਸੁ ਕਚੁ ਨਿਕਚੁ ॥੧॥
transliteration: jo mar ja(n)me su kach nikach ||1||
translation: Those who are subject to birth and death are totally false. ||1||
simpleTranslation: People who are born and die are completely false. ||1||
punjabiTranslation: ਜੋ ਜਨਮ ਲੈਂਦੇ ਤੇ ਮਰਦੇ ਹਨ, ਉਹ ਸੱਚੇ ਨਹੀਂ। ॥੧॥

translation: First Mehla:
simpleTranslation: First Guru:
punjabiTranslation: ਪਹਿਲਾ ਗੁਰੂ:

translation: Great is His greatness, as great as His Name.
simpleTranslation: His greatness is so big, just like His Name.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਬਹੁਤ ਵੱਡੀ, ਜਿਵੇਂ ਉਸਦਾ ਨਾਉ।

translation: Great is His greatness, as True is His justice.
simpleTranslation: His greatness is immense, just like His fairness.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਬਹੁਤ ਹੈ, ਜਿਵੇਂ ਕਿ ਉਸਦਾ ਨਿਆਉ।

translation: Great is His greatness, as permanent as His Throne.
simpleTranslation: His greatness is huge, as steady as His throne.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਬਹੁਤ ਹੈ, ਉਸਦੇ ਥਾਂ ਵਾਂਗ਼ ਕਰਾਰ।

translation: Great is His greatness, as He knows our utterances.
simpleTranslation: His greatness is huge, He knows what we say.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਬਹੁਤ ਹੈ, ਉਹ ਸਾਡੇੁ ਬੋਲ ਜਾਣਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Great is His greatness, as He understands all our affections.
simpleTranslation: His greatness is amazing, as He knows all our feelings.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਬਹੁਤ ਹੈ, ਜਿਥੇ ਉਹ ਸਾਡੇ ਸਾਰੇ ਜਜ਼ਬਾਤ ਸਮਝਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: vfI vifAweI jw puiC n dwiq ]
unicode: ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਜਾ ਪੁਛਿ ਨ ਦਾਤਿ ॥
transliteration: vaddee vaddiaaiee jaa puchh na dhaat ||
translation: Great is His greatness, as He gives without being asked.
simpleTranslation: His greatness is amazing, as He gives without being asked.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਵੱਡੀ ਹੈ, ਉਹ ਬਿਨਾ ਪੁੱਛੇ ਦਿੰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Great is His greatness, as He Himself is all-in-all.
simpleTranslation: His greatness is amazing, because He is everything.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਬਹੁਤ ਹੈ, ਕਿਉਂਕਿ ਉਹ ਸਾਰਾ ਕੁਝ ਹੈ।

translation: O Nanak, His actions cannot be described.
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, His deeds can't be told.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਸ ਦੇ ਕੰਮਾਂ ਦੀ ਗੱਲ ਨਹੀਂ ਕੀਤੀ ਜਾ ਸਕਦੀ।

translation: Whatever He has done, or will do, is all by His Own Will. ||2||
simpleTranslation: Everything He does, or will do, is all His choice.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹ ਜੋ ਕੁਝ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ, ਯਾ ਕਰੇਗਾ, ਸਗਲ ਉਸਦੀ ਮਰਜ਼ੀ ਹੈ।

translation: Second Mehla:
simpleTranslation: Second Leader:
punjabiTranslation: ਦੂਜੇ ਮਹਲੇ:

gurmukhi: iehu jgu scY kI hY koTVI scy kw ivic vwsu ]
unicode: ਇਹੁ ਜਗੁ ਸਚੈ ਕੀ ਹੈ ਕੋਠੜੀ ਸਚੇ ਕਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਵਾਸੁ ॥
transliteration: eih jag sachai kee hai koThaRee sache kaa vich vaas ||
translation: This world is the room of the True Lord; within it is the dwelling of the True Lord.
simpleTranslation: This world is where God lives; inside it is God's home.
punjabiTranslation: ਇਹ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਦੇ ਬਾਹਰ ਗੌਂਦ ਵਿੱਚ ਹੈ; ਇਸਦੇ ਅੰਦਰ ਗੌਂਦ ਦਾ ਘਰ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: iekn@w hukim smwie ley iekn@w hukmy kry ivxwsu ]
unicode: ਇਕਨੑਾ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ਲਏ ਇਕਨੑਾ ਹੁਕਮੇ ਕਰੇ ਵਿਣਾਸੁ ॥
transliteration: eikan(h)aa hukam samai le ikan(h)aa hukame kare vinaas ||
translation: By His Command, some are merged into Him, and some, by His Command, are destroyed.
simpleTranslation: By His order, some unite with Him, and some, by His order, are lost.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੇ ਹੁਕਮ ਨਾਲ ਕੁਝ ਉਸ ਵਿਚ ਸਮਾ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹਨ, ਅਤੇ ਕੁਝ, ਉਸਦੇ ਹੁਕਮ ਨਾਲ, ਪਾਉਂਦੇ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: iekn@w BwxY kiF ley iekn@w mwieAw ivic invwsu ]
unicode: ਇਕਨੑਾ ਭਾਣੈ ਕਢਿ ਲਏ ਇਕਨੑਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥
transliteration: eikan(h)aa bhaanai kadd le ikan(h)aa maiaa vich nivaas ||
translation: Some, by the Pleasure of His Will, are lifted up out of Maya, while others are made to dwell within it.
simpleTranslation: Some, by God's will, are raised above illusion, while others stay caught in it.
punjabiTranslation: ਕੁਝ, ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਦੀ ਮਰਜੀ ਨਾਲ, ਮਾਇਆ ਤੋਂ ਉੱਪਰ ਚੁੱਕੇ गए, ਜਦਕਿ ਕੁਝ ਇਸ ਵਿੱਚ ਰਿਹਾਈ ਪਾਉਂਦੇ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: eyv iB AwiK n jwpeI ij iksY Awxy rwis ]
unicode: ਏਵ ਭਿ ਆਖਿ ਨ ਜਾਪਈ ਜਿ ਕਿਸੈ ਆਣੇ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
transliteration: ev bh aakh na jaapiee j kisai aane raas ||
translation: No one can say who will be rescued.
simpleTranslation: No one can predict who will be saved.
punjabiTranslation: ਕੋਈ ਨਹੀਂ ਕਹਿ ਸਕਦਾ ਕਿਥੇ ਕਿਸ ਨੂੰ ਬਚਾਇਆ ਜਾਵੇਗਾ।

gurmukhi: nwnk gurmuiK jwxIAY jw kau Awip kry prgwsu ]3]
unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ॥੩॥
transliteration: naanak gurmukh jaaneeaai jaa kau aap kare paragaas ||3||
translation: O Nanak, he alone is known as Gurmukh, unto whom the Lord reveals Himself. ||3||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, only he is called Gurmukh, to whom God shows Himself.
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਉਹੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖ ਹੈ, ਜਿਸ ਨੂੰ ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਆਪ ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ।

translation: Pauree:
simpleTranslation: Stanza:
punjabiTranslation: ਕਵਿਤਾ:

gurmukhi: nwnk jIA aupwie kY iliK nwvY Drmu bhwilAw ]
unicode: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੀਅ ਉਪਾਇ ਕੈ ਲਿਖਿ ਨਾਵੈ ਧਰਮੁ ਬਹਾਲਿਆ ॥
transliteration: naanak jeea upai kai likh naavai dharam bahaaliaa ||
translation: O Nanak, having created the souls, the Lord installed the Righteous Judge of Dharma to read and record their accounts.
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, God created souls and set the Right Judge to keep track of their deeds.
punjabiTranslation: ਨਾਨਕ, ਰੱਬ ਨੇ ਗਿਆਨ ਬਣਾਏ ਅਤੇ ਸਚੇ ਜਜ਼ਬਾਕਾਰ ਨੂੰ ਲਿਖਵਾ ਦਿੱਤਾ।

gurmukhi: EQY scy hI sic inbVY cuix viK kFy jjmwilAw ]
unicode: ਓਥੈ ਸਚੇ ਹੀ ਸਚਿ ਨਿਬੜੈ ਚੁਣਿ ਵਖਿ ਕਢੇ ਜਜਮਾਲਿਆ ॥
transliteration: othai sache hee sach nibaRai chun vakh kadde jajamaaliaa ||
translation: There, only the Truth is judged true; the sinners are picked out and separated.
simpleTranslation: There, only the truth is recognized; wrongdoers are sorted out and set apart.
punjabiTranslation: ਉੱਥੇ ਸੱਚ ਨੂੰ ਹੀ ਸੱਚ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਜਾਂਦਾ; ਗ਼ਲਤੀਆਂ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲਿਆਂ ਨੂੰ ਛਾਂਟਿਆ ਜਾਂਦਾ.

gurmukhi: Qwau n pwiein kUiVAwr muh kwl@Y dojik cwilAw ]
unicode: ਥਾਉ ਨ ਪਾਇਨਿ ਕੂੜਿਆਰ ਮੁਹ ਕਾਲੑੈ ਦੋਜਕਿ ਚਾਲਿਆ ॥
transliteration: thaau na pain kooRiaar muh kaal(h)ai dhojak chaaliaa ||
translation: The false find no place there, and they go to hell with their faces blackened.
simpleTranslation: Liars find no place there, and they go to hell with darkened faces.
punjabiTranslation: ਝੂਠੇ ਉਦਾਂ ਨਹੀਂ ਮਿਲਦੇ, ਉਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਦੇ ਮੁਹ ਕਾਲੇ ਹੋ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: qyrY nwie rqy sy ijix gey hwir gey is Tgx vwilAw ]
unicode: ਤੇਰੈ ਨਾਇ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਜਿਣਿ ਗਏ ਹਾਰਿ ਗਏ ਸਿ ਠਗਣ ਵਾਲਿਆ ॥
transliteration: terai nai rate se jin ge haar ge s Thagan vaaliaa ||
translation: Those who are imbued with Your Name win, while the cheaters lose.
simpleTranslation: Those who are connected to Your name succeed, while the cheaters fail.
punjabiTranslation: ਤੇਰੇ ਨਾਮ ਨਾਲ ਜੁੜੇ ਜਿੱਤਦੇ ਹਨ, ਠੱਗ ਹਾਰ ਜਾਂਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: The Lord installed the Righteous Judge of Dharma to read and record the accounts. ||2||
simpleTranslation: God made the fair Judge to write and keep track. ||2||
punjabiTranslation: ਰੱਬ ਨੇ ਇਨਸਾਫ਼ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲੇ ਜੱਜ ਨੂੰ ਲਿਖਣ ਅਤੇ ਚਿੱਠੀਆਂ ਸੰਭਾਲਣ ਲਈ ਬਣਾਇਆ। ||੨||

gurmukhi: hm mUrK mugD srxwgqI imlu goivMd rMgw rwm rwjy ]
unicode: ਹਮ ਮੂਰਖ ਮੁਗਧ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਮਿਲੁ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਰੰਗਾ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਜੇ ॥
transliteration: ham moorakh mugadh saranaagatee mil govi(n)dh ra(n)gaa raam raaje ||
translation: I am foolish and ignorant, but I have taken to His Sanctuary; may I merge in the Love of the Lord of the Universe, O Lord King.
simpleTranslation: I’m silly and clueless, but I’ve come to God’s refuge; let me blend in the love of the Universe's Lord, O God King.
punjabiTranslation: ਮੈਂ ਬੇਵਕੂਫ ਅਤੇ ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਹਾਂ, ਪਰ ਮੈਂ ਰੱਬ ਦੀ ਸਰਣში ਆ ਗਿਆ ਹਾਂ; ਮੈਨੂੰ ਸ੍ਰਿਸ਼ਟੀ ਦੇ ਰੱਬ ਦੇ ਪਿਆਰ ਵਿੱਚ ਮਿਲ ਜਾਵਾਂ।

gurmukhi: guir pUrY hir pwieAw hir Bgiq iek mMgw ]
unicode: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਇਕ ਮੰਗਾ ॥
transliteration: gur poorai har paiaa har bhagat ik ma(n)gaa ||
translation: Through the Perfect Guru, I have obtained the Lord, and I beg for the one blessing of devotion to the Lord.
simpleTranslation: Through the Perfect Guru, I found God, and I ask for the blessing of devotion to God.
punjabiTranslation: ਪੂਰਨ ਗੁਰੂ ਨਾਲ, ਮੈਂ ਰੱਬ ਦੱਸਿਆ, ਤੇ ਮੈਂ ਰੱਬ ਦੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਦੀ ਦਾਤ ਮੰਗਦਾ ਹਾਂ।

gurmukhi: myrw mnu qnu sbid ivgwisAw jip Anq qrMgw ]
unicode: ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਵਿਗਾਸਿਆ ਜਪਿ ਅਨਤ ਤਰੰਗਾ ॥
transliteration: meraa man tan sabadh vigaasiaa jap anat tara(n)gaa ||
translation: My mind and body blossom forth through the Word of the Shabad; I meditate on the Lord of infinite waves.
simpleTranslation: My mind and body bloom through the Word; I think of God, who has endless waves.
punjabiTranslation: ਮੇਰਾ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਤਨ ਸਬਦ ਨਾਲ ਖਿੜਦੇ ਹਨ; ਮੈਂ ਪੈਦਾ ਕਰਦੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਨੂੰ ਯਾਦ ਕਰਦਾ ਹਾਂ।

gurmukhi: imil sMq jnw hir pwieAw nwnk sqsMgw ]3]
unicode: ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਸੰਗਾ ॥੩॥
transliteration: mil sa(n)t janaa har paiaa naanak satasa(n)gaa ||3||
translation: Meeting with the humble Saints, Nanak finds the Lord, in the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation. ||3||
simpleTranslation: By meeting humble saints, Nanak finds God in the true gathering. ||3||
punjabiTranslation: ਮਿਲ ਕੇ ਥੋੜੇ ਸੰਤਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਨਾਨਕ ਨੇ ਸਚੇ ਸੰਗਤ ਵਿਚ ਰੱਬ ਪਾਇਆ। ||੩||

translation: Shalok, First Mehla:
simpleTranslation: Shalok, First Guru:
punjabiTranslation: ਸ਼ਲੋਕ, ਪਹਿਲਾ ਗੁਰੂ:

translation: Wonderful is the sound current of the Naad, wonderful is the knowledge of the Vedas.
simpleTranslation: Amazing is the sound of the universe, amazing is the knowledge of the scriptures.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਵਰ ਦਾ ਸ਼ਬਦ ਮਰਜਾਣਾ, ਧਰਮ ਦੀ ਗੱਲ ਵੀ ਮਰਜਾਣੀ।

translation: Wonderful are the beings, wonderful are the species.
simpleTranslation: Amazing are all living things, amazing are all kinds.
punjabiTranslation: ਬਹੁਤ ਸਾਰੇ ਜੀਵੰਨ amazing ਨੇ, ਬਹੁਤ ਸਾਰੇ ਕਿਸਮ amazing ਨੇ।

translation: Wonderful are the forms, wonderful are the colors.
simpleTranslation: Amazing are the shapes, amazing are the colors.
punjabiTranslation: ਬੇਹੱਦ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਨੇ ਰੂਪ, ਬੇਹੱਦ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਨੇ ਰੰਗ ॥

translation: Wonderful are the beings who wander around naked.
simpleTranslation: Amazing are those who wander around without clothes.
punjabiTranslation: ਚੰਗੇ ਹਨ ਜੋ ਨੰਗੇ ਫਿਰਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: Wonderful is the wind, wonderful is the water.
simpleTranslation: Amazing is the wind, amazing is the water.
punjabiTranslation: ਸ਼ਾਨਦਾਰ ਹੈ ਹਵਾ, ਸ਼ਾਨਦਾਰ ਹੈ ਪਾਣੀ।

translation: Wonderful is fire, which works wonders.
simpleTranslation: Fire is amazing; it performs miracles.
punjabiTranslation: ਅਗਨੀਆਂ ਬਹੁਤ ਸ਼ਾਨਦਾਰ ਹਨ; ਇਹ ਵੱਡੇ ਚਮਤਕਾਰ ਕਰਦੀਆਂ ਹਨ।

translation: Wonderful is the earth, wonderful the sources of creation.
simpleTranslation: Amazing is the earth, amazing are the sources of life.
punjabiTranslation: ਅਕਾਲ ਧਰਤੀ ਦਿਲਚਸਪ, ਦਿਲਚਸਪ ਹਨ ਜੀਵਨ ਦੇ ਸਰੋਤ।

translation: Wonderful are the tastes to which mortals are attached.
simpleTranslation: Amazing are the flavors people get attached to.
punjabiTranslation: ਖੂਬਸੂਰਤ ਹਨ ਉਹ ਸੁਆਦ ਜਿਨ੍ਹਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਲੋਕ ਬੰਨ੍ਹੇ ਰਹਿੰਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: Wonderful is union, and wonderful is separation.
simpleTranslation: Amazing is togetherness, and amazing is being apart.
punjabiTranslation: ਬਹੁਤ ਛਿਆਣਾ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ ਮਿਲਣਾ, ਅਤੇ ਬਹੁਤ ਛਿਆਣਾ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ ਦੂਰ ਹੋਣਾ।

translation: Wonderful is hunger, wonderful is satisfaction.
simpleTranslation: Hunger is amazing, satisfaction is amazing.
punjabiTranslation: ਭੁਖ ਵੱਡੀ ਗੱਲ ਹੈ, ਭੋਗ ਵੱਡੀ ਗੱਲ ਹੈ।

translation: Wonderful is His Praise, wonderful is His adoration.
simpleTranslation: Amazing is His praise, amazing is His worship.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਸਰਾਹਣਾ ਦਾ ਚਮਤਕਾਰ, ਉਸਦੀ ਤਿਬਿਵਿਦੀ ਦਾ ਚਮਤਕਾਰ।

translation: Wonderful is the wilderness, wonderful is the path.
simpleTranslation: Amazing is the wilderness, amazing is the journey.
punjabiTranslation: ਅਹਸਾਨ ਹੈ ਇਹ ਜੰਗਲ, ਅਹਸਾਨ ਹੈ ਇਹ ਰਾਹ।

translation: Wonderful is closeness, wonderful is distance.
simpleTranslation: Being close is amazing, being far is amazing.
punjabiTranslation: ਨੇੜੇ ਹੋਣਾ ਮਜ਼ੇਦਾਰ, ਦੂਰ ਹੋਣਾ ਵੀ ਮਜ਼ੇਦਾਰ।

translation: How wonderful to behold the Lord, ever-present here.
simpleTranslation: How amazing to see God, always here.
punjabiTranslation: ਕਿੰਨਾ ਅਦਭੁਤ ਹੈ ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਨੂੰ ਦੇਖਣਾ, ਹਮੇਸ਼ਾ ਇੱਥੇ।

translation: Beholding His wonders, I am wonder-struck.
simpleTranslation: Seeing His wonders, I am amazed.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਹਨਾਂ ਦੇ ਕਰਤਬ ਵੇਖ ਕੇ, ਮੈਂ ਹੈਰਾਨ ਹਾਂ।

translation: O Nanak, those who understand this are blessed with perfect destiny. ||1||
simpleTranslation: O Nanak, those who get this are lucky in life. ||1||
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਜੋ ਇਹ ਸਮਝਦੇ ਹਨ ਉਹ ਜੀਵਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਕਿਸਮਤ ਵਾਲੇ ਹਨ। ||1||

translation: First Mehla:
simpleTranslation: First Shabad:
punjabiTranslation: ਪਹਿਲਾ ਸ਼ਬਦ:

gurmukhi: kudriq idsY kudriq suxIAY kudriq Bau suK swru ]
unicode: ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਦਿਸੈ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਸੁਣੀਐ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਭਉ ਸੁਖ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
transliteration: kudharat dhisai kudharat suneeaai kudharat bhau sukh saar ||
translation: By His Power we see, by His Power we hear; by His Power we have fear, and the essence of happiness.
simpleTranslation: We see by His power, we hear by His power; we feel fear and the essence of happiness through His power.
punjabiTranslation: ਅਸੀਂ ਉਸ ਦੀ ਸ਼ਕਤੀ ਨਾਲ ਦੇਖੀਂ, ਉਸ ਦੀ ਸ਼ਕਤੀ ਨਾਲ ਸੁਣੀਂ; ਉਸ ਦੀ ਸ਼ਕਤੀ ਨਾਲ ਡਰ ਤੇ ਖੁਸ਼ੀ ਦੇ ਮੂਲ ਨੂੰ ਮਹਿਸੂਸ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਾਂ।

gurmukhi: kudriq pwqwlI AwkwsI kudriq srb Awkwru ]
unicode: ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਪਾਤਾਲੀ ਆਕਾਸੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਸਰਬ ਆਕਾਰੁ ॥
transliteration: kudharat paataalee aakaasee kudharat sarab aakaar ||
translation: By His Power the nether worlds exist, and the Akaashic ethers; by His Power the entire creation exists.
simpleTranslation: By His Power the lower worlds exist and the skies; by His Power everything is created.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਤਾਕਤ ਨਾਲ ਪਾਤਾਲ ਹਨ ਤੇ ਅਸਮਾਨ; ਉਸਦੀ ਤਾਕਤ ਨਾਲ ਸਭ ਕੁਝ ਬਣਦਾ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: kudriq vyd purwx kqybw kudriq srb vIcwru ]
unicode: ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਵੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਣ ਕਤੇਬਾ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਸਰਬ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
transliteration: kudharat vedh puraan katebaa kudharat sarab veechaar ||
translation: By His Power the Vedas and the Puraanas exist, and the Holy Scriptures of the Jewish, Christian and Islamic religions. By His Power all deliberations exist.
simpleTranslation: By His strength, the Vedas and Puraanas exist, along with the scriptures of all religions. By His strength, all thoughts exist.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸ ਦੀ ਸ਼ਕਤੀ ਨਾਲ ਵੇਦ ਤੇ ਪੁਰਾਣ ਹਨ, ਦੂਜੀਆਂ ਧਰਮਾਂ ਦੇ ਕਿਤਾਬਾਂ ਦੇ ਸਮੇਤ। ਉਸ ਦੀ ਸ਼ਕਤੀ ਨਾਲ ਸਾਰੇ ਵਿਚਾਰ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: kudriq Kwxw pIxw pYn@xu kudriq srb ipAwru ]
unicode: ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਖਾਣਾ ਪੀਣਾ ਪੈਨੑਣੁ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਸਰਬ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
transliteration: kudharat khaanaa peenaa pain(h)n kudharat sarab piaar ||
translation: By His Power we eat, drink and dress; by His Power all love exists.
simpleTranslation: We eat, drink, and dress by His strength; all love exists by His strength.
punjabiTranslation: ਅਸੀਂ ਉਹਦੇ ਸਖ਼ਤ ਨਾਲ ਖਾ, ਪੀ ਤੇ ਪਹਿਨਦੇ ਹਾਂ; ਸਾਰਾ ਪਿਆਰ ਉਹਦੇ ਨਾਲ ਹੈ.

gurmukhi: kudriq jwqI ijnsI rMgI kudriq jIA jhwn ]
unicode: ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਜਾਤੀ ਜਿਨਸੀ ਰੰਗੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਜੀਅ ਜਹਾਨ ॥
transliteration: kudharat jaatee jinasee ra(n)gee kudharat jeea jahaan ||
translation: - By His Power come the species of all kinds and colors; by His Power the living beings of the world exist.
simpleTranslation: By His power, all kinds and colors exist; by His power, living beings are in the world.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਤਾਕਤ ਨਾਲ, ਹਰ ਜਾਤ ਅਤੇ ਰੰਗ ਮੌਜੂਦ ਹਨ; ਉਸਦੀ ਤਾਕਤ ਨਾਲ, ਜੀਵ ਜਹਾਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਹਨ।

gurmukhi: kudriq nykIAw kudriq bdIAw kudriq mwnu AiBmwnu ]
unicode: ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਨੇਕੀਆ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਬਦੀਆ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਮਾਨੁ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥
transliteration: kudharat nekeeaa kudharat badheeaa kudharat maan abhimaan ||
translation: By His Power virtues exist, and by His Power vices exist. By His Power come honor and dishonor.
simpleTranslation: By God's power, good values exist, and by God's power, bad things exist. By God's power, respect and disrespect come.
punjabiTranslation: ਖੁਦ ਦੇ ਰੂਪ ਵਿੱਚ ਚੰਗੀਆਂ ਗੱਲਾਂ ਹਨ, ਤੇ ਖੁਦ ਦੇ ਰੂਪ ਵਿੱਚ ਨਕਾਰਾਤਮਕ ਗੱਲਾਂ ਹਨ। ਖੁਦ ਦੇ ਫੈਸਲਿਆਂ ਨਾਲ ਮਾਣ ਤੇ ਬੇਮਾਨੀ ਆਉਂਦੀ ਹੈ।

gurmukhi: kudriq pauxu pwxI bYsMqru kudriq DrqI Kwku ]
unicode: ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਪਉਣੁ ਪਾਣੀ ਬੈਸੰਤਰੁ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਧਰਤੀ ਖਾਕੁ ॥
transliteration: kudharat paun paanee baisa(n)tar kudharat dharatee khaak ||
translation: By His Power wind, water and fire exist; by His Power earth and dust exist.
simpleTranslation: By His power, wind, water, and fire exist; by His power, earth and dust exist.
punjabiTranslation: ਉਸਦੀ ਤਾਕਤ ਨਾਲ, ਹਵਾ, ਪਾਣੀ, ਤੇ ਆਗ ਹੈ; ਉਸਦੀ ਤਾਕਤ ਨਾਲ, ਧਰਤੀ ਤੇ ਮਿੱਟੀ ਹੈ.

gurmukhi: sB qyrI kudriq qUM kwidru krqw pwkI nweI pwku ]
unicode: ਸਭ ਤੇਰੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਤੂੰ ਕਾਦਿਰੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪਾਕੀ ਨਾਈ ਪਾਕੁ ॥
transliteration: sabh teree kudharat too(n) kaadhir karataa paakee naiee paak ||
translation: Everything is in Your Power, Lord; You are the all-powerful Creator. Your Name is the Holiest of the Holy.
simpleTranslation: Everything is in Your hands, God; You are the all-powerful Creator. Your Name is the purest of all.

simpleTranslation: O Nanak, by His will, He sees and fills the creation; He is truly unmatched. ||2||

translation: Shalok, First Mehla:
simpleTranslation: Shalok, First Beat.
punjabiTranslation: ਸਲੋਕ, ਪਹਿਲਾ ਮੀਲ।

translation: In the Fear of God, the wind and breezes ever blow.
simpleTranslation: With respect for God, the wind and breezes always blow.
punjabiTranslation: ਗੋਦ ਦੇ ਡਰ ਨਾਲ ਪਵਣ ਤੇ ਹਵਾ ਹਮੇਸ਼ਾਂ ਵਹਿੰਦੀ ਹੈ।

translation: In the Fear of God, thousands of rivers flow.
simpleTranslation: In the fear of God, thousands of rivers flow.
punjabiTranslation: ਜਦੋਂ ਡਰ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਹੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦਾ, ਲਖਾਂ ਦਰਿਆ ਚਲਦੇ ਹਨ।

translation: In the Fear of God, fire is forced to labor.
simpleTranslation: In the fear of God, fire has to work hard.
punjabiTranslation: ਪਰਮਾਤਮਾ ਦੇ ਡਰ ਵਿਚ, ਅੱਗ ਨੂੰ ਮਿਹਨਤ ਕਰਨੀ ਪੈਂਦੀ ਹੈ।

translation: In the Fear of God, the earth is crushed under its burden.
simpleTranslation: In God's fear, the earth is weighed down.
punjabiTranslation: ਰੱਬ ਦੇ ਡਰ ਵਿਚ ਜ਼ਮੀਨ ਵੱਧ ਰਹੀ ਹੈ।

simpleTranslation: In the fear of God, the clouds float in the sky.

simpleTranslation: With the fear of God, the sun shines bright, and with the fear of God, the moon glows.

simpleTranslation: They travel millions of miles, forever.

punjabiTranslation: ਧਰਮ ਦੇ ਡਰ ਵਿੱਚ ਸਿਧ ਵੀ ਹਨ, ਬੁਧ ਵੀ, ਦੇਵ ਤੋਂ ਥੋੜ੍ਹੇ ਵੀ, ਅਤੇ ਯੋਗੀ ਵੀ.

simpleTranslation: In the fear of God, many come and go.

punjabiTranslation: ਰੱਬ ਨੇ ਸਾਡੇ ਸਿਰਾਂ ਉਤੇ ਆਪਣਾ ਡਰ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਹੈ।

translation: O Nanak, the Fearless Lord, the Formless Lord, the True Lord, is One. ||1||
simpleTranslation: Oh Nanak, God without fear, God without form, the true one is one.
punjabiTranslation: ਓ ਨਾਨਕ, ਬਿਨਾ ਡਰ ਵਾਲਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ, ਬਿਨਾ ਸੂਰਤ ਵਾਲਾ, ਸੱਚਾ ਇੱਕ ਹੈ।
